name: Save Roe
subject: Stop. Abortion. Bans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | For almost 50 years we have fought to uphold _Roe_ and we are now a pro-choice majority country. And, for almost 50 years, anti-choice Republicans have fought to dismantle it, spending millions of dollars in dark money over the past decade to rig our courts in order to dismantle it.
Unfortunately, right now they’re winning. This past few weeks alone we’ve seen increased attacks by an emboldened Republican Party.
**FLORIDA PHOENIX [2/2/22]:** FL Senate panel approves 15-week abortion ban; no exceptions for rape, incest, human trafficking **WASHINGTON POST [1/29/22]:** Republican-led states rush to pass antiabortion bills before Supreme Court rules on Roe **HOUSTON CHRONICLE [2/2/22]:** Abortion procedures in Texas dropped sharply during first month of ban, data shows
With the Supreme Court on the verge of overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , we must not only elect pro-choice Democrats, we must ensure we elect pro-choice champions. We need Democrats who will fight like hell for our reproductive freedom at a federal level— and not take no for an answer.
**[Melanie D’Arrigo is running for Congress to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act, codify Roe v. Wade into law, repeal the Hyde Amendment, and fight back against Republicans who want to control our bodies. Join THOUSANDS of grassroots donors to her campaign today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC9fR7FJQ9qqm9gMRGmNMsYLixrsFkmW32BYKTmDvXQzSxPLX6NV5WrBMK7M8-obyMF6QeOwdCjntw_AuMaNldhae4W5Y1kPbfjRhaST1XFqCYFe5EUEhl96GElgp-4lzmTGTKkpuHz6t4fHiQ8upFnBBRBBEaUBPzxW6Q11np_aXDv33Xm2fB0UUDihpSiwEevcI10YdHGTp6EpG9lJZlRQ7sPNh54Z3Qyk4B1fMLZrLFqKwp_q2bSman0NMNaSMlA/3ji/MheSl6cYT0eh6xOpPSx2uA/h0/UBgNl-Bl67_uZncWv8JVnyT7S7trBpUTVEfxaXNEntM)**

| Are you with them, friend? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41696682/329938852/1022035571?refcode=ea.a6e785b8-968b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.a6e785b8-968b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmU3ODViOC05NjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=thJUVYfR5Yw3CPY9uQPGvt1UzT6xvoDJYF9pqQVAFZA=&emci=d8f341b9-878b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a6e785b8-968b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=22604289) Team — I have just one question for you today: **Are you standing behind the Cincinnati Bengals in this weekend’s Super Bowl?** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41696690/329938853/1022035571?refcode=ea.a6e785b8-968b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.a6e785b8-968b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmU3ODViOC05NjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=thJUVYfR5Yw3CPY9uQPGvt1UzT6xvoDJYF9pqQVAFZA=&emci=d8f341b9-878b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a6e785b8-968b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=22604289) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41696693/329938862/1022035571?refcode=ea.a6e785b8-968b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.a6e785b8-968b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmU3ODViOC05NjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=thJUVYfR5Yw3CPY9uQPGvt1UzT6xvoDJYF9pqQVAFZA=&emci=d8f341b9-878b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a6e785b8-968b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=22604289)

I have to admit: When I said that Ohio needed a comeback, last weekend’s wasn’t the one I saw coming – but _boy_ am I glad we pulled it off. And as a former Mayor of Cincinnati, **I couldn’t be prouder of our hometown team for taking it all the way to the Super Bowl.**
**[How about you? clean_body: Our deadline is here! | Friends, We’re coming up on our February Mid-Month Fundraising Deadline! I know it may seem like we sure have a lot of deadlines, but we do this to make sure that our campaign stays on track to beat Career Politicians. Career Politicians have hundreds of thousands of dollars flowing in from their insider friends and from special interest groups. Our campaign, on the other hand, is mainly funded by grassroots supporters like you. We need your support before the fundraising deadline to make sure we stay on track! Let’s bring America First policies to Washington. Let’s defend President Trump’s legacy and fight for our country. Chip in now! | Thank you, Mike Durant PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE Not authorized by any other candidate. body:
| **The Center Square:**
**_Poll: 75% say 'Defund the Police' caused violent crime wave_**

| Pls. confirm before midnight:

**WHAT DO YOU THINK WILL HAPPEN IF DEMOCRATS _DEFUND THE POLICE_?

** _"Rep. Cori Bush (D-Mo.) says she's not going to stop using the slogan 'defund the police' ahead of this fall's midterms..." -- AXIOS 2/8/22_

UNIQUE ID: #188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
SUPPORTER STATUS: [_**UNCONFIRMED >>**_](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6d6cd5bb3e0f418e8a0faa7c551cb64c&_e=JtCuKc-Hrysy1akQsqOJmyqoVdjtQ3HLqm-LVxeDSsYIJA5gJHTrk-mvFxJkEyDuvvEs4gTRm2qE21ynXF_idguGea7THAkPdQHdSrIvXcmqAPC_VlpGizUtvVh2xq9KTM6ERsvY5bWXQg6hzY-pUca_EiB4sQ6mNoKTXKFMgf0R67sq__bP7WaTyGpkIEDYruDQiHwaKw9G9_79hu5GXKoA_QJuVeAKWY6mD4kZzyRaBYVX3HzDcpzELo4OfXiYtCzNQyyAyezOJbn1P5cmtUgS9WuESwfm6aHemE_wg8-hZxQIjPiWZkQeIpgsGi0spuYw4dEYz9B1Z6Xtu2c2F0vlnc1DIxchu50RRWlTdkAk86y6HYg9ysnZ8j5p4eFBXwJRvFZNiAEDYiaz2CNE2L74TrTMfcDj5vYZwZNbGyC2yNO3opMfrIHxqD0VVp-06l4HfBagACpCwBgOeSfxCA%3D%3D)

Progressive Democrats want us to believe **Defunding the Police** will decrease the rate of violent crime, but the facts don't back them up...

_"After the city of Portland slashed its police budget by $12 million and eliminated three police units, the police withdrew while shootings climbed 173% and murders rose 255% in nine months" -- LELDF 4/14/21_

That's why we're calling for 10,000 responses to our survey before midnight.

**Defunding the Police** could be on the table if Democrats win in the midterms.

body:
This district was R+2 but now they've given the edge to the radical liberal running for re-election.

| _***URGENT NRCC REPORT***_
_**Date:**_ **02/11/2022 – 12:22pm**
_**Re:**_ **Gerrymandering Update: Marc Molinaro**

**Fellow American- I just got an urgent report from the NRCC saying the Radical Liberals have gerrymandered my district to be D+1!**

They tried drawing me out of my district and now they’ve shifted the lines to include 3% more Democrats! **Please don’t make the mistake of thinking that’s insignificant,** _**a 3% increase means over 10,000 more Democrats that were gerrymandered into the district!**_

Every year swing districts like mine get closer and closer on votes, and we cannot afford to let them beat us by 1% on election day. clean_body: This district was R+2 but now they've given the edge to the radical liberal running for re-election. | *URGENT NRCC REPORT Date: 02/11/2022 – 12:22pm Re: Gerrymandering Update: Marc Molinaro Fellow American- I just got an urgent report from the NRCC saying the Radical Liberals have gerrymandered my district to be D+1! They tried drawing me out of my district and now they’ve shifted the lines to include 3% more Democrats! Please don’t make the mistake of thinking that’s insignificant, a 3% increase means over 10,000 more Democrats that were gerrymandered into the district! Every year swing districts like mine get closer and closer on votes, and we cannot afford to let them beat us by 1% on election day. Independents and moderate Democrats are angry with Biden and Pelosi. They want to vote for someone else but we need to give them a reason to vote for a Republican like me, and that requires ads, door knocking, phone calls, mailers, and so on. That’s why your support is so critical to fight back against this gerrymandering because $10 means dozens of phone calls to swing voters, $20 equals a targeted digital ad for a day, $50 is dozens of mailers, and the list goes on. Your support is critical to winning back this seat. I wouldn’t be bothering you if I didn’t think it would help us win in this year’s midterm election. clean_body: When it comes to career politicians not really looking out for us, nothing should shock us these days, but...really? | | Hi Friend, This week, we learned that Members of Congress own individual stocks worth $, and that many of their trades follow the trends of the legislation that is before them in the Capitol. When it comes to career politicians not really looking out for us, nothing should shock us these days, but...really? If you're elected to Congress, you should serve the people, not your own stock portfolio. This isn't complicated: If you want to day trade, get another job. We all know that corruption and corporate lobbying is getting in the way of moving essential priorities like childcare, healthcare, climate, and housing forward in Congress. That is why I am in this fight, and why I'll never take a dime from corporate lobbyists, or trade stocks while on I'm the clock for the people of Oregon. We are now just95 days away from our election, and we're not going to let Wall Street, the fossil fuel industry, big tech or buy it from us. Every hour is crucial from here on out, our campaign is going full tilt and to keep it going we need your support today. This campaign is funded by grassroots donors like you and I will never accept a dime of corporate cash. I will always be on your side, committed in the fight against hedge fund billionaires, corporate backed Super PAC's, and plain old fashioned corruption in Washington. To get it done, we've got to do it. Onward, Doyle | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Canning For Congress 2020, please .

body:

| | | **URGENT:** _Roe v. Wade_ is in SERIOUS danger of being overturned -- putting millions of Americans' rights in jeopardy -- **and Justice Sonia Sotomayor is raising the alarm:**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5996?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220211-RoevWadeAlert-SotomayorQuote-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220211-RoevWadeAlert-SotomayorQuote-Pros-sl1&akid=2950%2E9716520%2ECoVFPZ)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden Border Crisis
body: New Vaccine Lawsuit [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch Sues HHS for Records of Communication from Top FDA Officials Who Resigned Reportedly over COVID Booster Shots [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57882&L=26760&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL21lZGlhLWx5aW5nLWFib3V0LXRydW1wLWFnYWluLWJvb3N0ZXItY292ZXItdXAtdHJ1Y2tlcnMtdXBkYXRlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] Two of our nation’s top vaccine scientists [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57882&L=26759&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9lbmRwdHMuY29tL2JyZWFraW5nLWluLWEtbWFqb3ItYmxvdy10by12YWNjaW5lLWVmZm9ydHMtc2VuaW9yLWZkYS1sZWFkZXJzLXN0ZXBwaW5nLWRvd24tcmVwb3J0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] – called giants in the field – are no longer at their posts in the FDA, and it appears that the Biden White House’s politicization of the COVID vaccines is the reason. To get to the bottom of it, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Health and Human Services for records of communication from Dr. Marion Gruber [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57882&L=26751&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGlua2VkaW4uY29tL2luL21hcmlvbi1ncnViZXIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] and Dr. Philip Krause [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57882&L=26752&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGlua2VkaW4uY29tL2luL3BoaWwta3JhdXNlLWI5NjY4ODc1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==], the former director and deputy director of the Food and Drug Administration’s Office of Vaccines Research and Review, who reportedly resigned during the White House’s push to approve the COVID-19 “booster shot” (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57882&L=26758&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLWVtYWlscy1ib29zdGVyLXZhY2NpbmVzLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMDI5My8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] (No. 1:22-cv-00292)). We sued in the United States District Court of the District of Columbia after HHS failed to respond to a September 3, 2021, FOIA request for: * All emails sent to and from Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research Director Marion Gruber regarding the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention/CDC, the Advisory Committee on Immunization (ACIP), and/or “booster vaccines” for the prevention and/or treatment of SARS-CoV-2 and/or COVID-19. * All emails sent to and from Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research Deputy Director Phil Krause regarding the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention/CDC, the Advisory Committee on Immunization (ACIP), and/or “booster vaccines” for the prevention and/or treatment of SARS-CoV-2 and/or COVID-19. On September 22, 2021, the FDA approved the use of a booster dose of the Pfizer drug. According to the organization’s news release [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57882&L=26754&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmRhLmdvdi9uZXdzLWV2ZW50cy9wcmVzcy1hbm5vdW5jZW1lbnRzL2ZkYS1hdXRob3JpemVzLWJvb3N0ZXItZG9zZS1wZml6ZXItYmlvbnRlY2gtY292aWQtMTktdmFjY2luZS1jZXJ0YWluLXBvcHVsYXRpb25zP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz], the FDA “amended the emergency use authorization (EUA) for the Pfizer-BioNTech COVID-19 Vaccine to allow for use of a single booster dose, to be administered at least six months after completion of the primary series” for people at “high risk” of “severe COVID-19.” On September 13, 2021, Gruber and Krause [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57882&L=26755&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94YnVzaW5lc3MuY29tL3BvbGl0aWNzL2ZkYS1yZXNpZ25hdGlvbnMtd2hpdGUtaG91c2UtYm9vc3Rlci1ndWlkYW5jZS1tZXNzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] were among a group of resigning [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57882&L=26756&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vaGVhbHRoL2NvdmlkLTE5LXZhY2NpbmUtYm9vc3Rlci11bm5lY2Vzc2FyeS1mZGEtcmVzaWduaW5nP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] doctors who agreed that, “Available evidence doesn’t yet indicate a need for COVID-19 vaccine booster shots among the general population ...” Also, on September 13, 2021, _The Lancet_ published a paper [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57882&L=26757&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlbGFuY2V0LmNvbS9qb3VybmFscy9sYW5jZXQvYXJ0aWNsZS9QSUlTMDE0MC02NzM2KDIxKTAyMDQ2LTgvZnVsbHRleHQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] to which Gruber and Krause contributed that noted: Careful and public scrutiny of the evolving data will be needed to assure that decisions about boosting are informed by reliable science more than by politics.... Widespread boosting should be undertaken only if there is clear evidence that it is appropriate. This booster shot cover-up shows the FDA is politicized and corrupt. The American people have a right to know about the safety and efficacy of the COVID-19 vaccines – especially given that officials in the FDA seem to have objected to the agency’s recommendations about the vaccines. JUDICIAL WATCH AND CATHOLICVOTE SUE FOR BIDEN BORDER CRISIS President Biden has a lot of explaining to do about his administration’s spurious actions along the border. Now we learn that federal bureaucrats are shoveling your tax dollars to charities to do their dirty work. Joining with CatholicVote Civic Action, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit for communications between the Department of Homeland Security and the Department of Health and Human Services with Catholic organizations that were aiding illegal immigrants near the Texas border (_CatholicVote Civic Action and Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security and U.S. Department of Health and Human Services_ [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57882&L=26750&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdGhvbGljdm90ZS12LWRocy1hbmQtaGhzLWltbWlncmF0aW9uLTAwMjkwMC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] (No. 1:22-cv-00290)). CatholicVote.org [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57882&L=26749&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9jYXRob2xpY3ZvdGUub3JnL21pc3Npb24tbGVhcm4tbW9yZT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] is a community of patriotic Americans who believe that the timeless truths of the Catholic faith are good for America. It makes its mission “to inspire every Catholic in America to live out the truths of our faith in public life.” We sued in the United States District Court for the District of Columbia after both the U.S. Customs and Border Patrol and HHS failed to respond to FOIA requests on September 1, 2021. The first FOIA request is for: All communications between the U.S. Customs and Border Patrol and any of the following: * The Diocese of Brownsville (San Juan, Texas); * Bishop Daniel E. Flores in his capacity as Bishop of the Diocese of Brownsville, Texas; * Catholic Charities of the Rio Grande Valley (“CCRGV”); * Sister Norma Pimentel in her capacity as the Executive Director of CCRGV; or * The Humanitarian Respite Center in McAllen, Texas. The second FOIA request is for: All communications between the U.S. Customs and Border Patrol and the U.S. Conference of Catholic Bishops regarding any of the following: * Catholic Charities of the Rio Grande Valley (“CCRGV”); * Sister Norma Pimentel in her capacity as the Executive Director of CCRGV; or * the Humanitarian Respite Center in McAllen, Texas. In a February 3 interview, Sister Pimentel acknowledged that her charity is reimbursed with tax dollars to buy “very few” plane and bus tickets for illegal aliens to move throughout the United States. In July 2021, a Texas Police Officer encountered a COVID-positive illegal immigrant family [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57882&L=26747&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kZncuY2JzbG9jYWwuY29tLzIwMjEvMDcvMjkvbGEtam95YS1jb3ZpZC1taWdyYW50cy13aGF0YWJ1cmdlci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] at a fast food restaurant near the border who had been released by Border Patrol. The family told the officer that Catholic Charities of the Rio Grande Valley “had booked all the rooms in the hotel to house undocumented immigrants detained by Border Patrol.” The police added, “Border Patrol was quarantining other undocumented individuals who were COVID positive, or showed symptoms of illness, then handing them over to the non-profit. Catholic Charities would in turn place the undocumented individuals in hotels ...” On July 28, 2021, Texas Governor Greg Abbott issued an executive order [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57882&L=26748&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9nb3YudGV4YXMuZ292L3VwbG9hZHMvZmlsZXMvcHJlc3MvRU8tR0EtMzdfdHJhbnNwb3J0YXRpb25fb2ZfbWlncmFudHNfZHVyaW5nX0NPVklEX0lNQUdFXzA3LTI4LTIwMjEucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] halting the transportation of illegal immigrants by any person other than, “a federal, state or local law-enforcement official.” “The Biden administration has refused to provide copies of communications between Catholic-affiliated charities and organizations at the border,” said Brian Burch, president of CatholicVote. “Their lack of transparency and obstruction forced us to file these federal lawsuits. American Catholics deserve to know the full extent of the U.S. government's role in funding and coordinating with Catholic church affiliated agencies at the border, and what role these agencies played in the record surge of illegal immigrants over the past year. We will do whatever is necessary to uncover the truth.” Americans have the right to know how the Biden administration is using tax dollars to conspire with “charities” and release illegal immigrants into their communities. U.S. TAXPAYER FUNDED KOREAN COVID TEST TURNS OUT TO BE FLAWED The federal government continues to demonstrate its ineptitude in dealing with COVID-19. The latest: It shelled out millions for a test that doesn’t work. And, as our _Corruption Chronicles_ reports [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57882&L=26742&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGUtaGFsdHMtdXNlLW9mLWZsYXdlZC11LXMtZnVuZGVkLWtvcmVhbi1jb3ZpZC10ZXN0LWhhbGYtcmV0dXJuLWZhbHNlLW5lZ2F0aXZlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==], we had to learn this from the Philippines: A COVID-19 test developed by a Korean company with a $10.3 million infusion from the U.S. government is so flawed at least one state stopped using it after just a few weeks and a third-world country flagged it as defective months ago. In late September, the rapid antigen tests received Emergency Use Authorization (EUA) from the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) to test individuals suspected by healthcare providers of being infected and by the end of December the authorization was expanded to include asymptomatic individuals. The test is made by South Korean manufacturer GenBody and is being promoted by a “minority-owned, female-led” public relations agency based in southern California. Utah began using GenBody in late December at state-run testing sites. This week the Utah Department of Health (UDOH) announced it will temporarily pause the use of the on-site rapid antigen tests at all state-operated facilities after data revealed more than half of the tests resulted in a false negative. “The UDOH analyzed test results from nearly 18,000 Utah residents who received both GenBody rapid antigen and PCR tests on the same day,” the UDOH statement says. “Among people who tested positive by PCR, more than half of them tested negative by GenBody rapid antigen test; this was true even for people who reported COVID-like symptoms.” State epidemiologists raised questions about the performance of the GenBody rapid tests, the agency further writes. In a local newspaper article Utah state epidemiologist Leisha Nolen says concerns were raised last week when mobile testing partners “noticed that they were getting a lot more negatives that would come up later as positives.” The health official reveals that for every 100 people who tested positive on a PCR test, only 38% tested positive on the GenBody rapid antigen test. “Even for those who displayed clear symptoms of COVID-19, only 41% out of every 100 who tested positive on a PCR test also tested positive on a GenBody rapid test,” the news story says, adding that Nolan and her colleagues “were really concerned by those numbers.” The UDOH announcement acknowledges that rapid antigen tests are known to be less likely to identify a positive individual, but the difference identified in the state analysis was higher than expected. Back in October, officials in the Philippines—an impoverished third-world country—issued a warning against 10 COVID-19 antigen and rapid tests that failed to meet its health department standards. GenBody appears at the top of the list. A director at the Philippine FDA explains in a local media report that all of the tests were manufactured abroad and failed to comply with the standard for sensitivity and specificity set by the southeast Asian country’s Research Institute for Tropical Medicine (RITM), the agency charged with protecting Filipinos against infectious disease. “Those test kits published with failed performance validation were not able to comply with the standard set for sensitivity, specificity or both,” according to the Filipino FDA director who is identified in the news article as Maria Cecilia Matienzo. GenBody received $10.3 million from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) to develop the COVID-19 test kits. The money was doled out under a program called Rapid Acceleration of Diagnostics (RADx) launched by the National Institutes of Health (NIH), a division of HHS, to speed innovation in the development, commercialization and implantation of technologies for COVID-19 testing. “Accurate, fast, easy-to-use, and widely accessible testing is required before the nation can safely return to normal life,” the NIH writes in its overview of RADx. The initiative is described as a national call for scientists and organizations to bring their innovative ideas for new COVID-19 testing approaches and strategies. “Funded projects include new applications of existing technologies that make tests easier to use, easier to access, and more accurate,” according to the NIH. “At the same time, NIH is seeking opportunities to move more advanced diagnostic technologies swiftly through the development pipeline toward commercialization and broad availability — with the goal of making millions of tests per week available to Americans, particularly those most vulnerable to and/or disproportionately impacted by COVID-19, and having even more tests available in time for the 2020–2021 flu season.” Until next week ... body:
Peter,

The Biden regime is making a mockery of America.

**And the world is laughing at us.**

That's why I am fighting to restore President Trump's legacy in Congress.

And I've made a video about my plan to fight for America First and stop Biden's _radical communist_ agenda.

**I hope you will take a minute to watch my video linked below:**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59633553:sRmCtJHNy:m:1:2365227053:94F50529486E7FC1D88EEC9648CD4022:r) **[HELP SEND MARY MILLER BACK TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN $20.22 TODAY!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59633553:sRmCtJHNy:m:1:2365227053:94F50529486E7FC1D88EEC9648CD4022:r)** You see, I'm the only America First candidate in my race, and I'm the only one who has fought against the D.C. Swamp.

That's exactly why President Trump endorsed me for re-election.

And that's put a huge target on my back.

**So after you watch the video, I hope you will help send me back to Congress** **[by chipping in a contribution to my campaign right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59633553:sRmCtJHNy:m:1:2365227053:94F50529486E7FC1D88EEC9648CD4022:r).**

First, the Illinois Democrats called me their number one target to defeat in this election.

Chicago Democrats are teaming up with establishment RINOs to attack me because I stand with President Trump.

_That 's why it's vital I share this video with every voter in the district_.

After watching the video, **[I hope you will support me in my re-election by chipping in $10, $17.76, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, $2,900, or whatever you can afford today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59633553:sRmCtJHNy:m:1:2365227053:94F50529486E7FC1D88EEC9648CD4022:r).**

You and I have seen that our country is headed in the wrong direction because of Joe Biden and the weak RINOs who are scared to stand up to him.

**It 's up to us to save America.**

Democrats are allowing rampant illegal immigration.

They are enriching the Chinese Communist Party with "Green New Deal" policies that promote batteries, windmills, and solar panels made in China.

And they continue to push radical mandates that restrict our most basic freedoms without giving us a voice or a vote. No one elected Dr. Fauci!

**But unlike the RINOs and Never-Trumpers that call themselves "conservatives," I will actually fight for your God-given rights!**

That's why I have introduced legislation to stop the Chinese Communist Party from taking advantage of America by buying up our land.

I'm also fighting to protect our nation's future by introducing the "Make Our Schools Great Again Act," which would prohibit federal funding from going to schools that impose mask or vaccine mandates.

And I introduced the "Liberating Learning for Kids Act," which would prohibit federal funding from going to schools that do not provide in-person instruction for all students.

My friend, it's bills like these that will help restore America back to normal.

**But not many have the guts to do what it takes.**

And I can't do this without _your_ help.

**[So, will you help me continue fighting to put America and our children FIRST by chipping in a generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59633553:sRmCtJHNy:m:1:2365227053:94F50529486E7FC1D88EEC9648CD4022:r)?**

With you by my side, we can stop Biden's communist takeover and save our country.

I hope I can count on your support today.

**God bless you, and God bless America.** **[PLEASE CHIP IN $20.22 TODAY!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59633553:sRmCtJHNy:m:1:2365227053:94F50529486E7FC1D88EEC9648CD4022:r)** Mary Miller
Congresswoman (R-IL)

name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6791%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2bcamKXXfE1PTsLqMXjDCRg&sysid=1)
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69942%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iXL6ETNEZulslmKy%2b2G6Xw&sysid=1) According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69943%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3kjRbm2h11UyOPskM71ZzA&sysid=1). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# Last Time, Their Best-Selling 3-Month Kits _Sold Out_ Completely In Just 4 Days... Today They Have Them Back In Stock!
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69944%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iZw8v%2bFy2G8pXbS4Vy5D4w&sysid=1) **Since they finally have these best-selling kits back in stock...** They're going to load you up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69055%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GbEYEipHvvLImeZn49BVJQ&sysid=1) when you get yours today. Just look at all you get with this special: **It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit.** It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window. So you spare a **_ton_** and they're just getting warmed up, because... [**You also get $478 worth of FREE Gifts!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69056%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NC%2bOMINoUKhRlCwPJhb9DQ&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on our website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... _(Hold on to your hat, folks)_ **FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF Your Next Purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69057%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m5Efwa8cPR2czfcc1vVegg&sysid=1)** Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. [**So you're getting huge savings today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69058%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9PtuAgE%2f5PYYLkFHTMI5vA&sysid=1) **You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan.** Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69059%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KTyhX2yHTqdCOtmhzZ7bww&sysid=1) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still **return triple your purchase amount.** That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69057%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m5Efwa8cPR2czfcc1vVegg&sysid=1)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [take action](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69050%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kvgj1sTBNplqMSLIu%2bsOAA&sysid=1) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [imagine how much better you'll feel right away](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69051%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cDtkOx9%2bAj2a5%2bHymlF9%2bg&sysid=1). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69057%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m5Efwa8cPR2czfcc1vVegg&sysid=1)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit in the mail and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmered. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It’s a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our Food4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69057%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m5Efwa8cPR2czfcc1vVegg&sysid=1)**

107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314
[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6791%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2bcamKXXfE1PTsLqMXjDCRg&sysid=1)

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6791%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2bcamKXXfE1PTsLqMXjDCRg&sysid=1)

It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. First, you get their no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still return triple your purchase amount. That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters | | Rory H. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. name: American Update
subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8442%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=hfXR%2bSyB3qnQcimd0GiPGQ&sysid=1)
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13225%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fxMmTGm3VDX9387Q6aeJfA&sysid=1) According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13226%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bRk%2bvwBvoL7lRuaOIdPf6A&sysid=1). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# Last Time, Their Best-Selling 3-Month Kits _Sold Out_ Completely In Just 4 Days... Today They Have Them Back In Stock!
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13227%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LR1g%2fDhpAvXHLKIwGPvRCA&sysid=1) **Since they finally have these best-selling kits back in stock...** They're going to load you up with [**FREE GIFTS**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13228%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xjFZYKozA79m5P5Rd2qOZA&sysid=1) when you get yours today. Just look at all you get with this special: **It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit.** It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window. So you spare a **_ton_** and they're just getting warmed up, because... [**You also get $478 worth of FREE Gifts!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13229%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9EP4O%2bWPFj7zEurBJqobpQ&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on our website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... _(Hold on to your hat, folks)_ **FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF Your Next Purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13220%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pftKXO5OCMaLGtp%2b6cVZCw&sysid=1)** Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. [**So you're getting huge savings today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13221%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dnENT86Iu5XE7q%2fQkZnjow&sysid=1) **You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan.** Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13222%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fac0vHiMHDYLbkyoleYKvA&sysid=1) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still **return triple your purchase amount.** That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13220%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pftKXO5OCMaLGtp%2b6cVZCw&sysid=1)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [take action](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13223%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=trwiHQUZULiMJjO9e6hzPQ&sysid=1) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? With those kinds of numbers, it’s no wonder Charlie is our best hope to defeat Ron DeSantis and build a Florida for All! = Thanks so much, Team Crist = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.
_Sponsored message_
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpggtomhmjpnibafhe415r0dqu42tlq05iapm2g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm8pr7c1h2bs) According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zafrmbc144fossi2m0lgibr5njvlj9ogo9d3daq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm8pr7c1h2bs). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I 've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# Last Time, Their Best-Selling 3-Month Kits _Sold Out_ Completely In Just 4 Days... Today They Have Them Back In Stock!
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztn5rtdktm9bgcs2eelqtsm6b54jgp2n9mdnlavo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm8pr7c1h2bs) **Since they finally have these best-selling kits back in stock...** They're going to load you up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zaqf2dniivpfd0geqq0vmit0a76kktbngu8q4gc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm8pr7c1h2bs) when you get yours today. Just look at all you get with this special: **It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit.** It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window. So you spare a **_ton_** and they're just getting warmed up, because... [**You also get $478 worth of FREE Gifts!**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp836ebdun0jo9os5vs494o0c074cn0heafel300_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm8pr7c1h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on our website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... _(Hold on to your hat, folks)_ **FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe 's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF Your Next Purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z43rmiai7ccbnb7nm9riuviq8ia5hp7pqqfsk77o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm8pr7c1h2bs)** Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. [**So you 're getting huge savings today.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zph9l41vmj58lumc8c0iqanpi6cnl10lntqqvg0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm8pr7c1h2bs) **You 'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan.** Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0m9fnho21ieglg1fvulno5klt0jh5f2v482284g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm8pr7c1h2bs) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still **return triple your purchase amount.** That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zk776gjlrsp3qlsdo7be53rue6f1n99iht7kip3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm8pr7c1h2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [take action](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2grnng7opi8os46vrkn77khq5jh6lfunorqur90_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm8pr7c1h2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [imagine how much better you'll feel right away](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0glg7ah6g2c8bif5n52nablstr7gad0hodc6c6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm8pr7c1h2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it 's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmot62bb5j0g5nks4ud2fsbkgbdqpcse9r24nr80_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm8pr7c1h2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---

When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our Food4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: BREAKING - Lankford Acknowledges He's In Trouble Against Lahmeyer In Oklahoma
body:
Lankford Realizes He's In Trouble The Oklahoman just reported that Incumbent James Lankford is launching a TV ad campaign starting this Sunday. Lan
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3829310.3212.1.51cd994a029bc091a8db7fbccbb8256c) |
---
## Lankford Realizes He's In Trouble
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3829310.3213.1.20d5f93e869b6e724a5d619027e9e8af)
---
The Oklahoman just reported that **Incumbent** [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3829310.3214.1.879032c6fa4830614939e0e3075aeabb) is launching a TV ad campaign starting this Sunday.
[Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3829310.3215.1.20155ea6e52d215db65cdbf1aef98628) has realized he no longer can ignore [Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3829310.3216.1.b8023b34b635a61dffab4f210dbd3882) and the Patriot movement here in Oklahoma.
Every **indicator** (Fundraising, Polling and Media Engagement) shows it is a _two-man race_ between **Incumbent** [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3829310.3217.1.a4f28cd73ea9564c6b2182204d5fe2ed) and **Outsider** [Jackson Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3829310.3218.1.33c43e88a14b3846bfe54bb20e670bf7).
With the [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3829310.3219.1.6b05f0ded1b2f9d96c6c596b7c0e535b) camp already running TV ads this far in advance means ONLY one thing - **HE KNOWS HE IS IN TROUBLE.**
Incumbent Senators like [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3829310.3220.1.c17f61725111339c2abaf1a3ad81562c) DO NOT run ads this early.
This tells us that [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3829310.3221.1.e605138a1a95678040207bb20ff8c687) has the same polling that my team has.
Recently, we conducted an unbiased survey of **1006 likely Oklahoma Republican primary voters** through an outside pollster and the results were **ASTONISHING**.
[Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3829310.3222.1.1d546fd8c7fb60c1353cd66d4d7e54a1) is already below 50% and [Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3829310.3223.1.3078c74e19917814c5ef2546b9142b56) is in position to take down the #1 RINO in America.
This should excite you that [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3829310.3224.1.6bbd65b4e60e983a317e261cff7a4fb8) is already trying to save himself.
In order to make history I need **YOUR** help:
1\. Like, Comment and Share on the Social Media posts that I put out so we can counter [Lankford’s](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3829310.3225.1.b33f0331a11519076084b2887af82b87) TV ads.
2\. name: Pro Life Update
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuukm1qubuorm2udhdhhc8eb67ihq727rv1b8qs0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhmcor0s1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8p9lcdq32phlcjij2plmm8qr1dhgsdqrec9ksdh7bdhnmtjbbchletgmdd5nmsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmeddjcup76phh6sqj0ptgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5kld4ra8c006vpq1vi9v5093oi7p8lhl3sdet40_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhmcor0s1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo61vs15m41qcj49gk0fj7fh82tau8elo22aai7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhmcor0s1h2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsn82ud0va2aue0v7slspj1v8grff26ga9va621g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhmcor0s1h2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj1r91p2uj3ig2b87of2hvj1fojip8vsah3g61o8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhmcor0s1h2bs)**
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zv9sotusvu6vhmoasfo7s7mnn4or7du4d22botpo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5fu40mgnv7nntrnm0puf0ipqtdnnq3d2ti7hljo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhmcor0s1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)
