name: Elaine Luria
subject: People have underestimated me before
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41706826/329987652/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWUzNTIxMS0wYzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTd7Ea0yfSG0MkzCSY87XsPjuSrAkS38We9GkJetm9E=)

| | Folks, Election analysts are in agreement – to keep our Democratic House majority intact, it is absolutely _essential_ that we keep VA-02 blue. If we lose my district, we lose the House. And, without a House majority, we’ll never be able to pass voting rights protections or enshrine _Roe v. Wade_ into law. [**Will you chip in a donation of $25 before my mid-quarter deadline hits to protect my seat AND our Democratic House majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41706830/329987658/-1921015758?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220212_FR_MM2Underestimate_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWUzNTIxMS0wYzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTd7Ea0yfSG0MkzCSY87XsPjuSrAkS38We9GkJetm9E=) | | | [Chip in »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41706840/329987662/1779053174?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220212_FR_MM2Underestimate_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWUzNTIxMS0wYzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTd7Ea0yfSG0MkzCSY87XsPjuSrAkS38We9GkJetm9E=)
---
Folks, some talking heads are doubtful as to whether or not I’ll be able to hold my seat. But I know better than to listen to the skeptics.
Many of my male peers thought I wouldn’t succeed when I joined the Naval Academy when I was just 17 – but I went on to be one of the first women ever accepted into the Navy’s nuclear program.
And in 2018, people didn’t think I’d be able to flip Republican Scott Taylor’s seat – but thanks to this grassroots team, we proved those who doubted us wrong.
Now I’m running as a Frontline Democrat in a toss-up seat, and folks are once again questioning my ability to win.
We have a chance to defy the odds again this November. But I need your support to win my toss-up race.
[**Will you chip in $25? I have a mid-quarter deadline in two days, and I need my numbers to show that this team has what it takes to keep my seat and the House blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41706846/329987673/1779053174?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220212_FR_MM2Underestimate_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWUzNTIxMS0wYzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTd7Ea0yfSG0MkzCSY87XsPjuSrAkS38We9GkJetm9E=)
| | [Chip in »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41706851/329987679/1779053174?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220212_FR_MM2Underestimate_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWUzNTIxMS0wYzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTd7Ea0yfSG0MkzCSY87XsPjuSrAkS38We9GkJetm9E=)
---
I’m counting on you,
Elaine

| | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41706854/329987684/-30985615?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWUzNTIxMS0wYzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTd7Ea0yfSG0MkzCSY87XsPjuSrAkS38We9GkJetm9E=&emci=6fb1a611-3f88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=81e35211-0c8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=7932963).

If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6fb1a611-3f88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/81e35211-0c8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWUzNTIxMS0wYzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTd7Ea0yfSG0MkzCSY87XsPjuSrAkS38We9GkJetm9E=&id=109317547).

| Peter,
Since starting Stop Stacey in January of 2021, we've...

* Launched digital ads attacking Abrams' radical agenda and blatant hypocrisy
* Mobilized thousands of grassroots conservatives to help defeat Abrams at the ballot box
* Raised hundreds of thousands of small dollar contributions from all over the United States

[But here's the question: What are you going to do?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f9gD0RuMd4MePy2lFluj3bb5tafYyXzCk88gIBJ_kvW7JmChds8FU2gBwzRi_dTuDDOsuYcBg_mY4T9Aj-AXVH2lAAX_zsYtaiWV5gF-NJk3p8UeDyCrdBFz-LyXiSt0-2Y9BTsBPB3Auu6GEGwfK3udzvuJhK3pYHlnXVflo1d4uWSeQ0-cFg==&c=PX-azukH97JE4HTW7xYvqpfp_Z6_Jq7dd691DXQ2vIbL7TI3e_jo0g==&ch=ajyi4F5U99Hhhxu4IwdPtK6xlkcpGInGgQE8atczz7ys3x4TIRHEaw==)
Stacey Abrams "flipped" Georgia for Joe Biden and handed the Senate to Chuck Schumer. Her campaign for Governor is setting fundraising records and the polling shows this race in a dead heat.
Conservatives are outraged by Abrams' efforts to move the MLB All-Star Game out of Georgia, force our kids to wear masks in schools (when she refuses to wear one), and advance the failed policies of the Biden Administration but here's the question again...

subject: Asking you to become a member, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Will you take a moment to read this today?
| | |
---
Peter,

**I'm running for Iowa's Senate seat against GOP Sen. Chuck Grassley – and if we flip this seat blue, Democrats will be practically guaranteed to maintain the Senate majority that supporters like you worked so hard to win in 2020.** Nobody will work harder than I will to make that happen, but I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why I need your help tonight.
Sen. Grassley has been in Washington for _seven terms_ – and right now he's never been more vulnerable: His approval ratings are lower than they've been in nearly four _decades,_ and 64% of likely voters don't want to reelect him! This is an unprecedented opportunity for Democrats, but Mitch McConnell's allies have a campaign war chest of more than $39 million to take back the Senate and keep vulnerable seats like this red.
**We can win, but only if we build up a powerful grassroots movement that can compete against a seven-term incumbent and Mitch McConnell.[That's why I'm asking 633 members of this team – including you, Peter – to become Senate Majority Defenders by making a contribution of $5 or more today. Will you donate now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41706919/329988054/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk674-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWUzNTIxMS0wYzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=93qYHcfkulNlX_m22RdxoBHaeHoTMM2-5qldaEzD5Ok=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41706920/329988055/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk674-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWUzNTIxMS0wYzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=93qYHcfkulNlX_m22RdxoBHaeHoTMM2-5qldaEzD5Ok=)
Elections _matter._ The makeup of Congress _matters_ – and with our Senate majority as thin as it can be, we cannot rest on our laurels and allow Mitch McConnell to keep Iowa red and retake control in Washington. There's just simply too much at stake for Iowa's working families.
But, Peter, Mitch McConnell's allies are already attacking me, and the entire GOP is gearing up for a massive, coordinated effort to take back the Senate. **Flipping this seat blue and expanding our Democratic Senate majority will take _all_ of us going _all in._ So I'm counting on you to make a contribution now to activate your Senate Majority Defender membership to help me win in Iowa:**
[**Rush a contribution of $5 or more right now to become a Senate Majority Defender and defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley in Iowa.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41706923/329988056/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk674-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWUzNTIxMS0wYzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=93qYHcfkulNlX_m22RdxoBHaeHoTMM2-5qldaEzD5Ok=)

name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zoe2d3jl03kns2pdqcql2cb77n8qg1qsflfoc1b0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhmaob3cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65stme5gb4s7362q76otmchj3apb4m2p37cdkcarj8sjkedoebcrlc9pr6ob469oefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup38phh62qr8dti6pj30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z19jtmlvp0rbmg359b9cambla7dtbpotprha3upg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhmaob3cph2bs) According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfuiatr64pdbq2h24joh102q7g25ufi6d09l0v30_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhmaob3cph2bs). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I 've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

Just look at all you get with this special: **It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit.** It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window. So you spare a **_ton_** and they're just getting warmed up, because... [**You also get $478 worth of FREE Gifts!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zumviugj33476v7gmod6tnbenm104g3q8pr0k190_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhmaob3cph2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on our website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... _(Hold on to your hat, folks)_ **FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe 's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zljisiuo0i9uk25d8lg5vrm61g8qn0jm84squ858_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm0o71chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shheppn0sjielr3ct5h6cpb4cb5cuo75d9n6uoradj3muq7dc5jelir5c9icsrjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3applmdg74s366pjjbc77m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7e7te2b3vhddi3vadrpeug6cfalgqaqa8fdolqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm0o71chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znora0fsgaj720c7rn2i2bur5km9njkdrcjhqqkg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm0o71chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z195b4h5bauffs57ksss9cmka1ce60vbijk4dqc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm0o71chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. subject: Know your rights before you lose them
body:

| | | |

| | | Hello,As a fellow conservative, you likely already well know and feel the pressure that is being put upon you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the far left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do.In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world to promise freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance; **our Constitution.** That's why I'm writing today. I'd like to offer you the chance to gain **[free access to Heritage's Guide to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles against those on the far left.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDQzLTE5MWU5ZDljMmQ4MjRlNWQ5M2ExZTNkOGY4NjQ1ZjczIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2NvbnN0aXR1dGlvbi8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmd1aWRlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GRk8wMjEyMDIyIn0/ZH8qSlETp67XmDpWZYk0tg)**[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDQzLTE5MWU5ZDljMmQ4MjRlNWQ5M2ExZTNkOGY4NjQ1ZjczIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2NvbnN0aXR1dGlvbi8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmd1aWRlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GRk8wMjEyMDIyIn0/Dm7JLDg0sow8KHdY_EVFvA) In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find:
* **Useful, clause-by-clause analysis** of the entire Constitution and each amendment
* Input from more than **100 constitutional scholars and legal experts** including President Reagan's former Attorney Ed Meese
* **A thorough review** of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today
* **A copy of the Constitution** and the documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation's history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives-they want government-controlled health care, higher taxes and redistribution of wealth in the form of socialism, increased regulations, to do away with the Electoral College, and for open borders.It is for this reason that we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, the freedoms promised to us in the Constitution.Because if we don't truly understand the freedoms that it promises to us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms.To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by clicking this link today?If so, please use this link to activate your access to the guide today: **[https://secured.heritage.org/constitution/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDQzLTE5MWU5ZDljMmQ4MjRlNWQ5M2ExZTNkOGY4NjQ1ZjczIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2NvbnN0aXR1dGlvbi8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmd1aWRlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GRk8wMjEyMDIyIn0/UdjLbqNP3rfNDNWRcKN1NQ)** This resource has been hailed across the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day.With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the far-Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers.[**I hope you'll claim your copy today.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDQzLTE5MWU5ZDljMmQ4MjRlNWQ5M2ExZTNkOGY4NjQ1ZjczIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2NvbnN0aXR1dGlvbi8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmd1aWRlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GRk8wMjEyMDIyIn0/oK_iCWqG4XZHeKF-V_YAvw) Thank you,Andrew P. McIndoeVP, Development, The Heritage Foundation
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDQzLTE5MWU5ZDljMmQ4MjRlNWQ5M2ExZTNkOGY4NjQ1ZjczIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2NvbnN0aXR1dGlvbi8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmd1aWRlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GRk8wMjEyMDIyIn0/XDv5XTmJr0io4moT38GGHQ)

Peter, at the beginning of 2021, COVID denialism ran free, faith in our democratic system was crumbling, and the U.S. Capitol was attacked by pro-Trump extremists.
**And in just 13 months, President Biden has made historic strides to heal our nation from the harm caused by the Trump administration.****** Now, a little over a year later, we wanted to take this opportunity to reflect on all that the Biden administration has accomplished so far.
Since taking office, President Biden and his administration:
* Oversaw the greatest year of job growth in American history and reduced the unemployment rate.
* Ensured that we had the resources to vaccinate 64% of all Americans.
* Passed a $1.9 trillion COVID relief package, which dispersed $1,400 stimulus checks to struggling citizens.
* Passed a $1.2 trillion infrastructure package that invests in our nation’s bridges, roads, and broadband internet.
* Recommitted the United States to taking decisive action to stop climate change ...** _ _****_and more!_**

**But despite all of President Biden’s progress, his approval rating continues to drop.**

When Attorney General James met with President Biden this month, she talked with him about defending the vulnerable and voiceless throughout the last year. But we need to understand where fearless fighters like you stand.

**We set a goal to hear from at least 1,000 top Democrats before we deliver the poll results to Attorney General James tomorrow morning, but we’re still 62 responses short. Peter, we haven’t heard from you yet, so please let us know: **
| | **Do you approve of President Biden?**
---

# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0c196oo4pd71qq3h25d0l4sdsbmpafqovftpck8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhm9p30clh2bs) According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zasmr685fmq173r44u4f8ep1lvkqutghd5k8h19g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhm9p30clh2bs). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I 've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

Just look at all you get with this special: **It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit.** It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window. So you spare a **_ton_** and they're just getting warmed up, because... [**You also get $478 worth of FREE Gifts!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z25pkhjvf1kn16bgtg5b2qmfrpkn2tcbknb96t3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhm9p30clh2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on our website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... _(Hold on to your hat, folks)_ **FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe 's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF Your Next Purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2c2cggi2vs7htbs60micapfd8d1kcash4k3i3j8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhm9p30clh2bs)** Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. [**So you 're getting huge savings today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu54d09vjhj1huc1tsmrs68la5bb0p9cfrlo27tg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhm9p30clh2bs) **You 'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan.** Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc77n75p9p0pmn6cerffmocj6vmljnlojml416k0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhm9p30clh2bs) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still **return triple your purchase amount.** That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5vossudrjctadt6q9f5h9c3oti3ho0fnoasf9a8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhm9p30clh2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [take action](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrm69mkb54oqpu89nk9419uog0gtvj4n9i3f9h28_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhm9p30clh2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [imagine how much better you'll feel right away](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq99ina4cp5jnfdgeobi77fd2ano5sm9qpuqbf20_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhm9p30clh2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it 's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. Frank Bates

FREE Bonus #1: because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you 2 of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. People love these kits. It's one of their top-rated items on our website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... (Hold on to your hat, folks) FREE Bonus #2: They're also going to give you their Victory Garden Seed Collection. Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years. FREE Bonus #3: You also get their Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater. With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. FREE Bonus #4: They're also going to give you their Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe 's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You also get $25 OFF Your Next Purchase. This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling. Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. You 'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan. Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. First, you get their no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still return triple your purchase amount. That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it 's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit in the mail and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmered. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our Food4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: John Gomez  - Campaign Manager
subject: Chabot for Congress - Update from the Campaign Trail 2/11
body:
Catch up on the latest from Steve Chabot on the campaign trail!
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-truhudz-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truhudz-kujkulhluu-r/)
# Update from the Campaign Trail 1/28/22
Good evening,It's been another busy few weeks on the campaign trail for Team Chabot. Our team has been spreading the word about Congressman Chabot and his re-election campaign. Congressman Chabot has been busy calling out human rights abuses in China, the inflation caused by the Biden Administration, and the international crises caused by the weakness in the White House. **_Steve on the Trail_** _" The IOC Should Be Embarrassed"_Congressman Chabot spoke to the Epoch Times this week about the Beijing Winter Olympics. Congressman Chabot slammed the International Olympic Committee for holding the Olympics in Beijing despite the massive numbers of human rights violations being perpetrated by the Chinese Communist Party._" The International Olympic Committee should be embarrassed in picking the PRC, China, in the first place when you consider their grotesque human rights abuses over the years, and then not moving it to a more appropriate location,"_ \- Congressman ChabotRead the full article and watch the Congressman's interview [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truhudz-kujkulhluu-y/)! _Bidenflation Hurts Us All_ Joe Biden's inflationary policies continue to have devastating effects on families across our district. Congressman Chabot has continued to call out the Biden Administration and it's enablers in Congress who have pushed the very policies who have caused the current crisis.This week we learned that inflation hit 7.5% in January, breaking a 40-year old record. To put this inflation into perspective, families are now paying an extra **$275 a month** for basic goods and services. Congressman Chabot has been a strong and consistent voice for sane fiscal policy. Congressman Chabot is fighting against the insane spending policies of Biden, Pelosi, and Schumer every day. _This Week 's Blog - "Dire Times"_Given today's news about American citizens being told to evacuate Ukraine within the next 24-48 hours, this week's blog post is especially relevant. _" The status of current global affairs looks pretty grim. Russia appears ready to invade its neighbor Ukraine, potentially bringing about the worst European military conflict since World War II. [...] As for the Russia/Ukraine flashpoint, Biden's irresponsible fingerprints are all over it."_Read the blog post [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truhudz-kujkulhluu-j/). We would be remiss if we didn't wish our Bengals good luck in Super Bowl 56 this Sunday. Here's hoping they bring Cincinnati and Ohio their first Super Bowl!WHO DEY!Have a great weekend!Yours truly,John GomezCampaign Manager - Chabot for Congress [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truhudz-kujkulhluu-t/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truhudz-kujkulhluu-i/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truhudz-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truhudz-kujkulhluu-h/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truhudz-kujkulhluu-k/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truhudz-kujkulhluu-u/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-truhudz-kujkulhluu-b/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-truhudz-kujkulhluu-n/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-truhudz-l-p) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. [Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-truhudz-961825B2-kujkulhluu-z) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-truhudz-kujkulhluu-v/)

Team – it seems that as we start to leave this pandemic behind us, we re-enter America’s epidemic of gun violence.
Just last year there were over 693 mass shootings in the United States. Enough is enough.
It’s time for Congress to take action, and pass legislation curbing the proliferation of guns across the country.
We want to hear from you though, friend. Do you agree that Congress should pass gun control legislation at once? Take our poll and let us know >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=email_021222_1]

clean_body: Peter, I am running for Congress to put a stop to the socialist policies being advanced by the corrupt Washington establishment and to end RINO.. | Peter, Are you ready to join the fight against the political establishment and spineless RINOS in Washington, DC? I am running for Congress to put a stop to the socialist policies being advanced by the corrupt Washington establishment and to end RINO Fred Upton's career once and for all... but I need all the help I can get! Working on a historic campaign can be a lot of fun! You get to meet like-minded America-First patriots who support draining the swamp in Washington while having a real impact on the political process. Destroying the radical left and spineless RINOs in Washington isn't going to be easy. My weak-kneed RINO opponent Fred Upton refuses to drop out of the race, despite the people of Michigan demanding strong, conservative leadership. I'm prepared for this fight. I have always stood by the people of Michigan, and I will do the same when elected to Congress. We are looking for every America-First patriot who is able to dedicate a couple of hours a week to advancing our grassroots campaign... I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail! Steve Carra Michigan Candidate for Congress Personal cell phone number: 269-267-4641 | | Steve Carra for Congress, PO Box 404, Three Rivers, MI 49093, United States

| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3he89-1xyyk-4qqlpo2/ "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")**

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustaining Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3he89-1xyyl-4qqlpo3/ "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away? ")**

---

We’re approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we’ve seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We’re already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3he89-1xyyo-4qqlpo6/ "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it’s too late>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3he89-1xyyp-4qqlpo7/ "Renew before it’s too late >>>")**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3he89-1xyyq-4qqlpo8/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3he89-1xyyr-4qqlpo9/ "Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?")**

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Change we can make today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
Friend, you can call me impatient -- I’ve never been willing to wait for change we can make today.
That’s why I’m running for Congress here in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. It’s a rare open seat and a huge opportunity to elect a progressive leader during the 2022 midterms.
I grew up here in Prince George’s County, and I paid my way through the University of Maryland by playing guitar at local churches -- and a lot of other jobs.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2021_lewis_welcome?amount=5&refcode2=body_img1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2021_lewis_welcome?amount=5&refcode2=body_img1]When the Great Recession hit, the state threatened to raise our tuition. Students like me couldn’t afford to wait.
So I organized over 600 students to march on campus.
When the university president invited me inside to negotiate, and we stopped the tuition hike, I learned the power of organizing to make change now. And I never stopped.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2021_lewis_welcome?amount=5&refcode2=body_img2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2021_lewis_welcome?amount=5&refcode2=body_img2]After graduating, I became a community organizer, tackling racial injustice in Maryland.
Like how big banks prey on low-income families, and public transportation leaves out so many Black neighborhoods.
I went to work for Congressman Steny Hoyer and saw that I could do even more from the inside.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2021_lewis_welcome?amount=5&refcode2=body_img3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2021_lewis_welcome?amount=5&refcode2=body_img3]So I ran for Delegate, and I won.
Some said I was too young, but change couldn’t wait.
Our community needs greater access to health care.
I’ve been there -- taking care of my dad when he got sick, sometimes we couldn’t even get a doctor’s appointment.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2021_lewis_welcome?amount=5&refcode2=body_img4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2021_lewis_welcome?amount=5&refcode2=body_img4]So I helped bring health care providers to low-income areas and the first cardiac care unit to Prince George’s County.
I also know what it’s like to live in a neighborhood with a liquor store on every block but almost no access to fresh groceries.
So I helped get funding to open The Good Foods Market and tax incentives for grocery stores in food deserts.
Even though I grew up with every opportunity my parents could give me -- I’m an Eagle Scout, I earned a college degree -- I knew I was always one incident away from my life possibly turning upside down.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2021_lewis_welcome?amount=5&refcode2=body_img5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2021_lewis_welcome?amount=5&refcode2=body_img5]So I helped write and pass landmark police reform and accountability, like banning military-grade weapons in our neighborhoods and requiring body cameras -- and requiring that they are actually turned on.
I passed criminal justice reform, like banning solitary confinement for juveniles and pregnant women.
We created second chances, like guaranteeing young offenders with a life sentence get a resentencing hearing after 20 years.
I’m running for Congress because we are in a moment as a nation where big change is possible right now.

Friend, I can’t get there alone. I don’t come from money -- my family fought their way into the middle class.
Our people-powered campaign must meet our grassroots funding benchmarks to organize and win this.
If you’re with me, can I count on you to chip in $5 so I can fight in Congress for the big change we need? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2021_lewis_welcome?amount=5&refcode2=body_link1]
My family has a stake in this.
If yours does, too, let’s not wait,
Jazz
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is a proven progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2021_lewis_welcome?amount=5&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
Friends of Jazz Lewis - Federal Account
P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2b35a5fb-2e4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/a1086c50-158c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTA4NmM1MC0xNThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tZ0MyHZ1QdC8vBwvk18vF-mp8XyNQ37iXdnXe5kPnZo=&id=129997837 .

name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zrfcbt0quch7rgctsb955mctj4a2dgro2qp23g9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm2p74s3h2bs)
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3uno9ncl7gcbumh9heau4tu6254ljc7m0er0b5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm2p74s3h2bs) According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zojirf4q42dqk2miiv0dig6s686cqdmenlpapp68_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm2p74s3h2bs). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I 've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zb6hjg4rftjhar444rqoh1h84rse0gagit04o1jo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm2p74s3h2bs) **Since they finally have these best-selling kits back in stock...** They're going to load you up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zg1ldh0g9k1gr0bc9jj55o7nou06boj3usi726so_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm2p74s3h2bs) when you get yours today. Just look at all you get with this special: **It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit.** It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window. So you spare a **_ton_** and they're just getting warmed up, because... That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on our website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... _(Hold on to your hat, folks)_ **FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe 's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF Your Next Purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2fbpogmthfc9mnelkia2adla4jetbpsfdb5vc80_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm2p74s3h2bs)** Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. [**So you 're getting huge savings today.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9ro5p9vnejsnj1lk9agon6nim5a48ve68n5089g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm2p74s3h2bs) **You 'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan.** Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2znivgqdhj1ak55nei70r3i9t52ch6hkulo2grrmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm2p74s3h2bs) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still **return triple your purchase amount.** That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjae8b13iarrn4k6affag7jgks60jn3tq4qc87q0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm2p74s3h2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [take action](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9lsrr1tltqh354vh9ucmr8udu8dvm2ivpop78uo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm2p74s3h2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [imagine how much better you'll feel right away](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zov9b7m9c935jhd0s6l8nvjmrlciuvbi905pt7e0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm2p74s3h2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it 's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zsasqgmcrfnv3ibn49hnn5sr4j9vf2tbvmcv7r28_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdjm2p74s3h2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit in the mail and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmered. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our Food4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
