Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. FREE Bonus #4: They're also going to give you their Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe 's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You also get $25 OFF Your Next Purchase. This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling. Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. You 'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan. Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. First, you get their no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still return triple your purchase amount. That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it 's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit in the mail and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmered. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our Food4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, . 1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: the importance of education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
The need to improve education drove me to public service, and I haven’t stopped fighting for our students.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41717367/330024898/2087247564?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220212-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRiMDk0ZC0xYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-BA-1mM33MiDbp9HwCsMC_5-cvW3_t6KpBjyfnUAzM=)
---
| Peter,

My first role in public office was on the Chapel Hill-Carrboro City School Board. I ran for this position because I knew that kids, especially Black and brown kids like my sons, needed another champion on the school board, someone who would always look out for them and their success.

The need to improve education drove me to public service, and I haven’t stopped fighting for our students. **In Congress, I will continue to champion policies that make our schools safer, more effective, and well funded.**
---
| [SUPPORT VALERIE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41717368/330024899/2087247564?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220212-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRiMDk0ZC0xYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-BA-1mM33MiDbp9HwCsMC_5-cvW3_t6KpBjyfnUAzM=)
---
I believe that increased investment in early education is key to ensuring that all children have the support they need to grow and thrive.**In Congress, I will work to guarantee free, quality universal pre-K to prepare every child for day one of kindergarten and beyond.**

But my commitment to improving education spans far beyond just the needs of young children.**Higher education is a pathway to greater opportunity, opening countless doors for our young people.** It did that for me when I attended the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.

Unfortunately, however, rising costs are a barrier to too many young people’s pursuit of higher education. That’s why **I’m in favor of canceling existing student debt** and expanding programs that keep loan payments affordable and income-based.

In Congress, I will advocate for financial assistance to states and students to ensure that all students can get a debt-free education at all public universities and colleges.

[_**Please, if you share my belief in the importance of education and making it more accessible and affordable, please chip into my campaign for Congress. Your support makes a significant difference! →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41717369/330024900/2087247564?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220212-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRiMDk0ZC0xYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-BA-1mM33MiDbp9HwCsMC_5-cvW3_t6KpBjyfnUAzM=)

We believe that voters can be trusted to decide important, impactful policy at the ballot box, and that they should have the unobstructed ability to do so. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41717622/330026885/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2FhNzFhYi0xYzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F8SvcvWoRkWzDtm8JtqzSc55X5qt4PDpvoGDfM_H38E=&emci=b2aebcdd-7e8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=dcaa71ab-1c8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) | Team — Our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign has been making a difference for Americans _across the country_ by working to protect access to ballot measures and make sure voters have a direct say in policies that affect their lives. Thanks, team. — Fairness Project = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 23 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project P.O. Box 21337 Washington, DC 20009 United States

Hey Peter,

You’re probably getting a lot of emails recently, and we know how annoying that is. February is half over, which means everyone is out asking for your help for mid-month fundraisers.

We're not gonna lie - that's what we're doing, too.

**What's important to know is that Tina Kotek is different from everyone else you're hearing from today.**

Over the last 15 years, she has shown her dedication to Oregon and proven that she will fight for the people of Oregon to create a better state for everyone. As Speaker, she did a lot, and we won't shy away from sharing that with you.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41717674/330028646/-2010496638?refcode=em22_220212_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTlhNDZkNi0xYzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYXtg5gq5P1CGuXqymYbEqrFdL7I13SxNSDZMF5mSD8=)

[CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41717676/330028648/-2010496638?refcode=em22_220212_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTlhNDZkNi0xYzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYXtg5gq5P1CGuXqymYbEqrFdL7I13SxNSDZMF5mSD8=)
You have a lot of choices for Governor this year, but Tina is different. Supporting her now means she has everything she needs in order to fight for all Oregonians.

With Tina, we'll get a Governor who puts people first, _always_. A Governor who fights for the vulnerable and marginalized communities. A Governor who will not be afraid of passing progressive legislation for the people. That is the type of Governor that Tina will be because that is the type of leader she already is.

Tina is a leader who is tough and determined. Under her leadership, our communities will **_thrive_**.

**[Your support now will make a big difference in the upcoming election. Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us reach our fundraising goals?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41717680/330028649/-2010496638?refcode=em22_220212_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTlhNDZkNi0xYzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYXtg5gq5P1CGuXqymYbEqrFdL7I13SxNSDZMF5mSD8=)**

– Team Tina

| | | Fellow Conservative, thank you for joining us in this battle to flip the House red. _For years you have consistently supported the Pro-American agenda, and we are extremely grateful. _

Unfortunately, we noticed something startling recently... It looks like your membership to the **Congressional Leadership Circle** has expired. Is this a mistake? After being a loyal patriot for so long, we’re surprised that you could let this happen.

Thankfully, we managed to secure you ONE LAST extension on the renewal period – But you will have to renew your membership by **MIDNIGHT TONIGHT**.
---
| | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3henx-1xz31-4qqlpo2/)
---
I repeat..this will be your FINAL CHANCE.

---
Now that 2022 is here, we need to buckle down and get to work. This is going to be the most important election we’ve seen in a long time, and we won’t be able to get it done without **YOU**.

The Democrats have raised millions this cycle, and are pulling ahead. We need your support to stop them. Please renew your membership before **11:59pm tonight** to show us that you’re still with us.
---
| | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3henx-1xz34-4qqlpo5/)

---

As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- **[ EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3henx-1xz36-4qqlpo7/ "EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>")**

The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy

name: Tom Perez
subject: Civil Rights is the unfinished business of America
body:
#

Team,

For too long, Maryland has waited to finish the work of the Civil Rights Movement, punching below our weight in matters of equal access to opportunity, economic empowerment, and racial justice for Black people.

**As Governor, I will not rest until good jobs and equitable justice are the everyday experience of Black people in Maryland, not the exception.**

**[Please click here to read my plan to address inequities in executive leadership, economic opportunity, education, criminal justice, health care, housing, transportation, and more.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41718458/330031324/-1142718630?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTMxZGI4My0xZDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysLhFeLN2ns9udskQ-spp5KPah_Mbw7E3xY3QtfGi6M=&emci=20619839-948b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8931db83-1d8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**
******[READ MY PLAN HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41718459/330031325/-1142718630?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTMxZGI4My0xZDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysLhFeLN2ns9udskQ-spp5KPah_Mbw7E3xY3QtfGi6M=&emci=20619839-948b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8931db83-1d8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)******
Team, at the Department of Justice, I fought for voting rights, took on hate groups, and prosecuted cases of police brutality. As Secretary of Labor, I fought for opportunities to provide high-quality jobs that pave the way for wealth generation and homeownership for Black Americans.

I've had the privilege of being invited into homes, churches, and places of business in our incredible communities across the state to hear how these issues and more are impacting the lives of our Black residents. **One thing is abundantly clear: We can’t wait any longer on critical issues of equity and advancement.**

As Governor, I will work hand in hand with the community to craft a detailed agenda built on a foundation of equity and racial justice that:
• **Ensures** all students across Maryland have access to pre-K and K-12 educational opportunities, regardless of zip code
•**Addresses** the impacts of the failed war on drugs by reinvesting cannabis tax revenue back into communities that have been systematically and disproportionately criminalized for marijuana
•**Increases** opportunities for Black business start-ups and small businesses and advance procurement reform to address income and wealth inequality
•**Promotes** and protects jobs and justice for Black Marylanders
**But I won’t stop there.** **[Please click here to read my plan to celebrate and uplift Black communities across Maryland under a Perez-Sneed Administration.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41718460/330031326/-1142718630?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTMxZGI4My0xZDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysLhFeLN2ns9udskQ-spp5KPah_Mbw7E3xY3QtfGi6M=&emci=20619839-948b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8931db83-1d8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**
******[READ MY PLAN HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41718461/330031327/-1142718630?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTMxZGI4My0xZDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysLhFeLN2ns9udskQ-spp5KPah_Mbw7E3xY3QtfGi6M=&emci=20619839-948b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8931db83-1d8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)******
Thank you,

Tom

P.S. We can shape our future into one that empowers and protects Black Marylanders and ensures that we all succeed – but I can only do it with your help. **[Can I count on you to chip in $3 to bring jobs and justice to all of Maryland?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41718462/330031355/-999108642?refcode=bpi-em-null-02112021-blackagenda-null-null&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTMxZGI4My0xZDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysLhFeLN2ns9udskQ-spp5KPah_Mbw7E3xY3QtfGi6M=)**
******[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41718463/330031383/-999108642?refcode=bpi-em-null-02112021-blackagendadb-null-null&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTMxZGI4My0xZDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysLhFeLN2ns9udskQ-spp5KPah_Mbw7E3xY3QtfGi6M=)******

Folks — throughout my term in office, Republicans have relentlessly tried to suppress the votes of hardworking Nevadans.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41718852/330033651/122893247?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODU1ZmI1OC0xZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7HRgOPhFmPrBNkMCoXKqOyF7LWjZHBwd4gH8JS-BVk=&emci=9d9cc90a-4b8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=1855fb58-1e8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=19650583) Folks — throughout my term in office, Republicans have relentlessly tried to suppress the votes of hardworking Nevadans. **And ever since Donald Trump lost Nevada and the presidential election in 2020, the GOP has doubled down on these efforts.** Using the Big Lie and election conspiracy theories as a twisted justification for their attacks on one of our most fundamental rights, the far-right wants to disenfranchise thousands of Nevada voters before the November elections. **But here’s the deal:** _**I’m not going to let that happen on my watch.**_ [**Folks, **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41718853/330033652/-1382373466?refcode=email_021222_protectvotingrights&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODU1ZmI1OC0xZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7HRgOPhFmPrBNkMCoXKqOyF7LWjZHBwd4gH8JS-BVk=)**[I’m going to be honest with you. As governor, I took an oath to protect the rights of all Nevadans. As long as I am governor, I will protect our voting rights with everything at my disposal.
Donald Trump and his far-right allies in Nevada can throw everything they have to try and get their way: **I’ll keep facing them down.**
**That’s why I need your help today, folks. With voting rights and all of the progress we've made at stake****, I must have the resources to take on the MAGA lies and these right-wing attempts to undermine our democracy.**
**[Will you take a moment to donate to my campaign and let me know you’re standing with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41718861/330033660/-1561074788?refcode=email_021222_protectvotingrights&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODU1ZmI1OC0xZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7HRgOPhFmPrBNkMCoXKqOyF7LWjZHBwd4gH8JS-BVk=)**
Remember, folks, for as long as I have the honor of serving as your governor, I will continue fighting to protect every eligible Nevadan's right to vote. No ifs or buts.
Thank you for standing with me.
Steve Sisolak
Governor of Nevada

name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zli48jv7rt5t7ui3dkpq13mt0scaeu9l1p3k4b60_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onhepgmco9getg7fcrn66o61cj261j61cjj6cr33dbgelg64or0e3in4dr36hr6fduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb76mpmfcjgcpobeddksuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66ob1cdhm1p31cjh2bs)

# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjs1glei6rs2gtta9h4ngr58ubb3v7mpleof31bg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhm1p31cjh2bs) According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmk484i5evv9ma3pvn2r6dbr943dmpnro1o8ulqg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdhm1p31cjh2bs). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I 've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# Last Time, Their Best-Selling 3-Month Kits _Sold Out_ Completely In Just 4 Days... Today They Have Them Back In Stock!

subject: Elect leaders who will protect public education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41719334/330036194/368400405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2E4NGMyZC0yMDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GNV-vzOlr2pvxaeqSB_NC7d3_UeSmQ1KR6RTH-TBTr4=&emci=8b5cf6c0-598b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=53a84c2d-208c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14943357) Peter, Education is experiencing a crisis right now. In districts throughout Missouri, and throughout our country, public schools are the subject of attacks from Republican politicians at a scale never seen before. Even before the pandemic, Missouri’s schools were appallingly underfunded; and our kids and their teachers have been paying the price. Making the situation much worse, schools are now saddled with ridiculous legal fees as they defend against politically motivated and frivolous lawsuits about mask mandates launched by Missouri Attorney General Eric Schmitt. These partisan attacks on education, not just in Missouri but across the country, are truly reprehensible. And the politicians coordinating these attacks have a simple agenda: _**undermine public education and prop up private schools with taxpayer money.**_ It’s what their donors have always wanted. **Now more than ever, it is plain how politicians, elected officials at every level of government, and policymakers make an extraordinary impact—both positive and, far too often, negative—on our children’s education, and ultimately their future.** _Visiting with educators at the Parkway School District's Food Pantry in December 2021._ I believe that the key to the American Dream is quality public education—and I will never stop fighting for this, and against bad faith attacks on our teachers and students. **The stakes are the highest they can be: the very future of our children.** I hope you will have my back as we stand tall together for our kids and their educators. In Solidarity, _**P.S.** This campaign is not bankrolled by billionaires or special interest groups with their own agendas. We are entirely grassroots funded, and we need your support to win. name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Unmasking our kids is the right decision for our state and it’s long overdue.
body:
Read more of what Geoff Diehl has to say about today's announcement.
| | | |
---
| STATEMENT OF GEOFF DIEHL REGARDING ENDING THE STATEWIDE SCHOOL MASK MANDATE

"At long last, Massachusetts has joined the ranks of many other states and acknowledged that there is no need to continue masking kids in school. I've been saying this for a long time, and I know so many parents who have been with me on this for a long time. I would prefer that the mandate end immediately, but at least there is now light at the end of the tunnel. Unmasking our kids is the right decision for our state and it's long overdue. I hope communities across Massachusetts will reach the same decision and lift any remaining local mandates.
"Today's announcement represents an enormous victory for parents and for everyone else who had the courage to speak up against these mandates. I've met so many parents across our state who have fought hard against masking policies. Many of these parents aren't political, but they had the guts to take a stand for their kids and to speak out at school board meetings for what is right. I applaud all of these parents for their courage and for their hard work.
"Today, we won. But, we need to keep our guard up and make sure there is not a return to masking policies again in the fall. A recent study by Johns Hopkins has shown nonpharmaceutical interventions do not provide significant protection from the pandemic. What's more, I am deeply concerned about the effects masking had on students' health, emotional well-being, and educational progress. I do not want to see our state ever return to a point where we mask our kids again."
\- Geoff Diehl, Republican Candidate for Governor

name: Team Bass
subject: In case you missed it

body:
We have a quick weekend update for you, team!

Endorsements for Karen keep on pouring in, with SEIU United Healthcare Workers, the United Steelworkers Local 675, and SEIU Local 2015 officially backing Karen's campaign for Los Angeles mayor. These labor organizations are joining our growing list of local, state, and federal leaders who are supporting Karen's campaign — not to mention the countless Angelenos who are ready to elect Karen.

_But wait – there's more!_

**This week, Karen officially filed to run for mayor of Los Angeles. The next big step ahead of us is to collect signatures in order to get our campaign on the ballot.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41719806/330038639/-1030957994?ms=em22_220212_endors_enask_gq_act_ru_tb_ettx&refcode=em22_220212_endors_enask_gq_act_ru_tb_ettx&source=em22_220212_endors_enask_gq_act_ru_tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220212_endors_enask_gq_act_ru_tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=iqz3RXBYjgYJx2LOWRcjpLT9ckT4ep3s3PYXR4rLKGwfmIrTXOSqx0lZGZlvKXJCf0Ur77gwICjqMv6h4gHadPEGjYpjrd%2Fk9W5qeERyRVDwmRcNY2uRcBeQdGu1FSGEz6uTjXqSp57BMYPc1zIXAA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2MxZmRkNC0yMjhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rjk09pZfBCwbVZqk8vqo_-jtwLc8lgzB9eEgJ24jqwA=&emci=62a8ba90-888b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e3c1fdd4-228c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)
---
It's clear this race is heating up, but we can't take a single second for granted. We're thankful for the folks who are proudly supporting Karen and for YOU, team, as we prepare for a tough race.

**Karen's no stranger to beating the odds. Together, we will make history and elect her as mayor.**

Forward,

Team Bass

These labor organizations are joining our growing list of local, state, and federal leaders who are supporting Karen's campaign — not to mention the countless Angelenos who are ready to elect Karen. But wait – there's more! This week, Karen officially filed to run for mayor of Los Angeles. The next big step ahead of us is to collect signatures in order to get our campaign on the ballot. It's clear this race is heating up, but we can't take a single second for granted. We're thankful for the folks who are proudly supporting Karen and for YOU, team, as we prepare for a tough race. Karen's no stranger to beating the odds. Together, we will make history and elect her as mayor. Forward, Team Bass Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328) Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 777 S Figueroa St STE 4050 Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States Additional information is available at . | | ---|---|--- We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please .

According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages.
Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".
**As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.**
If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis.
It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food.
Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore.
Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores.
That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147148&L=79532&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazM0LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQwMiZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMjEyLXMxNzljMTM4VC1CdW5kbGUxJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1GNFAtMTcxOC0yMDIyMDIxMi1zMTc5YzEzOFQtQnVuZGxlMQ==).
Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147148&L=79532&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazM0LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQwMiZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMjEyLXMxNzljMTM4VC1CdW5kbGUxJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1GNFAtMTcxOC0yMDIyMDIxMi1zMTc5YzEzOFQtQnVuZGxlMQ==)**
You need to get 'er done today.
Why?
Because if you don't [take action](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147148&L=79532&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazM0LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQwMiZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMjEyLXMxNzljMTM4VC1CdW5kbGUxJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1GNFAtMTcxOC0yMDIyMDIxMi1zMTc5YzEzOFQtQnVuZGxlMQ==) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless.
But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [imagine how much better you'll feel right away](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147148&L=79532&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazM0LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQwMiZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMjEyLXMxNzljMTM4VC1CdW5kbGUxJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1GNFAtMTcxOC0yMDIyMDIxMi1zMTc5YzEzOFQtQnVuZGxlMQ==). Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit.
**As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do.
**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147148&L=79532&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazM0LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQwMiZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMjEyLXMxNzljMTM4VC1CdW5kbGUxJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1GNFAtMTcxOC0yMDIyMDIxMi1zMTc5YzEzOFQtQnVuZGxlMQ==)**
To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit in the mail and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmered. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It’s a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our Food4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---

clean_body: As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. | | | | == = | | | #1 Item to Hoard In 2022 = According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished... Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling ==. Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a fraction of what some other brands charge. There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a shelf life of up to 25 years , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too. You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they taste as good or better than any other survival food I've ever had. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out. Last Time, Their Best-Selling 3-Month Kits Sold Out Completely In Just 4 Days... Today They Have Them Back In Stock! == Since they finally have these best-selling kits back in stock... They're going to load you up with == when you get yours today. Just look at all you get with this special: It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. So you spare a ton and they're just getting warmed up, because... == FREE Bonus #1: because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you 2 of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. People love these kits. It's one of their top-rated items on our website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... (Hold on to your hat, folks) FREE Bonus #2: They're also going to give you their Victory Garden Seed Collection. Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years. FREE Bonus #3: You also get their Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater. With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. FREE Bonus #4: They're also going to give you their Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You also get $25 OFF Your Next Purchase. This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling. Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. == Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. == You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan. Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still return triple your purchase amount. name: Derek Marshall
subject: Medicare for All is not a pipe dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,

We received some difficult news recently here in California: the bill in the state legislature that would create a universal, single-payer healthcare system across the state, has failed. AB1400 was the result of a huge coalition of medical workers, activists, and community members and while this loss is hard, **the fact that we even got universal healthcare on the agenda is a huge win. **
I’m here to remind you that universal, national healthcare coverage–like AB1400 or Medicare for All–is not a pipe dream. **We’re closer to achieving this lifesaving model than ever, but it’s going to take more guts, determination, and hard work to get there.** There’s a reason why I’m running for Congress, and it has to do with my deep belief that progressive social and economic policies will lead us into the resilient future we need.
**[It’s time for California’s 23rd district to get the representation we deserve in Congress, and see lasting change from the bold policies I’m championing. Not everyone has the courage to stand up for what’s right, but I don’t back down from a fight just because it’s hard. Will you show you’re with me and chip in to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41720113/330040701/-431919476?refcode=2-11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDMzZGYzMy0yNThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=asQWAiG_4k3a5dYJc3WGzQSu2GuQ9GRrb1IaZ8gErLM=)**

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41720115/330040702/-431919476?refcode=2-11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDMzZGYzMy0yNThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=asQWAiG_4k3a5dYJc3WGzQSu2GuQ9GRrb1IaZ8gErLM=)**

Whether it’s at the local, state, or federal level, it’s going to take millions of us raising our voices to get major legislation like Medicare for All passed, but it will be worth it. What we can’t do is give up, or get complacent. **What we must do is remember that 55% of all Americans–the majority–support Medicare for All.**
The main reason we don’t have Medicare for All today is because of the intransigence of the Republican Party. The majority of Democrats support it, but the majority of Republicans don’t. **But here’s the thing: Medicare for All will help Republicans of all stripes too. **
Just a few decades ago, the Republican Party, from lawmakers to the base, used to widely support single-payer healthcare. So why the dramatic swing in policy since then? **The only clear, documented reason why the Republicans turned away from the policy is because Democrats themselves began to support it in higher numbers. **
**[Medicare for All would save hundreds of thousands of lives, and increase quality of life for millions of people. We need leaders who will remind the Republican Party that they serve their constituents, not donors like Big Pharma, and prove once and for all that the people support national healthcare. But I need your help to get to Congress so I can lead. Will you support my campaign with a contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41720116/330040703/-431919476?refcode=2-11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDMzZGYzMy0yNThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=asQWAiG_4k3a5dYJc3WGzQSu2GuQ9GRrb1IaZ8gErLM=)**

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23
* * *

clean_body: Peter, We received some difficult news recently here in California: the bill in the state legislature that would create a universal, single-payer healthcare system across the state, has failed. AB1400 was the result of a huge coalition of medical workers, activists, and community members and while this loss is hard, the fact that we even got universal healthcare on the agenda is a huge win. I’m here to remind you that universal, national healthcare coverage–like AB1400 or Medicare for All–is not a pipe dream. We’re closer to achieving this lifesaving model than ever, but it’s going to take more guts, determination, and hard work to get there. There’s a reason why I’m running for Congress, and it has to do with my deep belief that progressive social and economic policies will lead us into the resilient future we need. = = Whether it’s at the local, state, or federal level, it’s going to take millions of us raising our voices to get major legislation like Medicare for All passed, but it will be worth it. What we can’t do is give up, or get complacent. What we must do is remember that 55% of all Americans–the majority–support Medicare for All. The main reason we don’t have Medicare for All today is because of the intransigence of the Republican Party. The majority of Democrats support it, but the majority of Republicans don’t. But here’s the thing: Medicare for All will help Republicans of all stripes too. Just a few decades ago, the Republican Party, from lawmakers to the base, used to widely support single-payer healthcare. So why the dramatic swing in policy since then? The only clear, documented reason why the Republicans turned away from the policy is because Democrats themselves began to support it in higher numbers. = In solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23 * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: National Journal: Pennsylvania Senate seat most likely to flip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Pennsylvania’s open senate seat is Democrats’ best opportunity to hold the line in the Senate
#

Friend,
One of the country’s leading elections forecasters, _National Journal_ , just released their first Senate rankings of 2022 — and Pennsylvania is at the top of their list of seats most likely to flip.
**_“Given the fundamentals of the state, and the uncertainty of the GOP primary, Pennsylvania is a bit harder than others for Republicans to hold.”_**

National Journal, 2/9/22
This confirms what we’ve been saying all along. Pennsylvania’s open Senate seat is Democrats’ best opportunity to hold the line in the Senate.
**[Can you rush a $3 to Malcolm’s campaign for Senate today? We need a lot of folks to chip in today to keep our momentum going this month.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41721286/330045890/-358086307?refcode2=44e2711f-278c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220212-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGUyNzExZi0yNzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iSuY0t80j_-qzbGbZI5NhDV3N2NhwDtfhYCg8r_pTzc=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41721287/330045891/-358086307?refcode2=44e2711f-278c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220212-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGUyNzExZi0yNzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iSuY0t80j_-qzbGbZI5NhDV3N2NhwDtfhYCg8r_pTzc=)**
Malcolm is the best candidate in this race to reassemble and energize the same coalition that won Pennsylvania for President Biden in 2020.
And he’s been doing that by traveling all across the commonwealth to hear directly from working people about the issues affecting them.
But building our coalition across all of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties will take an enormous amount of resources.
So Malcolm is counting on you to help fund our grassroots outreach program across Pennsylvania. That’s why we have to ask:

Team Malcolm

I told him I'd be the one to ask this time.

|
---

| | I know it’s usually my husband Tony asking you for money.

But today, I told Tony I’d be the one to ask, and explain what this campaign means to us. [**_So, yes -- I’m about to ask for $10 before midnight. Let me explain why. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41721573/330047177/1129282168?refcode=20220212_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJhODZhZi0yODhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNpWJlRR8VCIFn26nRMedGiA3Rdfjmu8F5PyIFdLZw8=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41721574/330047178/1129282168?refcode=20220212_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJhODZhZi0yODhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNpWJlRR8VCIFn26nRMedGiA3Rdfjmu8F5PyIFdLZw8=) I know Tony can flip this seat for Democrats:

**[One of the things I admire most about Tony is that when he believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41721575/330047179/1129282168?refcode=20220212_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJhODZhZi0yODhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNpWJlRR8VCIFn26nRMedGiA3Rdfjmu8F5PyIFdLZw8=)**

When he ran for the state Legislature, Tony fought for his principles against all odds.

When local businesses were struggling due to the pandemic, Tony secured relief funding.

When Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19, Tony demanded safer working conditions for essential workers like my father-in-law.

And when Republican Congressman Don Bacon favored tax cuts for billionaires and voted against COVID relief:

[**Tony stepped up to unseat him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41721576/330047180/1129282168?refcode=20220212_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJhODZhZi0yODhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNpWJlRR8VCIFn26nRMedGiA3Rdfjmu8F5PyIFdLZw8=) [**_Everyday folks deserve a fighting chance, but my husband’s opponent doesn’t have the interests of our community at heart. Tony is determined to win this race, but it won’t be easy -- or cheap. Don Bacon is already over $500,000 ahead. That’s why Tony needs to raise another $11,003 before midnight, and why I said I’d ask you today on his behalf. Will you chip in $10 to help him close this gap? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41721577/330047182/1129282168?refcode=20220212_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJhODZhZi0yODhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNpWJlRR8VCIFn26nRMedGiA3Rdfjmu8F5PyIFdLZw8=) Now you know a bit about Tony’s amazing track record.

But I want to be clear: running for Congress isn’t just about politics for him.

It’s personal.

It’s rooted in his experience growing up in poverty and fighting to defy the odds.

It’s rooted in the lessons he learned as a public school teacher, working with kids like him.

And it’s rooted in his desire to leave the world a better place for our kids, Ava and Luca.

[**I know you work hard for your money, and I wish I didn’t have to ask.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41721579/330047183/1129282168?refcode=20220212_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJhODZhZi0yODhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNpWJlRR8VCIFn26nRMedGiA3Rdfjmu8F5PyIFdLZw8=)

But if Tony misses his $11,003 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign.

And it will be that much harder for him to flip this important seat for Democrats. [**_So I’m asking one last time: If you believe in Tony like I do, will you chip in $10 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41721580/330047185/1129282168?refcode=20220212_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJhODZhZi0yODhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNpWJlRR8VCIFn26nRMedGiA3Rdfjmu8F5PyIFdLZw8=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41721581/330047186/1129282168?refcode=20220212_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJhODZhZi0yODhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNpWJlRR8VCIFn26nRMedGiA3Rdfjmu8F5PyIFdLZw8=)

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Friends — What does that amount of money mean to you? Now let us ask: If you knew contributing $5 would mean Mark Kelly would get re-elected to the Senate this year, wouldn’t it be worth it? How about if you knew that same $5 would keep Mitch McConnell from becoming Majority Leader again? Wouldn’t you give that $5 immediately? What if you knew that $5 would re-elect a man fighting for voting rights, action on climate, lowering drug prices and more? Wouldn’t it be the best $5 you could spend? Now, we know $5 doesn’t seem like it can do all that. But when everyone is chipping in, it can. Cause by the time you reach this point in the email, someone has already chipped in their $5. And in order for this to work, they need you to do the same. And that’s why we’re asking: [**Can you please make a $5 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign -- split with Seth Moulton -- before our fundraising deadline comes to an end in just a few days?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41721653/330047453/1927938479?refcode=20220211_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzZkZTExYy0yOThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdgC0TwzRKtdUnHl3BGRArI9l0DmnKkzRwGQWBzeugI=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41721654/330047454/-1534947712?refcode=20220211_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzZkZTExYy0yOThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdgC0TwzRKtdUnHl3BGRArI9l0DmnKkzRwGQWBzeugI=)

body:
He told viewers, “we need people to ..."

|

| February 12, 2022
Statement by Brett Guillory for Congress
Recently, a video of me discussing the minimum wage at a Tea Party Patriots event has come into question. The video is being used by the establishment to attack our grassroots movement. This will not be the last attack.
I refuse to allow the establishment to control the narrative, so I will respond with my official position.
I believe the pay gap between executive compensation and worker compensation is extreme, coming in at 350x in 2020 and rising.
I do not believe in federal mandates raising the minimum wage as it would hurt small business, however, I believe there may be ways to incentivize large corporations to pass more of the money down to the backbone of the mega corporation: THE AMERICAN WORKER.
Wouldn't that be a good thing? To incentivize a global mega corporation to reduce their executive pay gap from say 350X to even 300X?
These attacks are baseless and misguided, but expected, as We the People rise to take back our government.
I stand with the American Worker and Small Business Owner.
Every. Single. Time.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | | | | February 12, 2022 Statement by Brett Guillory for Congress Recently, a video of me discussing the minimum wage at a Tea Party Patriots event has come into question. The video is being used by the establishment to attack our grassroots movement. This will not be the last attack. I refuse to allow the establishment to control the narrative, so I will respond with my official position. I believe the pay gap between executive compensation and worker compensation is extreme, coming in at 350x in 2020 and rising. I do not believe in federal mandates raising the minimum wage as it would hurt small business, however, I believe there may be ways to incentivize large corporations to pass more of the money down to the backbone of the mega corporation: THE AMERICAN WORKER. Wouldn't that be a good thing? To incentivize a global mega corporation to reduce their executive pay gap from say 350X to even 300X? These attacks are baseless and misguided, but expected, as We the People rise to take back our government. I stand with the American Worker and Small Business Owner. Every. Single. Time. | | == | mailto:info@BrettGuilloryforCongress.com | == == == | | | Paid for by Brett Guillory for Texas. | | | | | | | | Brett Guillory for Texas | 13121 Louetta Rd., Box 1465, Cypress, TX 77429 | | Sent by mailto:info@brettguilloryforcongress.com

name: M. Lopez
subject: from the Lopez family to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
Friend, did you see my mom's message?
---
I'm so grateful for everything she's done for our family: moving to an entirely new country so that my siblings and I could have a better future, supporting our family as a businesswoman, and now, stepping in to help power this campaign for a stronger, more inclusive Arizona.
I'm grateful for you, too – for all you've done to take this campaign further than we ever dreamed. But the harder we work, the higher the stakes rise – and with the election year officially here, we can't afford a single misstep.
That's why I'm reaching out to _you_ , friend – you're a top supporter, and we need you now more than ever. **Arizona's future is hanging in the balance – and if you decide to sit on the sidelines, Donald Trump and my extremist opponent, Kari Lake (R), will happily take over.**
**We need to raise another $4,523 by midnight tonight to keep our fundraising on track and win this race. So I need to ask:[Will you chip in whatever you can to close our fundraising gap, defeat GOP extremists and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41722879/330052269/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk455-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDhiMzU0OS0yZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5-z-c6bwtMU_J3IGJOI4jklb18WGbmrSCnembE3gCA=)**
Thanks – on behalf of the entire Lopez family.
Marco Lopez
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Esther Lopez (Marco’s Mom)**
Date: Fri, Feb 11, 2022
Subject: Look at how far my son has come
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41722880/330052270/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk455-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDhiMzU0OS0yZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5-z-c6bwtMU_J3IGJOI4jklb18WGbmrSCnembE3gCA=)
---
Friend – **I am so excited to be reaching out to you on behalf of my son, Marco Lopez, who's running to lead Arizona into a brighter future. [If you can, will you chip in $5 or more to help Marco go from the friendly neighborhood _vaquero_ you see in the photo below to the next governor of Arizona?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41722881/330052271/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk455-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDhiMzU0OS0yZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5-z-c6bwtMU_J3IGJOI4jklb18WGbmrSCnembE3gCA=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41722882/330052272/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk455-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDhiMzU0OS0yZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5-z-c6bwtMU_J3IGJOI4jklb18WGbmrSCnembE3gCA=)
| | [DONATE NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41722883/330052273/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk455-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDhiMzU0OS0yZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5-z-c6bwtMU_J3IGJOI4jklb18WGbmrSCnembE3gCA=)
---
Fifty years ago, when Marco's dad and I made the decision to move our family from Mexico to Arizona, we came here for the promise of greater opportunity – what Marco calls the promise of Arizona. But I never could have imagined where that promise would take him.
**From becoming the mayor of our hometown of Nogales, Arizona, to serving in the Obama administration, Marco has always been a champion for the people of this state. And today, he's following in my footsteps – running his own small business and creating jobs and opportunities in his community. **

As a mother, I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. Marco is dedicated to fighting for real families and their real concerns – not playing politics or spouting conspiracies. And now that we're officially in his election year, we're closer than ever to turning his vision into a reality.
**But we'll have to fight to elect Marco and defeat the GOP extremism sweeping our state. Marco is running against a Trump-backed Republican who has threatened many of our fundamental rights, from voting rights to reproductive health care. Simply put, she's the exact _opposite_ of my son.**

That's why I need your help today. Even though Marco fights day after day to make Arizona's promise a reality for everyone, he has many more fights ahead of him. And while our family has plenty of love and support to go around, he's counting on grassroots folks like you to help power this campaign to victory.

**Last time he called, he mentioned he was falling a few thousand dollars short of his next big goal, and I don't want to let him down – especially now that we're only _months_ from the first votes being cast. So I have to humbly ask: [Friend, will you please give $5 or more today so we can elect Marco as our next governor and build a state that works for all people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41722884/330052274/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk455-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDhiMzU0OS0yZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5-z-c6bwtMU_J3IGJOI4jklb18WGbmrSCnembE3gCA=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41722885/330052275/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk455-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDhiMzU0OS0yZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5-z-c6bwtMU_J3IGJOI4jklb18WGbmrSCnembE3gCA=)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41722886/330052276/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk455-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDhiMzU0OS0yZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5-z-c6bwtMU_J3IGJOI4jklb18WGbmrSCnembE3gCA=)
---

clean_body: Friend, did you see my mom's message? I'm so grateful for everything she's done for our family: moving to an entirely new country so that my siblings and I could have a better future, supporting our family as a businesswoman, and now, stepping in to help power this campaign for a stronger, more inclusive Arizona. I'm grateful for you, too – for all you've done to take this campaign further than we ever dreamed. But the harder we work, the higher the stakes rise – and with the election year officially here, we can't afford a single misstep. That's why I'm reaching out to you , friend – you're a top supporter, and we need you now more than ever. Arizona's future is hanging in the balance – and if you decide to sit on the sidelines, Donald Trump and my extremist opponent, Kari Lake (R), will happily take over. We need to raise another $4,523 by midnight tonight to keep our fundraising on track and win this race. So I need to ask:= Thanks – on behalf of the entire Lopez family. And today, he's following in my footsteps – running his own small business and creating jobs and opportunities in his community. As a mother, I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. Marco is dedicated to fighting for real families and their real concerns – not playing politics or spouting conspiracies. And now that we're officially in his election year, we're closer than ever to turning his vision into a reality. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41723024/330053075/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQyODRmOS0yZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HVygBU7bmleNaqZ3Qbaj2EW9edP12zm55DBRbDazd7Y=)

| | Hi, I’m Cody Lee – Susie’s son. You may know my mom as the Congresswoman who emails you sometimes but, to me, she’s a lot more than that. My mom is the person that I can always count on to be there for me. On not so great days, it feels like she always knows exactly what to say or do to make me feel better. And she’s definitely a great listener. Growing up, she taught my sister and me to treat other people the way we want to be treated. Leading with kindness and respect is a commitment my mom made to us and to all others. In fact, I believe it’s one of the reasons why my mom ran for office in the first place! The priorities that she fights for every day – equal rights, education, health care, and more – are the same values that she’d want her own representative to stand up for. _She leads with her heart and I really admire that._ I’ve seen just how hard my mom works in Congress to serve the people who elected her. But her re-election this year is going to be tough, and I’m doing everything I can to make sure she wins. Can you help out, too?
