name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Friend, could I get your input on a few things?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=nCr3QisciWItwR3oEnue4M%2F%2B7ieOtl%2BF&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
This is important: We're in the thick of an election year, and a new Republican opponent just entered the race to flip my seat.
With the entire GOP establishment beholden to the disgraced and dangerous former president, Donald Trump, we can't afford to hand Senate control back to the GOP - **but with the Senate split 50-50, we have zero margin for error.**
**That 's why my campaign is scaling up its operations to keep this seat. And I'm asking you to share your feedback right away - because I can only win this race with direct input from people like you.**
[**So please: Will you take a few moments to let me know what issues matter most to you? It only takes a few moments, and your input is essential to keeping me current on your priorities so I can do my best to fight for them and for you.**](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-feb-2022??email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1140-su-nd)
I know I speak frequently about Senate control and what's at stake, but it's because I've seen the harm and obstruction of a Mitch McConnell-led GOP majority up close and personal. Their focus is not on you. Their eyes are on the halls of power and efforts to do political damage to President Biden. My eyes are on you.
People's lives and livelihoods are at stake. Our fundamental civil rights are at stake. Our planet is at stake. I am here to serve you and make sure your voices are heard.
The Republican Party is united around defending Donald Trump, amplifying his lies, and obstructing efforts to investigate his potential criminal wrongdoing. Meanwhile, I'm focused on improving the lives of everyday Americans, protecting our democracy from dangerous attacks, and supporting accountability about Donald Trump's administration - even, and perhaps especially, when the wrongdoing goes all the way to the top.
**My willingness to stand up against Donald Trump and the extremism that has taken over the Republican Party has made me a target of the national GOP. I know I can only keep this seat if I have the best possible campaign strategy - powered by people like you. **
[**So please, before my team 's next strategy meeting on Tuesday morning, will you partake in our official campaign survey? I'd love 1,200 more members of this team to submit their feedback tonight.**](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-feb-2022??email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1140-su-nd)
With gratitude,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2BzzdC6sLnRgLPrCGiUCWPs%2F%2B7ieOtl%2BF&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: We need Val Demings in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Just over eleven years ago my life turned upside down.
| | |
---
Friend,
Eleven years ago, during a normal Saturday morning in Tucson, Arizona, my life turned upside down. I was shot in the head. Six of my constituents were killed, and 13 more were injured. In the immediate aftermath, I experienced the darkest days of my life. I had to relearn to walk, speak, read and write.

I was devastated. My family was devastated. My _community_ was devastated. But we were not broken. We got to work.

Even in my recovery, I never stepped away from my life's purpose: working to make my community and country better. **It's why I've now dedicated myself to lifesaving work to end gun violence.**
When I think about everything I've overcome—and the progress we've already made, the lives we've saved through our work at Giffords PAC – I know it's only possible because we're in this _together._ Taking on the gun lobby, passing commonsense legislation, ending our gun violence crisis—none of it is something any one of us can do alone.

It's why we need champions for gun safety throughout our communities and across every level of government, particularly in the Senate, where so many lifesaving pieces of legislation have stalled. **So today, I am reaching out to you personally about my friend Val Demings, who's running to be Florida's next senator and expand our gun safety majority in the Senate.**
Congresswoman Demings passed gun safety legislation through the House even when the challenges seemed insurmountable, and she's the gun safety champion we need in the Senate.** ** Marco Rubio is not. But Florida's last Senate race was decided by a little over 10,000 votes and the GOP is going all in on attack ads and spending millions in other investments to defeat Val Demings, which means she needs you and me to have her back to win.

**So today, I'm helping Val Demings raise $25,000 to defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority so we can pass much-needed gun violence prevention legislation. Will you chip in a donation to help her win?**
**[Rush a donation of $5 or more now to elect Val Demings to the Senate, expand our Democratic Senate majority and make progress in the fight for gun safety.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41723737/330055908/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2022-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2Q1NTI3Yy0zMjhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9F83zQUCh4ycjKxtu8nkmPBnr_psS5LH9BQtWjREjU=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41723738/330055909/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2022-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2Q1NTI3Yy0zMjhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9F83zQUCh4ycjKxtu8nkmPBnr_psS5LH9BQtWjREjU=)
---
For Congresswoman Demings, fighting gun violence is personal. During her 27 years of service on the Orlando Police Department—including as the first female chief of police – she witnessed far too many times the pain and grief caused by gun violence. Her own community was left scarred when 49 innocent lives were taken at Pulse nightclub in Orlando in 2016.
Rep. Demings and her community still mourn for those who were lost, and ever since coming to Congress in 2017, Rep. Demings has fought for the sort of progress that will save lives—from universal background checks to a ban on high-capacity magazines. **I know that as the next U.S. senator for Florida, Val Demings will be instrumental in passing these commonsense, essential reforms into law.**
But friend, it's no exaggeration to say that Rep. Demings is up against the entire GOP establishment. Republicans have already funneled tens of millions of dollars into Florida to permanently keep the state red, and Marco Rubio's had the best fundraising numbers of his entire career while the GOP continues to smash fundraising records. Val Demings can only win and expand our Democratic Senate majority with _your_ grassroots support.

**[So please, before Congresswoman Demings' next big fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, will you chip in $5 or more to help her defeat Marco Rubio? Every dollar you give will ensure we can elect one of the biggest champions for gun safety to the U.S. Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41723739/330055910/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2022-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2Q1NTI3Yy0zMjhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9F83zQUCh4ycjKxtu8nkmPBnr_psS5LH9BQtWjREjU=)**
My very best,

Gabby Giffords
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41723740/330055911/1804727444?recurring=0&refcode=jtk2022-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2Q1NTI3Yy0zMjhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9F83zQUCh4ycjKxtu8nkmPBnr_psS5LH9BQtWjREjU=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41723741/330055912/1804727444?recurring=0&refcode=jtk2022-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2Q1NTI3Yy0zMjhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9F83zQUCh4ycjKxtu8nkmPBnr_psS5LH9BQtWjREjU=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41723742/330055913/-460395862?refcode=jtk2022-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2Q1NTI3Yy0zMjhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9F83zQUCh4ycjKxtu8nkmPBnr_psS5LH9BQtWjREjU=&emci=a3f86426-6585-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=67d5527c-328c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. clean_body: Just over eleven years ago my life turned upside down. | | | Friend, Eleven years ago, during a normal Saturday morning in Tucson, Arizona, my life turned upside down. I was shot in the head. Six of my constituents were killed, and 13 more were injured. In the immediate aftermath, I experienced the darkest days of my life. I had to relearn to walk, speak, read and write. I was devastated. My family was devastated. My community was devastated. But we were not broken. We got to work. Even in my recovery, I never stepped away from my life's purpose: working to make my community and country better. It's why I've now dedicated myself to lifesaving work to end gun violence. When I think about everything I've overcome—and the progress we've already made, the lives we've saved through our work at Giffords PAC – I know it's only possible because we're in this together. Taking on the gun lobby, passing commonsense legislation, ending our gun violence crisis—none of it is something any one of us can do alone. It's why we need champions for gun safety throughout our communities and across every level of government, particularly in the Senate, where so many lifesaving pieces of legislation have stalled. So today, I am reaching out to you personally about my friend Val Demings, who's running to be Florida's next senator and expand our gun safety majority in the Senate. Congresswoman Demings passed gun safety legislation through the House even when the challenges seemed insurmountable, and she's the gun safety champion we need in the Senate. Marco Rubio is not. But Florida's last Senate race was decided by a little over 10,000 votes and the GOP is going all in on attack ads and spending millions in other investments to defeat Val Demings, which means she needs you and me to have her back to win. So today, I'm helping Val Demings raise $25,000 to defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority so we can pass much-needed gun violence prevention legislation. Will you chip in a donation to help her win? = | | = For Congresswoman Demings, fighting gun violence is personal. During her 27 years of service on the Orlando Police Department—including as the first female chief of police – she witnessed far too many times the pain and grief caused by gun violence. Her own community was left scarred when 49 innocent lives were taken at Pulse nightclub in Orlando in 2016. Rep. Demings and her community still mourn for those who were lost, and ever since coming to Congress in 2017, Rep. Demings has fought for the sort of progress that will save lives—from universal background checks to a ban on high-capacity magazines. I know that as the next U.S. senator for Florida, Val Demings will be instrumental in passing these commonsense, essential reforms into law. But friend, it's no exaggeration to say that Rep. Demings is up against the entire GOP establishment. Republicans have already funneled tens of millions of dollars into Florida to permanently keep the state red, and Marco Rubio's had the best fundraising numbers of his entire career while the GOP continues to smash fundraising records. Val Demings can only win and expand our Democratic Senate majority with your grassroots support. = My very best, Gabby Giffords | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Tax, Videos, and Lunch with a Lord – Update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132304?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Tax cut or tax con?** Income tax elimination is top of the political agenda in Mississippi, with two different proposals under consideration; one from the House and the other, the Senate.

Except that is not entirely true. **In reality there is only one proposal to eliminate the state income tax: the House plan – also known as the****Mississippi Tax Freedom Act.**

The House plan would ensure that no one earning less than $40,000 a year would pay any state income tax at all. Critically, the plan would see future growth in state tax revenue used to eliminate all state income tax over a period of years.

**The House plan gives back to taxpayers much of the billion dollar surplus in the state budget.

The Senate plan, however, leaves politicians free to spend that money instead.**

The Senate talks about eliminating the 4 percent tax rate. In reality, so few pay much tax at that rate anyhow, it would mean that the average Mississippi worker was only about $200 a year better off. That would not be enough to by a Subway sandwich each week.

**The Senate plan cannot credibly be called a tax elimination plan.** I am not certain that it does much to reduce the amount of tax people pay at all.

Taking into account all of the changes proposed, including changes to the sales tax rate, the House plan would leave almost every Mississippian, under pretty much every scenario, better off. **It is difficult to see how anyone would be made significantly better off under the Senate plan. **

**Worse, I fear that the tax plan that the Senate has proposed risks undermining the credibility of those calling for tax breaks altogether. **

We are all familiar with politicians who run campaigns against “the swamp” but then disappear to DC to enjoy lunch with lobbyists. **How do you imagine voters would react when they discover that the car tag tax reduction they are being sold as part of the Senate plan will only reduce their car tag by $5?**

**Watch this video!** **On a brighter note, we’ve just launched a video to promote the idea of open enrollment in education.** Please take a minute to see how this simple reform could improve school performance here in our state.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=86bc74f1be&e=5703353baa)
---
**Click here to see the Future of Education in Mississippi! **
|
**Would _you_ like to have lunch with Lord Daniel Hannan? **
Daniel Hannan is a member of the British House of Lords, a Fox News contributor – and most important – a friend of America. **Lord H is coming to Jackson on March 1 st to have lunch and I would love it if you could come too!**

He will be talking about ‘woke’ elites, cancel culture and what we need to do to renew the spirit of America.
---
| [BOOK YOUR TICKET NOW](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a1f00d802e&e=5703353baa "BOOK YOUR TICKET NOW")
---
| Have a wonderful weekend!

---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

|
---
| | | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=6e28e257d5&e=5703353baa)
---
**Mississippi’s progress in combating Critical Race Theory are getting positive attention nationally.** Read what the National Review wrote here:
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ecd0c24f54&e=5703353baa)
---
**Why is Europe facing an energy crisis?** Listen to Douglas Carswell discuss the madness of "net zero" energy policy with the Bigger Pie Forum

subject: Tom Kean Paid National Party Boss Palatucci to Pressure His GOP Opposition
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PHIL RIZZO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Tom Kean Embodies Corruption— Elitist Politicians Need to GO! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jerseyrizzo/tom-kean-and-partyboss-palatucci?e=f7e301a8ae)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Tom Kean ran a weak campaign and lost to Malinowski in 2020. He wasn’t the right candidate two years ago and he definitely isn’t the right candidate now. **He’s still the same Kean — nepotist, entitled elitist, and soft-liberal** who could never truly represent New Jersey values. You’d think with all that dirty money and connections he could win a campaign. But no, [he has to cheat other Republicans out of their chance to represent New Jersey](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=ca68c16d5c&e=f7e301a8ae).
---
| [DONATE TO A CAMPAIGN THAT GETS ITS MANDATE FROM THE PEOPLE OF NEW JERSEY](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=6574764d65&e=f7e301a8ae "DONATE TO A CAMPAIGN THAT GETS ITS MANDATE FROM THE PEOPLE OF NEW JERSEY")
---
| **Here’s what Kean doesn’t want you to know:** in 2020, Tom Kean paid GOP Party boss Bill Palatucci to pressure his Republican opponents to drop out of the race. Bill Palatucci is a Republican National Committeeman who is _supposed_ to work for all Republicans, not just the ones who are willing to bribe him. _It’s corrupt men like Palatucci and Kean, who call themselves Republican leaders, that have been holding true conservatives back in New Jersey for decades._
---
| [IT’S TIME TO DROP THE RINOS, JOIN ME TO MAKE NJ TRUE](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=f0008c9521&e=f7e301a8ae "IT’S TIME TO DROP THE RINOS, JOIN ME TO MAKE NJ TRUE")
---
| Tom Kean is still working with Pathetic Palatucci [who’s firm gives more money to Democrats than Republicans](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=67285fff09&e=f7e301a8ae). Disgusting.

**I’m fighting _everyday_ for New Jerseyans.**

Kean and Palatucci are putting more energy into [squabbling over Cheney and Kinzinger](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=30b8ffb023&e=f7e301a8ae) than focusing on what New Jersey needs today. There are families here that need help _now_. While I was standing with our Department of Corrections officers protesting vaccine mandates, Kean is galavanting with the bottom-dwellers of big money corrupt politics.

New Jersey deserves candidates that actually stand for the principles they believe in. Someone who can _actually_ beat Malinowski and inspire New Jerseyans to vote Republican again. We need to take back the U.S. House _now_ , and Kean isn’t going to cut it.

_Phil Rizzo_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: Democrats Want to Block Loudoun Investigation
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
Your elected officials actually want to stop Attorney General Jason Miyares from investigating Scott Ziegler and the Loudoun County Public Schools | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6d2848ddbd3e/democrats-want-to-block-loudoun-investigation?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=0c431284a2&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| Dear ,

I would have thought that after widespread outrage from parents and students, national media attention, and clear evidence that the Loudoun County Public School System and Superintendent Scott Ziegler covered up sexual assault within the school system, that Democrats would realize how fed up we are and stop attempting to protect the corrupt school board in Loudoun County.

Instead, we saw the opposite yesterday. _Democrats are actually doubling down on their opposition to investigating those responsible._

[Senator Jennifer Boysko (D) and Delegate Suhas Subramanyam (D) held a press conference yesterday just to oppose our Attorney General Jason Miyares and his investigation in Loudoun.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=2c19f85620&e=fc83fb200d)

This is insane. Rather than listening to parents, students and teachers, Democrats are _still_ playing political games and picking sides based solely on political party.

It's time for this to end. You deserve elected officials who will listen to those they represent and protect your interests at locally, in Richmond, _and_ in Washington. You also deserve elected officials who will support this investigation because it's the right thing to do, rather than basing their support on political affiliations.

Our Democrat representatives have proven that they will do neither. That's why I'm running to take back Virginia's 10th Congressional District and give you the representation you deserve.

I'm excited to oust the Democrats and restore normalcy to Virginia and our country, but I can't do it without your help. [Will you please consider chipping in with $100, $50, $25, or even $10 to help me take back the 10th District and give you the representation you deserve?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=5a9ce8e0dd&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=8f632c74a2&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")
---

---
| I look forward to working together to end this insanity and protect our children.

For love of country,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District

Republicans are placing partisanship above one of the foundational components of our democracy: the right to vote. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41724040/330058078/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTc5MDBmNi0zNThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryvFWmCLXi2iMsbkOo6pXjWEgAo5lz30tzk7S8ayi2c=)
Recently, Senate Republicans shamelessly placed partisanship above our democracy by blocking two major pieces of voting rights legislation designed to protect Black and Brown Americans’ — and every Americans’ — access to the ballot box. — I served in uniform to protect and defend our Constitution and everyone’s right to have their voice heard through their vote. I will not allow Republicans to dismantle or weaken this fundamental component of our democracy. ---
Peter,

If you look at the screenshot below from a recent Democrat Senatorial Campaign Committee email, _you'd think that our opponent was in dire need of cash and help from the National Democrat Party._

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=34d3a9a9c6b944128791217733cfce57&_e=iR4sTSZX90iX2GoAS8RFiFV8XmNj0Q9pY8btG7oSLW6Be8dnQYvGdT1mE4Nn0b7isXowj4rEKjCKTdnH5h04T1oVdahufjSTUbpcNrUqkXTutI3nrwIq3vXcAP_GZcIqmWV8q3cdIVGJglvFfLe6tFXGg4MF8NPpeKpulFHrjpE_Zpu_2Vx7LCRGhjSsB951_PpV7lDNGuyTLe6CnW1hXCfTWN7SwgswEemt-ISTUcULM1peN6-Rkz0nvYFqc7epnEMza7ReV0oM_b1wcYIcctCR37tEVwGyFfmE5SlYBmF83Bl4a-f7XSpqTc6zTxvb4PlWXcNR_EwrIl8mg-0ivaoXJgUfVppP5C0AFO88swwYZ-uFtGs6z0F23TyczhSLhmNrNUfEoBfQ7A8vi6A66ZgwZCbIxJ8erCTnpjch4ceNcmmJZxSQPbDmLy1RKMskWMYYkE8VGzdXdbeQmi_BSA%3D%3D)
Recent polling in Georgia indeed gives our campaign a slight lead (within the margin of error), but our Democrat opponent doesn't need more campaign cash.

In the last three months of 2021, **our opponent raised $9.8 million from 130,000 individual donors. As it stands, he has $23 million in the bank for our Senate race this November.**

While our campaign also had significant fundraising support last quarter, the fact remains that our opponent started raising money months before we even entered the race. With his early start, he now has millions more in the bank than us. We've got to pick up the pace if we're going to catch up because "to keep the Senate blue," Democrats must win Georgia.

**[With that in mind, would you kindly send $4.50 to our campaign today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=34d3a9a9c6b944128791217733cfce57&_e=iR4sTSZX90iX2GoAS8RFiFV8XmNj0Q9pY8btG7oSLW6Be8dnQYvGdT1mE4Nn0b7isXowj4rEKjCKTdnH5h04T1oVdahufjSTUbpcNrUqkXTutI3nrwIq3vXcAP_GZcIqmWV8q3cdIVGJglvFfLe6tFXGg4MF8NPpeKpulFHrjpE_Zpu_2Vx7LCRGhjSsB951_PpV7lDNGuyTLe6CnW1hXCfTWN7SwgswEemt-ISTUcULM1peN6-Rkz0nvYFqc7epzaXDCDAiZ8YsK9dPLPy0gZpCbl69r6AiHsedAqV4NUOPYnALXD0mCeX_5c0fokpwg9CspAOSiaB54Ao1yyFpCjoCm02cknC_3Mtuglxgo979zULEQOz8-Djk1n0gn_cyxgsK4gBrHRqIcKjVisZh-wH-tKJbteyV-4qL_GvGmTa1gBT6a5_krL6drDrxAIjYjL5yYqZU0D43aClDSNuDnA%3D%3D)**

Our race in Georgia is going to be the most competitive contest in the nation this fall, so we can't afford to be outspent for a single moment.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=34d3a9a9c6b944128791217733cfce57&_e=iR4sTSZX90iX2GoAS8RFiFV8XmNj0Q9pY8btG7oSLW6Be8dnQYvGdT1mE4Nn0b7isXowj4rEKjCKTdnH5h04T1oVdahufjSTUbpcNrUqkXTutI3nrwIq3vXcAP_GZcIqmWV8q3cdIVGJglvFfLe6tFXGg4MF8NPpeKpulFHrjpE_Zpu_2Vx7LCRGhjSsB951_PpV7lDNGuyTLe6CnW1hXCfTWN7SwgswEemt-ISTUcULM1peN6-Rkz0nvYFqc7epiFYGOrQ6KNQrK8-i6cQ5m-Y9BWeb6qSvN2yA7YoWkXJV1o_0LUc5wi0fCyarXmiy4upDlvvHNKb8sMCTvdihkoDCvOZAGbwWkLH6M4e1RY9IaAecMjjP6-JYIRTfIbpIP2hydA-6c2kr21XM02P502Aq551pigVjGJPQ3u_m2btvsZqSttCpymAZxBZApbOSU-4h2-vJgRZlQx7czE91MA%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for Senate

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: New York Times just reported:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | I can’t believe what I just read. First, Donald Trump VOWED to run for president if Republicans steal back the House. Now, he just raised $122 MILLION to smear my Democrats and barge back into power. **_[I spent four years standing up to this failed president -- and there’s nothing that can stop me from defeating him again. That’s why I’m calling for a historic surge of support -- 8,023 more grassroots gifts before midnight -- to close this gap and make sure Trump and his allies can NEVER come into power again. Will you chip in $15? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41724502/330059618/1694517773?refcode=20220212_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjc5MDBmNi0zNThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpY6AhyjbDbsYf56-vTby-8Bxkv251iX07t4aCdk1QE=)_** I need you to make a critical choice in this moment: \-- We can let Trump shovel millions to his corrupt Republican allies, steal back our Majority, and set the stage for his next hateful presidential campaign. [**\-- Or we can rise up, build the largest grassroots movement in HISTORY, and stop Trump’s schemes in their tracks.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41724503/330059625/1694517773?refcode=20220212_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjc5MDBmNi0zNThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpY6AhyjbDbsYf56-vTby-8Bxkv251iX07t4aCdk1QE=)

* **64% of Iowa voters DON'T want to reelect Sen. Grassley** , and Abby is running to defeat him in what The Des Moines Register called a "marquee matchup" – making this our best chance in decades to flip this seat blue.

* **The Senate is split 50-50** , meaning Democrats MUST defeat vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley to maintain and expand our majority.

| | Team, I’m Sonia Chang-Díaz, and I’m running to become the next governor of Massachusetts. I wanted to take a moment to tell you why I’m running — and why building this grassroots coalition matters as we work to move Massachusetts forward. I started my career as a teacher in both the Lynn and Boston school systems. There, I saw firsthand what lack of investment does to our kids and our community. Throughout my teaching career, I learned the challenges facing our public school students, teachers, and parents. I took those lessons with me as I pursued public office, and after I was elected to the State Senate in 2008, I immediately got to work fighting for those families whose voices aren’t typically heard on Beacon Hill. We’ve been able to secure victories for equity and justice in Massachusetts, and we did it because we never gave up on the fight for working families and communities of color. Now’s our chance to take this movement for real progressive change all the way to the governor’s office, to build on our work and secure opportunity and justice for everyone in Massachusetts. But we can’t go the distance without building the strongest grassroots coalition possible. [_**Can you pitch in $15 and help spread our movement and message throughout the Commonwealth?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41724927/330061617/-1275523729?refcode=em_20220212_f_s_bio&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGU1NjNhYi0zNzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CRQDLuTh3X3BvOmdjrwKNaZ2JRvb6YFTX7Oc2VBFXrU=) I’m proud of our accomplishments in the State Senate. Over the years, we’ve defied the odds in delivering real results — from the $1.5 billion in new annual education funding we won primarily for low-income communities and communities of color, to comprehensive criminal justice reform, to the nation-leading police reform package we developed in 2020. We've shown that bold, transformational change is possible. We’ve got everything it takes to win the corner office on Beacon Hill, but like my family taught me growing up, **there’s no time to waste in doing good.** We’ve got to take advantage of every moment we have now to build our grassroots movement so that we’re in the best position to win the governorship this fall. [_**We're in this together — and if we’re going to win and deliver for Massachusetts, it’s only because we’re powered by grassroots supporters like you. Will you donate $15 to my campaign to become the next governor of Massachusetts?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41724928/330061618/-1275523729?refcode=em_20220212_f_s_bio&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGU1NjNhYi0zNzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CRQDLuTh3X3BvOmdjrwKNaZ2JRvb6YFTX7Oc2VBFXrU=) Saludos, Sonia

clean_body: Here’s why I’m running to be the next governor of Massachusetts: | | | | | Team, I’m Sonia Chang-Díaz, and I’m running to become the next governor of Massachusetts. I wanted to take a moment to tell you why I’m running — and why building this grassroots coalition matters as we work to move Massachusetts forward. I started my career as a teacher in both the Lynn and Boston school systems. There, I saw firsthand what lack of investment does to our kids and our community. Throughout my teaching career, I learned the challenges facing our public school students, teachers, and parents. I took those lessons with me as I pursued public office, and after I was elected to the State Senate in 2008, I immediately got to work fighting for those families whose voices aren’t typically heard on Beacon Hill. We’ve been able to secure victories for equity and justice in Massachusetts, and we did it because we never gave up on the fight for working families and communities of color. Now’s our chance to take this movement for real progressive change all the way to the governor’s office, to build on our work and secure opportunity and justice for everyone in Massachusetts. But we can’t go the distance without building the strongest grassroots coalition possible. = I’m proud of our accomplishments in the State Senate. Over the years, we’ve defied the odds in delivering real results — from the $1.5 billion in new annual education funding we won primarily for low-income communities and communities of color, to comprehensive criminal justice reform, to the nation-leading police reform package we developed in 2020. We've shown that bold, transformational change is possible. We’ve got everything it takes to win the corner office on Beacon Hill, but like my family taught me growing up, there’s no time to waste in doing good. We’ve got to take advantage of every moment we have now to build our grassroots movement so that we’re in the best position to win the governorship this fall. = Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. clean_body: At midnight, our campaign has an important fundraising deadline. Let me explain why it is so important we hit our fundraising goal: | Fellow American, At midnight, our campaign has an important fundraising deadline. Let me explain why it is so important we hit our fundraising goal: 1. I am running for Governor of Texas against a well-funded incumbent opponent. To overcome these advantages, my campaign is counting on the grassroots conservatives, like yourself, to make up the difference and build the momentum we need to win. 2. The Biden administration has opened our borders - allowing tens of thousands of illegals to pour into Texas. We must TAKE BACK control of our border. Fellow American, the Biden administration is abusing its power to impose their radical and harmful agenda onto Texas, and Our Governor is allowing it to unfold on his watch. Steadfast and Loyal, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. subject: I’m officially the Democratic frontrunner!
body:
Yesterday, we got word that another one of our primary opponents suspended their campaign in this district. We are one step closer to unifying local Democrats in our effort to unseat Kevin McCarthy. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, [chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41724975/330061856/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzk0NDdiOS0zODhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Kd_PYw0Ee7hsWsma3yqcsHoxr6eNAV1QP8vvWzQLlw=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e19447b9-388c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/e39447b9-388c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzk0NDdiOS0zODhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Kd_PYw0Ee7hsWsma3yqcsHoxr6eNAV1QP8vvWzQLlw=&id=124172018)._ Big news, friend.

**Yesterday, we got word that another one of our primary opponents suspended their campaign in this district.**

We are officially the Democratic frontrunner in this race, and we are one step closer to unifying local Democrats in our effort to unseat Kevin McCarthy!

I want to commend my primary opponents on their hard-fought campaigns. I also want to let everyone know that I’m staying in this fight, and I’m not backing down.

We have an uphill climb, but our Central Valley district has been left behind for too long while McCarthy cowers to Trump and jockeys for the Speaker's gavel.

**He needs to be held accountable, and there's no more powerful way to do that than by challenging him at the ballot box right here in the 20th.**

As we enter the next stage of this campaign, I need to know you're with me:

**[Will you click here to say you officially endorse my campaign? Today, I'd love to see your name with the hundreds of other endorsements we've received from grassroots supporters across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41724976/330061857/-270480565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzk0NDdiOS0zODhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Kd_PYw0Ee7hsWsma3yqcsHoxr6eNAV1QP8vvWzQLlw=&emci=e19447b9-388c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e39447b9-388c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)** | **[Endorse Marisa](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41724977/330061858/-270480565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzk0NDdiOS0zODhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Kd_PYw0Ee7hsWsma3yqcsHoxr6eNAV1QP8vvWzQLlw=&emci=e19447b9-388c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e39447b9-388c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)**

This goes without saying but I'm not a politician, and I never dreamed of running for Congress, especially after being a teacher for more than two decades.

But my kiddos and their families are hurting. I had to do something to leave this community better off for everyone -- and that starts with taking on Kevin McCarthy.

We are officially the Democratic frontrunner in this race, and we are one step closer to unifying local Democrats in our effort to unseat Kevin McCarthy! I want to commend my primary opponents on their hard-fought campaigns. I also want to let everyone know that I’m staying in this fight, and I’m not backing down. Friend,

The RINO’s that are in New Jersey have colluded and obstructed the power of the people.

The people at the top have decided that your voice does not matter. They think that they can close the door of the Monmouth County screening and vetting process. They have broken their own rules in an attempt to disallow our campaign from any opportunity to be on the Republican line. They think that the power belongs to them instead of the people.

Ultimately it is just another example of a power grab by Socialist Smith. Trying to keep good candidates away from the people. But we aren’t concerned, Friend. We are going to win this primary and we are going to do it together.

Our America First campaign is run BY THE PEOPLE, FOR THE PEOPLE.

While I won't be at the Monmouth County Convention today, I will still be running to give the GREAT people of New Jersey, a Congressman who fights for them, and actually lives in New Jersey.

My experience as a law enforcement officer and a decorated US Army Veteran has allowed me to understand that when the going gets tough, fight harder! I will not back down, and we will continue our campaign forward.

But we cannot do it alone, Friend. name: AlessandraBiaggi.com
subject: Bump → Add your name to personally endorse Alessandra
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#
Friends, we wanted to make sure you saw this important message from Alessandra.
Remember, we have less than five months until our primary election, and our competitors will be watching closely to assess Alessandra’s momentum. So it’s important that AB knows you have her back.
[**Read her original message below, and then add your name here to endorse Alessandra’s campaign for Congress in NY-03.**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/signup/em220211-personalendorse/?source=em220212-1-15&akid=473%2E59515%2Ej5o7_i)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/signup/em220211-personalendorse/?source=em220212-1-15&akid=473%2E59515%2Ej5o7_i)**
* * *
Friends —
Earlier this week, I shared the news that I’m running for Congress in New York’s 3rd district. Since then, hundreds of people have made contributions to our campaign to show their support.
And truthfully, I want to say thank you, because lots of supporters like you chipping in $5 or $10 at a time is what will power this campaign.
But if we are going to win in a crowded primary, we will need as many people as possible to say that they are standing with us. That’s why I’m asking:
[**Can you add your name here to say that you personally endorse my campaign for Congress? It’s important to know that we can count on you in this race.**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/signup/em220211-personalendorse/?source=em220212-1-15&akid=473%2E59515%2Ej5o7_i)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/signup/em220211-personalendorse/?source=em220212-1-15&akid=473%2E59515%2Ej5o7_i)**
For years, Albany was plagued by gridlock caused by conservatives in our own party, corruption, and cronyism at the highest levels.
Through hard work, we were finally able to turn the page on that era — and I want to take the lessons we learned to Congress to support working families in New York and beyond.
[**If you’re with me, I’m asking for you to show your support by personally endorsing my campaign. You can add your name using this link. **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/signup/em220211-personalendorse/?source=em220212-1-15&akid=473%2E59515%2Ej5o7_i)** I can’t thank you enough for your support, and I’ll be in touch soon. All my best,
Alessandra
Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=473%2E59515%2Ej5o7_i).

name: Paul Gazelka
subject: Paying too much in taxes?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
Let's change that. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=caa7e32b6fea4911877883388fcb19dc&_e=twjR34iHUaKwImfCXPIWxtqVUEZRy0oHU62LlVoS-w03WxASrUPp5kA2uvdXiBwsjVJSV4mfvn-3zodcObcHxfxaUyN_anclSH3_SM9f2HZgttF55QiwNHy-rRqa422BH9FrBqVPvtRQc4GLtEoFfT1yRvIXEDWmNcNB_ZTpdfPBhwBTP1HDutEM3vrRHJBJFs6jWeL8pjdhCWpvqgdBP_sP8n_rjxgi7YPgFDu5BLRYpU4oFyFlNEeicpiqRYwc0FvXhriSufpqqlbpVJXcTIwgwNc7k8WL5_mkYmRmx1yjNz0xI-DTQ2YEnijvJpVNUuRfzK1ZHSKN6zxgAqeBJbbqwiq-e8fQDViI25JyDL99eMCeuFxQyW6OLkVy-TyU) My friend,
I am proud to have a proven record of fighting for low taxes. Here in the Senate, it is one of my top priorities to ensure that your hard-earned money stays right where it belongs — in your pocket. I will continue that record as your governor.
My experience speaks for itself. In the Senate, I worked to:
* Provide $1 billion in tax relief to those who were hardest hit during COVID shutdowns:

* Eliminating taxes on Paycheck Protection Plan loans and unemployment benefits
* Ending the budget gimmick of June sales tax payments so struggling businesses could power through to economic recovery
* Funded the Angel Investor Tax Credit to fuel innovation

I'm also proud of what I have worked to stop:
* More than a billion dollars in tax increases, including higher income taxes, capital gains taxes, and corporate tax increases
* Gas tax of $350 million over four years

While I already have a strong record of fighting for low taxes, I'm looking to build on that record as your governor. That's why I will make removing the Social Security tax one of my top priorities. Minnesota is one of 12 states that imposes this tax on our most vulnerable. Many Minnesotans rely on Social Security as their primary source of income — why are we punishing those that are on a fixed income?
You know that I have fought for you and will continue to do so, but I need your help if I am going to continue going head-to-head with Tim Walz. [**Will You Help Me Stand Up for Lower Taxes?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=caa7e32b6fea4911877883388fcb19dc&_e=twjR34iHUaKwImfCXPIWxtqVUEZRy0oHU62LlVoS-w03WxASrUPp5kA2uvdXiBwsjVJSV4mfvn-3zodcObcHxfxaUyN_anclSH3_SM9f2HZgttF55QiwNHy-rRqa422BH9FrBqVPvtRQc4GLtEoFfdMpinycoU73hdWRQTxTUNl2VAIEU9FqKTQFucdbS9OJFslWr3vOMqCF5Hss7o7CcPNVauGhoozxp91PzbI_matJczVDb1FHcjNiSEVcSqoH8uyoGzOMNlM6T92PhTBn_tFuGxIat8gk7e08aIKqIzRxcjzOSesoJAz3pe6dnEHZgRNxSDtl0Arc4bWqu9LDPurh3QIKTdCnZwDrAGQXD2y7r2WfoeqOfV-q9ULgocbH) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=caa7e32b6fea4911877883388fcb19dc&_e=twjR34iHUaKwImfCXPIWxtqVUEZRy0oHU62LlVoS-w03WxASrUPp5kA2uvdXiBwsjVJSV4mfvn-3zodcObcHxfxaUyN_anclSH3_SM9f2HZgttF55QiwNHy-rRqa422BH9FrBqVPvtRQc4GLtEoFfQY-9lZrxvCilZqHpBu7LY6qnU3doT24kq_yycV70clzW4O99RPuzZ_zasaNQA1C3utfMSGoq8JurvIXMFlw9mBaDaJH9xlZnpWnhmE4IqnAXTsu4Nfr2NjD0QXm1bWxLGcCFlNAHLZDgwGRW7F-913_stx6EVZZNTpJaKG5LzjJPf7-jBr3ZCtjHjSLmvw31rioYqzkZKasd18aSCzV0zNYXcAMiz8zolKjD14zWAuj) Now more than ever, our state and nation need leadership that will promote economic recovery and fight for ALL families, not just the liberal elite. I'm ready to fight for you again, this time as your governor. With your support, we can make Minnesota even better.
Thank you, [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=caa7e32b6fea4911877883388fcb19dc&_e=twjR34iHUaKwImfCXPIWxtqVUEZRy0oHU62LlVoS-w03WxASrUPp5kA2uvdXiBwsjVJSV4mfvn-3zodcObcHxfxaUyN_anclSH3_SM9f2HZgttF55QiwNHy-rRqa422BH9FrBqVPvtRQc4GLtEoFfbwUAyrtCRNX_xsbFh3rgKWh9alugWLyfY6dYNq2Q2ozOrMb6aG6fgVEvQTF2lhPbgTXzr2q66tdxfHU9zLQDFJ_TerOJM6kg1bICmsVRth4l6YJjfOuJIRCFZtGBP5wvssyC_fDGwx3jeyupKIi7-zLTCR0z6X_RVUNop2g2scTdQ0MK77FnMWGpQWukHLWNc6ENWFUHPLeCt-9AdUFz1U0x8qlDxbnFwayiNtbWSv2) clean_body: Let's change that. My friend, I am proud to have a proven record of fighting for low taxes. Here in the Senate, it is one of my top priorities to ensure that your hard-earned money stays right where it belongs — in your pocket. I will continue that record as your governor. My experience speaks for itself. In the Senate, I worked to: Provide $1 billion in tax relief to those who were hardest hit during COVID shutdowns: Eliminating taxes on Paycheck Protection Plan loans and unemployment benefits Ending the budget gimmick of June sales tax payments so struggling businesses could power through to economic recovery Funded the Angel Investor Tax Credit to fuel innovation I'm also proud of what I have worked to stop: More than a billion dollars in tax increases, including higher income taxes, capital gains taxes, and corporate tax increases Gas tax of $350 million over four years While I already have a strong record of fighting for low taxes, I'm looking to build on that record as your governor. That's why I will make removing the Social Security tax one of my top priorities. Minnesota is one of 12 states that imposes this tax on our most vulnerable. Many Minnesotans rely on Social Security as their primary source of income — why are we punishing those that are on a fixed income? You know that I have fought for you and will continue to do so, but I need your help if I am going to continue going head-to-head with Tim Walz. Now more than ever, our state and nation need leadership that will promote economic recovery and fight for ALL families, not just the liberal elite. I'm ready to fight for you again, this time as your governor. With your support, we can make Minnesota even better. Thank you, Senator Paul Gazelka Candidate for Governor | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Provided by Gazelka for Governor P.O. Box 175 Little Falls, MN 56345

name: Stop Stacey, Inc.
subject: Rules for thee and not for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stop Stacey, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mzrkImBwUWBomN1Z1ACoZeYKzoDCobdYcHdB0Jx2sFxJF8yTonbgPbwNZ94BUUPm00KIp6zigll6h6tsuj-Svqr_GqDX4OSR7f5ZOOWrOfYznfOwIqmGjr0fsbwNtgr5dpqBnqtlXYaN5fCPrCSCE55tcaH4yOqyjeRfwbEPvx5kfbTEorHtnA==&c=b6mBG9Q5Kg0TOnDb4SbcSzZF3UY3fWi6RlQvYQtTtyZWIGCjTW7Diw==&ch=tWUCSTt31E2Aggg-RyAqJez7CxorQPKRbxqdxI9S3szZzAzixrZtkw==)
---
| Peter,

The hypocrisy of Stacey Abrams knows no bounds.
Did you see this picture?
---
|
---
| Yep! Your eyes aren't playing tricks. The same left-wing radical that wants our kids to be masked in school can't be bothered to wear a mask herself.
Can you imagine what kind of socialist edicts she would issue as Governor...and completely ignore herself? We can and that's why we are busy putting together a game plan to Stop Stacey this November.
We know that running for Governor...again...is part of her grand plan for a total takeover of America. And we have every intention on doing whatever it takes to derail her efforts before it's too late.
[In our last e-mail, we encouraged all freedom loving patriots - who want to Stop Stacey - to dig deep and chip in $50, $100, or even $500. Sadly, the response was pretty bad.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mzrkImBwUWBomN1Z1ACoZeYKzoDCobdYcHdB0Jx2sFxJF8yTonbgPbwNZ94BUUPm00KIp6zigll6h6tsuj-Svqr_GqDX4OSR7f5ZOOWrOfYznfOwIqmGjr0fsbwNtgr5dpqBnqtlXYaN5fCPrCSCE55tcaH4yOqyjeRfwbEPvx5kfbTEorHtnA==&c=b6mBG9Q5Kg0TOnDb4SbcSzZF3UY3fWi6RlQvYQtTtyZWIGCjTW7Diw==&ch=tWUCSTt31E2Aggg-RyAqJez7CxorQPKRbxqdxI9S3szZzAzixrZtkw==)
If we can't reach our $25,000 goal by the end of the month, I'm afraid we will be limited in what we can do going forward. While we are proud to boast a grassroots army of more than 10,000 folks, we need matching resources to take on Stacey and her Soros funded dark money network.
[So if you didn't get a chance to chip in, we hope you will. And after you make that secure contribution, urge your friends and neighbors to join the fight.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mzrkImBwUWBomN1Z1ACoZeYKzoDCobdYcHdB0Jx2sFxJF8yTonbgPbwNZ94BUUPm00KIp6zigll6h6tsuj-Svqr_GqDX4OSR7f5ZOOWrOfYznfOwIqmGjr0fsbwNtgr5dpqBnqtlXYaN5fCPrCSCE55tcaH4yOqyjeRfwbEPvx5kfbTEorHtnA==&c=b6mBG9Q5Kg0TOnDb4SbcSzZF3UY3fWi6RlQvYQtTtyZWIGCjTW7Diw==&ch=tWUCSTt31E2Aggg-RyAqJez7CxorQPKRbxqdxI9S3szZzAzixrZtkw==)
I have the utmost confidence that together...we can Stop Stacey and Save America!
Sincerely,
Jeremy Brand Stop Stacey, Inc.
---
| PS: To learn more about Stop Stacey, visit [StopStacey.org ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TimQNqaiLpBH57EBlvOBVuWMUSZWbRfsu5dB_KoRnExBeDtGIlH0vMd97ytBl_lVN6uC5d4g-pprD5NAjaQopdBatYfOy4H-Xwg3VCJjubmy75h9WINv4spQ4040uokacdyxRiEVP5-a5KQ-OjMLpQ==&c=GOKl9I8Rd_6F9a6NO2KkjkcdvXQGK1d-wlrGHPXrux-_yRz2SGSB5w==&ch=xvKeRSuTlm2BvJrYJEukrMwDDQH6vG6TtXXprj6K4R8Z8CbegPS6iA==)and follow along on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TimQNqaiLpBH57EBlvOBVuWMUSZWbRfsu5dB_KoRnExBeDtGIlH0vMd97ytBl_lVH3XmlIHPdRnkrwNlEUcIBWQkrMhf-INEevAi-AhoyYLSXoNvaz5mbfPW_MjJD-QgZQ8sjXu3kUofDkIpsZEgjg==&c=GOKl9I8Rd_6F9a6NO2KkjkcdvXQGK1d-wlrGHPXrux-_yRz2SGSB5w==&ch=xvKeRSuTlm2BvJrYJEukrMwDDQH6vG6TtXXprj6K4R8Z8CbegPS6iA==) and [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TimQNqaiLpBH57EBlvOBVuWMUSZWbRfsu5dB_KoRnExBeDtGIlH0vMd97ytBl_lVhBhGSMvfm3kFa6YQWYgK4Zwlgx5sCBBgAqBtMX8qJYOSAMte-i5aFxAnMM3ZXT95e-bbIy-2JU-C5fzb5-USCy8Xxk0voVoO&c=GOKl9I8Rd_6F9a6NO2KkjkcdvXQGK1d-wlrGHPXrux-_yRz2SGSB5w==&ch=xvKeRSuTlm2BvJrYJEukrMwDDQH6vG6TtXXprj6K4R8Z8CbegPS6iA==) to stay up to date with the latest information.

body:
here’s what you might’ve missed

|
---
Derek — exactly one month ago, the 2022 Virginia Legislative session was gaveled in. The radical, right-wing Republicans in Richmond have been working hard to roll back our progress, but Virginia Democrats are determined to make sure that doesn’t happen. **[Make a contribution to help our team at the DPVA continue to protect our progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41725852/330068839/1455862206?refcode=dpva-em-220212-legroundup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2JjNjhiZC0zZjhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QPEQdhFHg4-dRlGIU00c7HNE1QTr6tPCfYC55ESYLXA=)** In just one month, Republican leaders have managed to attack progress throughout the commonwealth from every angle. **Amanda Chase filed a bill peddling misinformation and far-right conspiracies** reproductive freedom** and filed a bill to ban abortions after 20 weeks. **Jen Kiggans introduced a divisive concepts bill in the Senate** which would censor Virginia educators and prohibit students from receiving a well-rounded education. **The Republicans in Richmond continue to push bills that further Glenn Youngkin’s radical right-wing agenda, but our Democratic leaders in the General subject: Can you send in a donation from your city ?

body:
[1]Erica Smith

It’s Saturday, so we’ll get right to it:

Monday at 11:59 PM ET is our mid-month fundraising deadline.
Unfortunately, donations from across the country have slowed down
over the past few days, and we’re $2,024 behind on our goal of raising
$20,000.

It’s absolutely critical that our campaign stays on track. Our primary is
nearly three months away, and we’ll be making important budget decisions
at the end of this month.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40331?refcode=em20220212-840&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=840%2E3698%2EXww9aw ]We only have two days left to close the gap, so we’re humbly asking you
to make a $5 donation to send Erica Smith to the U.S House?
We ran the numbers, and if just 2 people from your city donate to
our campaign, we’ll get back on track.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40331?refcode=em20220212-840&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=840%2E3698%2EXww9aw ]Donate $5

Erica is unbought and unbossed. She has the skill, expertise, and
experience to keep this House seat blue, and she’s got a plan to bring
power back to the people. But, we need the resources to win this race.

Electing representatives like Erica — who will fight for the everyday
working families in North Carolina’s 2nd District and beyond — is the only
way we’ll prevent Republicans from winning control of the U.S. House, and
deliver real change for our communities.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40331?refcode=em20220212-840&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=840%2E3698%2EXww9aw ]Will you help us close our fundraising gap by chipping in anything you
can? A donation of any amount makes a huge impact and is meaningful to
Erica.

Thanks,

Erica Smith for Congress

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220212-840-footer&t=1022&refcode2=840_3698_Xww9aw&akid=840%2E3698%2EXww9aw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=840%2E3698%2EXww9aw

name: By 10 AM tomorrow
subject: To: President Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Sending our thanks >>
| Team: With the one year anniversary of President Biden’s inauguration in the rear-view mirror, we need to reach out and show our gratitude.

**He has shown such poise and leadership while saving our country from a historic pandemic, and repairing the damage caused by Donald Trump.**

But despite all his accomplishments, he is being mercilessly attacked by far-right agitators who only want to destroy his accomplishments. [So we’re sending a letter to share our thanks for all of President Biden’s hard work during his first year in office. We’re sending this letter tomorrow at 10 AM SHARP. SIGN NOW, Friend! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5822?t=7&akid=1253%2E878179%2ENlZqr1) | [Donate $1 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5823?t=9&akid=1253%2E878179%2ENlZqr1)
---
**TO:** President Joe Biden
**FROM:** A Grateful American
**RE:** HAPPY ONE YEAR!

**We cannot begin to tell you the sense of relief we felt watching you take the presidential oath of office.**

It has been so wonderful to see civility return to the Oval Office and to _finally_ have a President that is willing to fight for working folks and deliver the change we’ve been crying out for over the last four years.

**And my goodness have you delivered on your campaign promises! From the historic American Rescue Plan, to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill, to leading an unprecedented economic recovery – we’re SO grateful!**

**But I know that despite your accomplishments, you continuously face unhinged attacks from disgraceful MAGA Republicans.**

[I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this card and chipping in $1 to Voter Protection Project to show that we support you and your administration SO much. »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5823?t=11&akid=1253%2E878179%2ENlZqr1) | [Donate $1 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5823?t=13&akid=1253%2E878179%2ENlZqr1)
---
I am AMAZED at all you have been able to do for the American people in just your first year as President.

_Joe, you've led us through a pandemic, a massive economic recovery, sharp political division, and SAVED our Democracy from the brink of peril._

[Congratulations on such a successful first year of your presidency. We know that next year will be even more successful thanks to your leadership! Thank you, thank you, thank you! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5823?t=15&akid=1253%2E878179%2ENlZqr1)
Regards,

**_xx A Grateful American_**
[Donate $1 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5823?t=17&akid=1253%2E878179%2ENlZqr1)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1253%2E878179%2ENlZqr1). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1253%2E878179%2ENlZqr1).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1253%2E878179%2ENlZqr1) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=18&akid=1253%2E878179%2ENlZqr1). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1253%2E878179%2ENlZqr1)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1253%2E878179%2ENlZqr1)

[Team,

More than a year after a violent mob attacked our Capitol, Donald Trump is still parroting the Big Lie that incited an insurrection and endangered our democracy. His rhetoric is getting more and more dangerous.

Peter, voting is the core of our Democracy. It’s one of our most sacred and invaluable rights. So my question is: why are Republicans trying so hard to take it away?

The GOP claims to support patriotism, freedom, and values. **Yet, time and again they prove that it’s a facade.** As the party becomes more extreme, we have seen the attacks on freedoms – like voting rights, women’s rights, minority rights – the attacks on anyone who doesn’t agree with them, and the increase in lies being told when they don’t get their way.

If you ask me, their patriotism, love of freedom, and values are meaningless.

Their gerrymandering, attack on voting rights, and lies about a stolen election is DIRECTLY undermining our democracy. **The people will not be silenced.** And if we are, then we aren’t living in the America that I know and love. **[If you can, chip in $15 today to help us register 5 voters in Northwest Georgia to counteract these anti-democratic plots. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41726270/330070533/-1085092386?refcode=em0212&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjM3NzQ1Ny00NDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4FsGOFfUd3vKfPOzcfeOIx2uZILkqdmVkwJWYSCdjL8=)**

Marjorie Taylor Greene and the GOP don’t want our voices to be heard because they’re terrified of losing their power. Let’s take our democracy back and make sure that EVERYONE has a say in November.

clean_body: | | Peter, voting is the core of our Democracy. It’s one of our most sacred and invaluable rights. So my question is: why are Republicans trying so hard to take it away? The GOP claims to support patriotism, freedom, and values. Yet, time and again they prove that it’s a facade. As the party becomes more extreme, we have seen the attacks on freedoms – like voting rights, women’s rights, minority rights – the attacks on anyone who doesn’t agree with them, and the increase in lies being told when they don’t get their way. If you ask me, their patriotism, love of freedom, and values are meaningless. Their gerrymandering, attack on voting rights, and lies about a stolen election is DIRECTLY undermining our democracy. The people will not be silenced. And if we are, then we aren’t living in the America that I know and love. = Marjorie Taylor Greene and the GOP don’t want our voices to be heard because they’re terrified of losing their power. Let’s take our democracy back and make sure that EVERYONE has a say in November. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Win or lose, our democracy is stronger when we all have a voice at the table. name: Patty Murray
subject: How we defend the Senate in 2022:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
There’s more we need to do in 2022–and that’s why it’s so important that we defend the Senate.
#
Peter,
In 2021, Democrats accomplished a lot for working families in Washington state. We cut taxes for more than 35 million families nationwide, made serious investments in Washington state’s infrastructure through the bipartisan infrastructure law, and created millions of good-paying jobs.
**But there’s more we need to do in 2022–and that’s why it’s so important that we defend the Senate. **
**[If Mitch McConnell’s GOP takes back the Senate, they’re going to dismantle the progress we made. That’s why I’m teaming up with the DSCC to make sure we’re in the best position possible to win in 2022. Will you split a $5 contribution between my campaign and the DSCC now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41726319/330070694/-1951969803?refcode=pm_em_220212_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGRkZmJjZC00NDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=067liPFlm7w0nY4EHF6_S0n0cZmmo8cenYOJvbrBqUQ=)**
This year, I’m focused on passing the legislation that I hear about from families across Washington state every day: affordable child care, lower prescription drug prices, protecting reproductive rights, addressing our climate crisis, protecting the right to vote, and more.
But in order to make the kind of progress our families and communities need, we have to defend and expand our Senate majority–**and we can’t do it without your support.**
So please, Peter, head over to [DefendTheSenate.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41726320/330070695/261500679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGRkZmJjZC00NDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=067liPFlm7w0nY4EHF6_S0n0cZmmo8cenYOJvbrBqUQ=&emci=9ab9d257-178c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=38ddfbcd-448c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=13116610), learn more about Democrats running across the country, and** ****[chip in a few dollars to ensure we defend and expand our critical Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41726321/330070696/-1951969803?refcode=pm_em_220212_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGRkZmJjZC00NDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=067liPFlm7w0nY4EHF6_S0n0cZmmo8cenYOJvbrBqUQ=)**
With your support, I know we can win.
Thank you,
Patty
** **

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41726322/330070697/-1951969803?refcode=pm_em_220212_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGRkZmJjZC00NDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=067liPFlm7w0nY4EHF6_S0n0cZmmo8cenYOJvbrBqUQ=)****

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: AOC is going to Texas 🤠
body:
Our Texas primaries are critical to building our progressive power in Congress
#
Peter,
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is heading to Texas this weekend to get out the vote for Jessica Cisneros and Greg Casar ahead of early voting.
Like AOC and other Justice Democrats in Congress, Jessica and Greg are running grassroots, people-powered campaigns against establishment Democrats backed by special interest groups and corporations.
**That’s why AOC is going to Texas to get out the vote.** The movement showed up for AOC in 2018, and we’re counting on the movement showing up big for Jessica and Greg right now. [Will you join AOC and show your support for Jessica and Greg by splitting a contribution between their campaigns?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94097?refcode=em20220212-21940&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=21940%2E1203867%2EgrLnCD)**
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94097?refcode=em20220212-21940&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=21940%2E1203867%2EgrLnCD)**
In recent years, Texans have experienced an all-out attack on women and LGBTQ+ reproductive freedoms, devastating infrastructure failures, and leaders who are more concerned with representing their corporate donors than their constituents. Jessica and Greg are running to represent working people, and fight for their interests alongside AOC and the rest of the JD coalition.
We have a real opportunity to expand progressive leadership in Congress by electing Jessica and Greg this year, but with early voting starting on Monday, we need to make sure their campaigns have the resources they need to reach every last voter before ballots are cast.
**[Will you split a contribution between Jessica Cisneros and Greg Casar? With AOC campaigning in Texas, we need to ensure their campaigns can capitalize on this momentum.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94097?refcode=em20220212-21940&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=21940%2E1203867%2EgrLnCD)**
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94097?refcode=em20220212-21940&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=21940%2E1203867%2EgrLnCD)**
In solidarity,
Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=21940%2E1203867%2EgrLnCD) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=21940%2E1203867%2EgrLnCD) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220212-21940-footer&t=25&refcode2=21940_1203867_grLnCD&akid=21940%2E1203867%2EgrLnCD)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Colin Schmitt
subject: NY-18 is poised to flip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schmitt for Congress
body:
Polling indicates that Sean Patrick Maloney is vulnerable in 2022

| [](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=ba90a79c949e466cace1526159f274fe&_e=tir2DB9ZgaDmftZwIsXhJpfC3ZGEVKMuJXc5qEl0TvHWp-gUQxW3VUbhbt-qP_ixw8EbrRRYfk_0JCxxwfrSiW7ZsklyAzwsxDPHycAzCAsAka9gCHD4eJbw3bBvDQ7-sPlgRImxSMvXH_X8jAPo5-w7qfbuqs-2NtDLw4c6Rw-E_FtsLxWtECEbuBS0t4YO0b96aHa_WDu8DS9VokKnyl3AQrT-lM9tpziYPJyGSTZmQ9mMsCL5IUNxZtFob67UQ8Qopj5GP-7dStFQuASXiueeBffVQ3VV_Ss6MaERDqcJqfUZrnBXDFBSaMVLFfed21VT7xFCvJqiJ-ctvzDU1F_ZwLj-RAlHqoS3oZI3nGn438_3FZbzlZDCAFQr0_cJtGIezmTCm42HL9aoOSXTN0TyMTL9SMGt3MI74v2Jpb2LVrsncD_MD11yekkxQOs9o8DAnBDeHHpYQ1RtI7OQ73Wi1JkjIV1aUHWcUud-R3eESR8KfmT7HpAKKNuXOI5_b_D99tdVAc6ntHNJThNTYw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

I’ve got some great news. A top pollster just wrote that I will be the candidate to finally unseat Sean Patrick Maloney!

This **[newest poll](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=ba90a79c949e466cace1526159f274fe&_e=tir2DB9ZgaDmftZwIsXhJjpN-YRzEs82Zkkak33cXxFVEJcwB769QlCF73jjNomG9i8xJv2_wKCWgAD0tLmnFDYNdqo3yArumW0h3tOzSEPAxrSk_uLCLNMznJVvu6ZiQEjvxwnWGUrSpyBJlR9hT5sUz_zRiWL46CapwWdwP-1OhWz_-DcTjbSu4Gu4zvs7_adTvso81Oxf0s1SObPaU7Mo46hQPJ63YPEIK2C1Pj0XkUdRw2kBn6fTc_cw46QNIqCPqD0H76tkQw2YVF2NKcVtt-TDN5na7TbQ_SaA4sgLWZQxJGpo4bFBbbKUxwwD8CHEuxob_CCq-wff3FknXhlmuw-1aBq6L4ANPjDaYh8%3D)** shows me **BEATING** Maloney!

**You read that right:** The latest polling shows we're leading Sean Patrick Maloney in this race. Unlike Maloney, we have a strong base of support because of **what we've accomplished for Hudson Valley families.** And Maloney has sold out his constituents and embraced Biden and Pelosi's radical agenda.

**[Can you chip in to help me win this thing and retire Sean Patrick Maloney?](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=ba90a79c949e466cace1526159f274fe&_e=tir2DB9ZgaDmftZwIsXhJpfC3ZGEVKMuJXc5qEl0TvHWp-gUQxW3VUbhbt-qP_ixw8EbrRRYfk_0JCxxwfrSiW7ZsklyAzwsxDPHycAzCAsAka9gCHD4eJbw3bBvDQ7-sPlgRImxSMvXH_X8jAPo5-w7qfbuqs-2NtDLw4c6Rw-E_FtsLxWtECEbuBS0t4YO0b96aHa_WDu8DS9VokKnyl3AQrT-lM9tpziYPJyGSTZmQ9mMsCL5IUNxZtFob67UQ8Qopj5GP-7dStFQuASXiueeBffVQ3VV_Ss6MaERDqfoWXUJHxZ5j7h1VAUv8Y7Bl21RXqR0ScAlb1VOsxbgk3usQAdQ6Wfr_DNeOf-Ly2mLB-bnOEfICeR60abY599rjgwVObSe3hpEiCQEP1gSWm-bR7oCEKTk87o88OpmwaYLpit7U7ZSboKS21FcAaYaZp7_Rtu7wnRwp9SZWUzVFOkg8HfzHMHHdGbK8a_Unw1NxKn8b61q8z9o1CVXZ_JbASdWunSt53AxDFOvsnBOlg%3D%3D)** | **[RETIRE SEAN PATRICK MALONEY](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=ba90a79c949e466cace1526159f274fe&_e=tir2DB9ZgaDmftZwIsXhJpfC3ZGEVKMuJXc5qEl0TvHWp-gUQxW3VUbhbt-qP_ixw8EbrRRYfk_0JCxxwfrSiW7ZsklyAzwsxDPHycAzCAsAka9gCHD4eJbw3bBvDQ7-sPlgRImxSMvXH_X8jAPo5-w7qfbuqs-2NtDLw4c6Rw-E_FtsLxWtECEbuBS0t4YO0b96aHa_WDu8DS9VokKnyl3AQrT-lM9tpziYPJyGSTZmQ9mMsCL5IUNxZtFob67UQ8Qopj5GP-7dStFQuASXiueeBffVQ3VV_Ss6MaERDqelnWImpybGqPzNwV6q9VJIwz9sRQM8sU7SJMPcQ-keiyfPrGNl3LmzuavN7bGwSqUVnPfmHVcaCX1esOvSe2V3svEXeazUoEPjOCuuwUzjCHNP9xkbaOAsagN2bWDkgt8ob1egRgK9iASrgw5lfm1fe6o-hdGmpQLEwzgJiJs-89P-Bz4J45KeEaXER8mg7TiENIXxTUKFAmXC4WmQ8GIu1lnaJsWSwbu0p6br3luvgA%3D%3D)**
---

While Maloney won by playing Washington political games, the Hudson Valley lost. And that’s why I am fighting so hard to win in 2022. **The Hudson Valley deserves a Congressman, not Nancy Pelosi's Campaign Chairman. THAT IS WHY I AM WINNING!**

As your Congressman, my priorities will be clear: **strong national security and secure borders, tax relief for families and seniors, and support for veterans and law enforcement.**

https://www.delinadisanto.com/ [https://www.delinadisanto.com/]In case you need another reason why David Schweikert needs to be removed from office, look no further than his ethics violation.
As a quick summary, Schweikert violated 11 ethics rules — ranging from misusing just under $300,000 in campaign funds as a personal tab, pressuring his taxpayer funded staff members to campaign for him, and dodged and lied to the committee during the investigation.
David Schweikert has consistently proven that he does not put Arizonans first, whether it be through his ethics violations or voting record. He has violated his oath, abused his power, and broken our trust. It’s time we remove him from office in November.
That’s why Delina is running for Congress in Arizona's first congressional district. She understands the growing distrust that Americans have in their politicians. Through a bipartisan, pragmatic approach, Delina will help find solutions to the problems facing working Arizonans.

Peter,

2022 is flying by - and there is still so much that needs to be accomplished.

I am back in Washington this week and I am thinking about how Congress cannot seem to get ANYTHING done.

Whether it is because of the gridlock Democrats have created in Congress or the sheer nature of politics, I cannot help but feel the American people are paying the price. So, I am coming to you today, Peter - [**would you weigh in on what issues YOU think the House should prioritize this year?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1984ef436e7d45a2a9fd54e4b0b99e04&_e=GyH0Wn1OvNZlcHfb2frN1vhIbJsPohSP58tBFxa5Np4UlyafFu645iVar5WAwfcnkkTEJjBd0Hp9MJtbUS2s4nUtTG-1MOv2oz-UMdsdHLb5R9cerJUZQAWo4FhFl0sP3DnCjAgYseFEUx_57cN7i2Abgty8EzdNZMm9QiHwlEP6MFwQH7VwcTbU5udOpX6g87YoC_Q7tzZlSbslrx3GtX_4O6F3xDS6Eq1R7B_zUfJNCpEYditTxCiLchtgisFy338PEZya8_M226wVZwzMbW_hJsB_X4IQsaAtWmI5W2AUDLVLa8rgbYLMOKbORfF3v-2iDlobMzHXf8WARig1Tb0qrRK7BFC6T4VlBA1UCw_EXVIyIQssMUra4PK5vvA-Bj0WHplWK1HrbLVVKHu0aoBx46T3TDYuMaJcUTojoSfWsSY9p-1eE6x7pDb1VkmKOP42wJUkCzB87Gn1gimQOjrKS02FcdEi764E0q9hvC5H8Nw1U15DCi3otcS2FTvOMu-s_l2yJP35KZXUp9AufEF6YZmEWa6FEdYUGLiSM4LxpD-CLo5LsDLkB_ZiHvgbrVH1U3q9cCfQQV2DSgOZtQ%3D%3D)

William Timmons

body:

| | |

Friend, I had to reach out to make sure you saw our last message.

I need to update Senator Hassan first thing tomorrow morning, and as things stand, I'll have to give her the news that donations have slowed considerably since we reached out yesterday.

Senator Hassan knows better than anyone how important it is that we have every last resource to reach every last voter — after all, she only won her last election by 1,017 votes.
