Things have only gotten worse | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSefEuosMlyzL6pkt-qavlTwDouOSkEFZkKR4UsD9OS8mujvC6JuDgdcwBEfNpEPuKYQVHq4uuSrPqJyzuvAv0xN3nA3VkRxXnQ1Ldh9jM-1z9igCk8Aesu9brr1IRYLQUAJwmkPs8ZAjgnEOZwokwskQAo9chRq1qnzB27I-qgPfivQHVEx1NhLmy7-HlEUWSNs9C9Ez0ysJ6MI7JGdJa4nNiO6wjpzpOG2fedj62wmSav13kRjYNnnWWyBMvU8gz8hilwPhokE8Oz46lZjF7GCw/3ji/-wdYjA5eSLWlq0cCDXlmOQ/h0/sdbDx1tAx5C5A_sBNzRY8lPc6F2UKn2sMqOxtZWEjb4)
Peter, A few months ago, we shared five reasons why Arizonans should fire Kyrsten Sinema: [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSF0s5b3LLLS_03xesGCxDjVf4IDn9rlDLBXNCtCTGGDEIrrKq7a422NuKYRNgn6utQI0h9zZhiLMogRXyeyMIaoMw_CVM3-i9NcXLhWxdfKoOiAIub_p9sJZXSULeYP7DlyoQKky8BSY3jnKcjKep-EFiQjDRv8l3jxEFFKPCQUdE-dyMXx_zVGJWLsauKtHwNCNRm4px4oy2qdvIc0Hkr1WOu7cVrRUPFYCr7qgunGnyt1On5a0ffXcNInWlQUpP9Qij5kuNzte4uiRixsIktzgdwh4IUbDR8VO9sycU25GKg5ypxfiOWogiw1ImO9vef3m-9_bOJSRelwd94gpJMA/3ji/-wdYjA5eSLWlq0cCDXlmOQ/h1/MwzwTl-sXEsq11iddUqeZHUyRWgGMkj2rZPGcQClprU) Now, nearly two months later — and countless opportunities to redeem herself and _actually_ represent Arizonans later — things have only gotten worse. The urgency to oust Kyrsten Sinema has only increased. In that spirit, we wanted to share five MORE reasons why Arizonans should fire Sinema:
1. In January, she doubled down against filibuster reform, effectively killing democracy-saving voting rights legislation in the Senate.
2. She lost endorsements from some of her closest allies — namely NARAL and EMILY’s List — due to her refusal to change the filibuster.
3. According to her FEC report for Q4 2021, she raked in over $1.5 million. GOP billionaires, Big Pharma, a private prisons company, and Rupert Murdochs’ Fox Corp. were some of her biggest supporters and donors.
4. Her approvals are higher amongst Arizona Republicans _than Democrats_. Enough said.
5. Despite the multiple calls to listen to constituents and stop obstructing the Biden agenda, she never listens or acts any different. She continues to ignore constituents, obstruct progress, and act on behalf of her donors.

These are simply five _more_ reasons — but there are so many more reasons why **Kyrsten Sinema is failing Arizonans and is unfit to be in the Senate.** So, we’re going to replace her with a real Democrat. But it’s going to take all of us doing our part, considering that Wall Street, Big Pharma, corporate PACs, and Republican billionaires are rewarding Sinema’s obstruction with millions of dollars in campaign contributions. **[If you believe Arizonans deserve better than Kyrsten Sinema, will you stand with us and pitch in a $5 contribution today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSF0s5b3LLLS_03xesGCxDjVf4IDn9rlDLBXNCtCTGGDGjMeXaK8oZKHMKtXp-RFIsQpQJo2EjprZ2A83X6khhu1lMXTqF3XjfZv74q9aGRbLInKyaiM98RFyMotoyHqLYEAPS1hlLOywFIhlcRZYT3Yr4veKjDopgpiS2ovMoBKOxnkpPFmzwkJ_vo1YjKx0JEPv6Zsb_dekcnnPAJMJt6UiOJphSug8VqBaLX2iikb11iOM3Lg2uENRX9j9LElnwoeMf0LDppjpJ5GkyCgrifwf0XMSnUbZFtY1zS-K5dzHQpM6JuK1B81hg3yVrGTsYxGO1garLCQilaasl7hCl_w/3ji/-wdYjA5eSLWlq0cCDXlmOQ/h2/8rlIYxMBFdhP7puNJ4w4pbwkTbIxS9C-8GXHaVtbhVI)**_Anything you can give, even a few bucks, helps make it possible for us to compete with Sinema’s mega-donors._ **[Contribute $5](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSF0s5b3LLLS_03xesGCxDjVf4IDn9rlDLBXNCtCTGGDFLpikUrJKXcsmoKdV3kVP-J3MB9NDRQCwIAxG13pT2IGzq6jzyol5709E1pirYQOWT_83yOr-Yi_3vVl0rzW8gEJWvmo1xUznPRzsoTB9P0aHPAryOaROW120RTvudhHTck0fkewCrPyFPuxX5hGTJA2m7Txsp7RTA64bVv96L2ZagAu0wxTyH6qKGDWl5dIvmqpy9OxdisSSC2URd1WoHP0tGw1ohc9Df6WmVSueMsHe5P1slj1BDDdpWtBggB7XxOUwVNmiWBPsOOyxHmBlpXCSNtAOVjNNtCP6K29wLdA/3ji/-wdYjA5eSLWlq0cCDXlmOQ/h3/kRjmRpZTHYtp4mFpvkFfyVunZtFYm9cmd5tmY1AzVoM)** Thank you, Primary Sinema Project

we’re asking if you can make a contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign for U.S. Senate in California.
#

Hi, we'll get right to the point — [**we’re asking if you can make a contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign for U.S. Senate in California.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-feb22?refcode=em220212-1-30&t=1&refcode2=640_159979_rXfO9t&akid=640%2E159979%2ErXfO9t)
We know Election Day seems far away right now, but November will be here before you know it, so we wanted to take a minute to explain a few of the reasons why your contribution, _especially today_ , is so important to our campaign.
**First:** The stakes in this race are very high. Democrats are operating on a 50-50 margin in the Senate, and losing Alex’s seat would mean the end of any chance at a progressive agenda making it through the Senate.
**Second:** We have a lot of ground to cover. There are almost 25 million registered voters in California, and we have to start now if we’re going to reach all of them.
**Third:** Our opposition is going to be very well-funded. We saw California republicans pump millions of dollars into the Recall attempt, and they’ll be coming after Alex next.
**We cannot afford to be caught off guard, so we have to ask:**
[**Can you please make a contribution to our campaign today? We’ll put your donation immediately to work organizing across California to hold this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-feb22?refcode=em220212-1-30&t=2&refcode2=640_159979_rXfO9t&akid=640%2E159979%2ErXfO9t)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Jewels Gray
subject: I am running for Colorado's Newest Congressional District
body:
I would like to introduce myself to you, I'm Jewels Gray...
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I20Fj0d3PoH65v4tlrIXvnG0Rl7mXP9mZaHaIwpfDIDrSMRKjWcWaYHzGDdLWPfC7bi_xqakaH0Bbaz8b-naX2bmnsc511mT9ZLuhdUPq3xXMJF_0hRrQQ7wVHwezdB_crpCRM_gXVhGj1V3lLE-IA==&c=9iqjNy8Xcy_VFo60G2F54-evOz6AKSTTEokVIH9X2wGOhDL5nSCrCw==&ch=awY6395xYd6pLVL6bj3WWxQ3Blbc6Wi4m_57kLdlW1bnRZslH_0zCw==)
---
---
| Fellow Patriot, My name is Jewels Gray and I wanted to reach out and introduce myself. I am running for Colorado's new 8th Congressional District. I am a Mom, a professional Photographer, a Businesswoman, and a Conservative America First Candidate. I was the first Candidate to announce in this district, and I decided to run because I knew that the 8th district needed true representation and not another Establishment GOP candidate that is a career politician.
I have always been a fighter and believe in:
* The Land of Opportunity & The American Dream
* Protecting our communities and our borders
* Energy independence and helping our farmers and ranchers
* School choice and medical freedom
* Support Small Business
* Defending the Constitution

I will always fight for the People of Colorado, not the lobbyists and special interests in Washington, DC. This district is going to need a strong conservative, and I am that Candidate! Once again, I am Jewels Gray, and I am running for Congress in Colorado's 8th Congressional District and I am asking for your support. Please consider supporting my campaign today by clicking the button below.
---

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Thank you for everything.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z13e9il54lj5as7ngrn46at0a3kmjdbubbck9gvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctg68ob4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65slhc5j69c5lcorb0t9hcjj3ec3gchib2olmemr68d5geuoe1phmemp66clkmtgefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3applmkrrcob66lib6oj7m2qmash5u)
From the bottom of my heart.

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztq6uvsv8spb13thtpj6v4lappjr4g4b3gcuag2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctg68ob4c5h2bs)
---

Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to say thank you for all that you’ve done to support me since I’ve taken office. It’s been the honor and privilege of a lifetime to serve the people of Louisiana and the people of the United States.

While in office, I’ve fought every single day to make life even just a little bit better for every single American, thanks to your continued support.

Because of strong supporters like you, I’m able to stand up to the Radical Left’s agenda and fight to stop my new Left-of-Lenin Socialist opponents. Thanks to your contributions, I’ve been able to fight to lower taxes, stand up to Communist China, protect the unborn, lower gas prices, and defend your rights and freedoms daily.

I’m only able to do this because of your support. So, if you can, please help me continue my fight to defend America today by using this secure link below to give anything you can to help my fight to defend America and hit my crucial Mid-Month goal.

I will not let you down. **You can write that down and take it home to mama.**

**[CLICK HERE FOR SECURE LINK: DONATE HERE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zprqfdcqrnk71epsvihout2tmrmulolhjd1odjag_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctg68ob4c5h2bs)**

Thank you for supporting me and allowing me to serve you.

God Bless America,

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z93pm0jdbt1tgnrs6c2lcff4lumdqqqjj3ee8j08_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctg68ob4c5h2bs)
Senator John Kennedy | Paid for by John Kennedy for Us

name: Giffords.org
subject: it’s been months—now it’s time for action
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
According to the ATF, “ghost guns” are one of the driving forces behind a recent spike in crime across the country.
#

Friends -
According to the ATF, “ghost guns” are one of the driving forces behind a recent spike in crime across the country.
They say that more than 1,000 ghost guns were seized in three major cities—Baltimore, Chicago, and NYC—alone last year.
What’s a ghost gun?
They are do-it-yourself firearms made from kits bought online. You can make them even if you can’t pass a background check, and because there are no serial numbers they can’t be tracked by law enforcement.
That’s one of the reasons the ATF believes criminals and gang members are increasingly using these guns. The agency is currently considering a rule to ban ghost guns. We drove thousands of comments to the ATF, but it’s been months—now it’s time for action.
This should be low-hanging fruit for the ATF. Who in their right mind thinks anyone in America should be able to MAKE a gun at home, even if they can’t pass a background check?
That’s why we’re asking:
[**Can you please sign our petition calling on the ATF to ban ghost guns in the United States of America? This is a commonsense solution to a growing problem.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/ghost_guns_petition_feb22?source=em220212-1-15&t=1&akid=1555%2E3935704%2EMSwlnQ)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/ghost_guns_petition_feb22?source=em220212-1-15&t=2&akid=1555%2E3935704%2EMSwlnQ)**
Thanks for adding your name here. Banning these DIY guns will save lives.
Team Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1555%2E3935704%2EMSwlnQ) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
AOC knows how important this election is | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQlgsG2vIuVirkYNn0JGTOr1NuUSOlwGUycU7dsRTolrRdMgAoT1JJJynP11SSeiF05lknQj-2KmOKv4wSwwzXpEULGUw0N2BiKxYWqCO8ywDsNlG1D22Xkh4N4GbuWN8yHC2PymrtjtSrztrKAozIDroMy6S77zK3xNtK8u0LGTmhAPiqSIV3GP7_BS7S1yix1thOBHRQPovCT9Nh-Cg_MDm0saTyMYkgQ0-lsJgUo8gMFEIg3c_LSvA5kd31PtEJQ/3ji/S7_Y2mKrRHS7EqhzaYbHdA/h0/VlkD0A9wI7CIbtIx2U-jAGIoKoVSASaVnOMFdAx6e-g) Peter,

There are just two days until early voting begins and seventeen days until the primary, **we need to raise as much as possible right now** to expand our outreach efforts and fight back against Cuellar’s attacks on our campaign. AOC knows how important this election is — **so, she is holding a rally with Jessica Cisneros and Greg Casar today to get out the vote today!** Peter, even with Henry Cuellar under FBI investigation, this race could be extremely close but we need to let every voter in TX-28 know about his corruption. That’s why we need to raise as much as we can between now and the start of early voting. [_**Please, donate right now to help us reach our $15,000 mid-month goal.**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCzUJ5G9EnLHV1dg6Ze5at2UeRt97m-BlQ95f-dcY0y5NcrzVmrE9D8r1OajwSMalkQceFJ8u81d76k1NT_bmzqJvN6xBrpQarlIdvJdSj6Ags6-7ZUoZ9V43hSFWsL-ihppfmZ5ICWKbJfcvxh5x4L6k2gKM2TWOht0fCbL3zy-eNMISEYYj6RcH_GBJvs88SWse31gN0jlayVyX7olLmWn9wRwoQMpOUwQ4KoyGss3o25ISpRkPxabUb1vhdiqdpLpWO3t5raZR594I7FwsaTlzdbjDEaDCv-QxLb19Z1sE/3ji/S7_Y2mKrRHS7EqhzaYbHdA/h1/GlzojMgDT-6MZdp9MFZi4hT4jtC6qJJFy-y2vD7UtMM) [Donate now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCzUJ5G9EnLHV1dg6Ze5at2UeRt97m-BlQ95f-dcY0y5Ms4FGkXfOXiub1ChVZPfRbPfCk2x-x86HEiE8hNyi1kKDD0ba6539AsABtf2LI7LBvKuvlAfTZu77ZzDGPGtPcBULfD-WHeisqEpgKB22CWPFByMhIdc-leergkmmWxjgblNtddwj24YuxIjILc0OdCX_BEaSW9ndxgM7QC1uKeyeisV9hcoA1DpiINU-wB6S7OrqVLTlT7Wy2c6x-IRAUEWmNS8r0pM4sIFVgNwwbgEO0pRaz6ZDUpG21fWfuRsc/3ji/S7_Y2mKrRHS7EqhzaYbHdA/h2/3onBg6Xkjd0KAZDIB66dg4orU5oq1Z6-61iRYlymqbM) Henry Cuellar only cares about working for special interests who bankroll his campaign through corporate PAC contributions. He’s backed by the NRA, Big Oil, the Koch network, the private prison industry, and corporate PACs. In a race like ours, every dollar makes a huge difference. In 2020, we lost to Cuellar by just 2,746 votes. Early voting begins on Monday and we have to make sure that we have the resources to reach as many voters as possible. [_**If you’re able, please make a contribution of $5 or more now to help defeat Henry Cuellar on March 1st.**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCzUJ5G9EnLHV1dg6Ze5at2UeRt97m-BlQ95f-dcY0y5MsGN7gQCvZlIyNUmxY5D2CgBwPkAY0G53xntpMHJE1Mr5nmfemixSqG1eLPAM9WDMkGJfKSgyWJKPCRGWNeKrLEe5WjNlWKMIjzi6_Z5M32QMrd7ikuyXGyx1lQG-U1SErJdL5pK9pyLIRpWBMxZCjq_VO8FAiH6Zbh1Mwx4WCvjf338wz6jh1AlGI8-OZavWGhjoewxybu-Dw0kmCc-3sDwKs_4_as2Eat1Xl8JfFNLjdZ9E4jRJZFuJrs3mGwp8/3ji/S7_Y2mKrRHS7EqhzaYbHdA/h3/MY_9xpoMvqvvndmunM9yxEP9NlyRQtzbhql2iVEEoSg) [Donate now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCzUJ5G9EnLHV1dg6Ze5at2UeRt97m-BlQ95f-dcY0y5OFNMW8jDaNmRt7g204pU7Fy4JtyMoX-dQfEKSheHMvG63PAHzTFk5E5DFA7Vy2lgkC6tt9bsqwD2lqwQrawKD1QOreehIpPnTOMrd56OA5UZ9FjoPtThkm2PVF58e8HYJnYX2za3lAJPumjTWFL-cGy8sO8Mi1NN4hq6BD2MB70_T9y9BUnSlqF2-ucll53Rjezld7CiQt25oGyLBrnB4Wk1mtsvn4OAYrii1V5Jj4izA8249ERCq55-qHHKnqpWw/3ji/S7_Y2mKrRHS7EqhzaYbHdA/h4/_L4bXn8_vXPQ6PdKNWux8gjNSUZzCfAp9ZZOQZhf6tY) Let’s do this, Team Cisneros

clean_body: AOC knows how important this election is | | | Peter, There are just two days until early voting begins and seventeen days until the primary, we need to raise as much as possible right now to expand our outreach efforts and fight back against Cuellar’s attacks on our campaign. AOC knows how important this election is — so, she is holding a rally with Jessica Cisneros and Greg Casar today to get out the vote today! Peter, even with Henry Cuellar under FBI investigation, this race could be extremely close but we need to let every voter in TX-28 know about his corruption. That’s why we need to raise as much as we can between now and the start of early voting. Henry Cuellar only cares about working for special interests who bankroll his campaign through corporate PAC contributions. He’s backed by the NRA, Big Oil, the Koch network, the private prison industry, and corporate PACs. In a race like ours, every dollar makes a huge difference. In 2020, we lost to Cuellar by just 2,746 votes. Early voting begins on Monday and we have to make sure that we have the resources to reach as many voters as possible. Let’s do this, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Byron Donalds
subject: EXTENDED DEADLINE: Your Membership has LAPSED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The deadline to renew your membership is coming up FAST.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3hh3x--fgxr-4qqlpo9&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | **EXTENDED DEADLINE: RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP**

---
| | | _**MEMBERSHIP STATUS: LAPSED
DEADLINE: February 7th, 2022**_
---
| | | | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hh3x-1y0aj-4qqlpo6/ "RENEW NOW")
---

This is URGENT. Your 2022 Membership has **LAPSED**.

The deadline to renew has passed, but I spoke with House Leadership, and because they were so disappointed to not see your name, **they have decided to extend the deadline till February 7th just for _you_! **

We need you to step IMMEDIATELY and Renew your Membership to stand with House Republicans against the Radical Left.
---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hh3x-1y0ak-4qqlpo7/ "RENEW NOW")
---
Through renewing your membership you bring House Republicans one step closer to winning back the majority in 2022 and Firing Nancy Pelosi once and for all. **[Can I count on you to renew your membership and help us take back the House before midnight?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hh3x-1y0al-4qqlpo8/ "Can I count on you to renew your membership and help us take back the House before midnight?")**

Every day, House Republicans stand up for America and show Pelosi and the Radical Left what real Americans like you truly value: **STRONG** conservative policies – not unconstitutional mandates, Twitter bans, COVID lockdowns, and open borders.

By renewing your membership, we are one step closer to implementing conservative policies and getting rid of Nancy Pelosi once and for all. **[You must act fast to stand with House Republicans.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hh3x-1y0am-4qqlpo9/ "You must act fast to stand with House Republicans.")**
---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hh3x-1y0an-4qqlpo0/ "RENEW NOW")
---
Thank you,

Byron Donalds
(R-FL19)
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hh3x-1y0ao-4qqlpo1/ "Byron Donalds")
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hh3x-1y0ap-4qqlpo2/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hh3x-1y0aq-4qqlpo3/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hh3x-1y0ar-4qqlpo4/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

In just a few short weeks, our race for Texas’ brand-new congressional seat will decide the fate of the House majority. Falling short is simply not an option.

clean_body: Pelosi is not giving up her majority without a fight. | Friend, have you seen the latest redistricting numbers... Cook Political Report just announced that Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats will ultimately have a 2-3 seat advantage with redrawn congressional maps. Pelosi’s majority is hanging on by just 5 seats , but the Left’s gerrymandering across the country has given her the lifeline she so desperately needed ahead of the FIRST election of 2022. In just a few short weeks, our race for Texas’ brand-new congressional seat will decide the fate of the House majority. Falling short is simply not an option. As an Apache helicopter pilot and U.S. Army Captain, I was trained to always fight until the bitter end and I REFUSE to ever give up. While Pelosi’s gerrymandered advantage may mean 2022 is about to be our greatest fight yet, I have no doubt that with your support, we will END her majority. I will never forget the outpouring of support that this campaign has received from grassroots patriots all across the country over the last 7 months. name: John Fetterman
subject: Your $1 could help guarantee a Democratic Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I need your help, and it literally just takes $1.
#
Derek, I need your help.
As you probably know, there’s a bunch of candidates trying to buy PA’s open Senate seat. Guys like Dr. Oz, who spent half a mil on TV ads in a single day. Or David McCormick, who’s flooding the airwaves and touting his Trump connections.
That’s just not how we do things. I need your help right now to prove to everybody that this race isn’t up for sale. So today, I have one low-lift but incredibly important ask for you:
**[Will you chip in just $1 to our campaign today, Derek? Based on the number of people who usually read my emails, if half of the people who read this chip in a single buck, we’d raise enough to fund our field organizing until March.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43995?refcode=ema20220212-4567&t=1&akid=4567%2E434096%2ELiFMyQ)**
Talking to voters directly across the Commonwealth...funded by a wave of grassroots donations of just $1...I can’t think of anything more different than what our opponents and their super PACs are doing. Or more powerful.
**[Donate $1](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43995?refcode=em20220212-4567&t=2&akid=4567%2E434096%2ELiFMyQ)**
Your $1 matters, Derek.
It matters because — unfortunately — the amount of money you raise for a campaign more often than not has a big impact on whether or not you can win. So we can’t afford to just ignore the tens of millions of dollars being spent against us.
But we *can* afford to raise money + fight back the _right_ way — earning support from enough folks that small donations add up to a BIG people-powered campaign for U.S. Senate.
We’ve already done amazing things together, Derek. We have more grassroots donors than any candidate in the race. We’ve got one of the highest rates of small-dollar donations of any Democratic Senate challenger in the country. Our average gift has stayed under $30, and our donors come from all 67 PA counties and 50% of U.S. zip codes.
So today, I want to take it one step further. **[Will you join thousands of fellow supporters and chip in just $1 right now to demonstrate our power in numbers?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43995?refcode=ema20220212-4567&t=3&akid=4567%2E434096%2ELiFMyQ)** Because I’d rather put in the work to raise tens of thousands of $1 donations than ever take a cent from a corporate PAC.
**[Donate $1](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43995?refcode=em20220212-4567&t=4&akid=4567%2E434096%2ELiFMyQ)**
I get emotional thinking about how many of you are putting skin in the game to win this race. I will never forget that when we make it to the Senate. I’ll never forget that the grassroots put me there.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220212-4567-footer&t=5&refcode2=4567_434096_LiFMyQ&akid=4567%2E434096%2ELiFMyQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=4567%2E434096%2ELiFMyQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=4567%2E434096%2ELiFMyQ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

I get emotional thinking about how many of you are putting skin in the game to win this race. I will never forget that when we make it to the Senate. I’ll never forget that the grassroots put me there. John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Dan Farough
subject: Another attack on our elections
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

Recently, we learned that an unauthorized individual may have gained access to a vote tabulation machine in Roscommon County. This is illegal and directly aligns with so many of the attempts to access tabulators following the 2020 election to overturn the legitimate outcome and nullify the will of American citizens.

For example, in December of 2020 a third party accessed Dominion vote machines in Antrim County and used the data to falsely claim voter fraud. And we know that Trump’s lawyer, Rudy Giuliani, pressured a Michigan prosecutor to seize our voting machines. Finally, we also know that the Trump administration drafted an executive order to allow the Department of Defense to seize voting machines in swing states around the country.
The Department of Defense. Seizing our voting machines. Read that again.

No Michigander should have to worry about their vote being seized by an outside political force (and it goes without saying that the military seizing our voting machines under orders from political extremists fits into that category.) This goes against everything we’re working on together for our democracy.

Here’s what Jocelyn’s doing about it – and how she’s working to prevent it from happening in future elections:

Jocelyn referred the Roscommon matter to Attorney General Dana Nessel for further investigation.
She sent a letter to all of Michigan’s election clerks - appointed, Democratic and Republican - thanking them for their effort to protect election security, and providing guidance on how to deal with unauthorized individuals who attempt to gain access to election equipment.
And she continues to share information with federal authorities to ensure there is accountability for those who coordinated all these attempts across the country to undermine our democracy.

Make no mistake, we need Jocelyn Benson. We need her continued leadership on this issue and others that are sure to come, friend, or attacks like this will continue to plague our elections for years to come. Donate to Jocelyn’s re-election campaign so she can continue protecting our elections. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=021222]

Donate>> secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=021222

| | | Friend, As someone who’s lived the American Dream, I know we can’t let Washington politicians like Joe Biden and Maggie Hassan take it away for good. **_We are a strong nation, but we need strong leaders that will fight to keep the American Dream alive!_** By following the model that we set in the State Senate - where we balanced budgets, cut taxes, and led the nation in economic freedom - New Hampshire can finally be put on the path to long-term prosperity. **Will you join me and make sure D.C. doesn’t hold us back from achieving this goal?**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friend, As someone who’s lived the American Dream, I know we can’t let Washington politicians like Joe Biden and Maggie Hassan take it away for good. We are a strong nation, but we need strong leaders that will fight to keep the American Dream alive! By following the model that we set in the State Senate - where we balanced budgets, cut taxes, and led the nation in economic freedom - New Hampshire can finally be put on the path to long-term prosperity. Will you join me and make sure D.C. doesn’t hold us back from achieving this goal? | | | | | | | | | | If our state’s federal delegation is more focused on carrying out the will of Joe Biden than the will of everyday Granite Staters, then New Hampshire is going to continue to be held back from achieving our full potential. I’m running for the U.S. Senate to fix that -I’ll be the workhorse that fights for the priorities of the 603! name: Mia McLeod
subject: Re: medical marijuana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia for South Carolina
body:
The State Senate passed a medical marijuana bill. | | | Friend — Earlier this week, the State Senate passed a medical marijuana bill that will now head to the State House for a vote. After years of hard work and perseverance, this is a significant first step toward catching up our state to the 21st century and allowing people the opportunity to pursue alternative pain management through medical marijuana. **As your Governor, I’d be a strong supporter of expanding access to medical marijuana along with legalizing and decriminalizing cannabis use altogether.** This is both a public health and a criminal justice issue, and I’m not afraid to take a stand — even up against the same, tired arguments vocal opponents have been using for decades. **[Now, all I need is you to join me in supporting my campaign for Governor so that I can move South Carolina forward. Will you chip in and help me make a difference for ALL South Carolinians?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6pJAb5hrkufJ9bVGTSyzWW9tx3PihHlnZ7xH4IUvUZh51W0wF3tKrEaHVqFEw_MuAZEgQD0dJUEmjp2cy4PorJv-s8P-yPRv5PkCJ1OodkLcWzkTxYxeJvkUY_-Yk68gMv1gmHFAV7qyeRnWOVXxI4QE8xTvyAJMvITaAQmrQVh6xjLvi-INMtvkKz4wcHjaCkRUrRXGAvya86veTwGZMV3hEQm2rKBz_QjxfHmVNqxS6FeVC7FQmD2Gt5lm7LtSIXxpqNqkwdAAIJKcDjL3W2qpRAjVX2WTm74V7Eii1gHKfbCVgm5mRjFXcVzZTDYxvHab5PwU1H5nLvMG0CRQIsTA6tLBAZGczdHzIzL7P0DA/3ji/s1Sk1DeBRjijC_VFRACKfw/h0/4tzVPSGZ5ZRYeomfEVYIoEUpX0dYAxqClYyf82AW398)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [donate: $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6pJAb5hrkufJ9bVGTSyzWW9tx3PihHlnZ7xH4IUvUZh51W0wF3tKrEaHVqFEw_MuAYHeUFD6TBbUmHFjG7WB87S7OnCwATjwIm6WXAbUrjpjO65XxpeevBaTdbUuzgf3GF1tyX5NQXmk6RzZHzoO8QDCl7okbfXXSPfRaiwpgRH96Fd_xPX2_5KduNR7i5hLEtPDDHrwkmE-ntDYIhd4g8bsTCWcm5-llYE3imZdXHGI_xQav6xE4GH44ir63MpaN4G6JMH9HJa8pyWqM7thSiKbhs6pC6jeXV8omKSGjmkyOTLkDgHVqkHR--O1cQ7U0wX1uezFQGxvGPrWhsn-ZJHi1knGOGMKQZoRyFa_4LN1Ajbmb7CnTXJf1906JRDep/3ji/s1Sk1DeBRjijC_VFRACKfw/h1/LZCvQ1bgGJLrgheUdKqD-GNCgPiqICWQ5Zh-M3SHQNE)

As your Governor, I’d be a strong supporter of expanding access to medical marijuana along with legalizing and decriminalizing cannabis use altogether. This is both a public health and a criminal justice issue, and I’m not afraid to take a stand — even up against the same, tired arguments vocal opponents have been using for decades. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Each week we get more and more excited as we make great strides toward election day. We have a quick question for you: Would you consider forwarding Friend, Each week we get more and more excited as we make great strides toward election day. We have a quick question for you: Would you consider forwarding this email on to FIVE of your friends and family members to ensure that THEY have joined Team Schmidt? [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=a46363f04a7e4c54b64b8c0c73c14773&_e=VCB68CJ4UDZimXcAWJ5xaFujznj9jI7bvtT2yfBvZzkSHJUI5T3kIioxOtpNDnamhyLOjVD-wq6z_8nCnkufL9aAOIxSNobEc3kWIuxAU0Bl2QfcLQKS7SQzxS-ihNsZJt4IDiIP4r5ttvXd4TdIkwMGcFd1ZWwyWFkTKfj2abN7JxQWg872fvJR6k85rEmfBpdFHfXkWqThctkZaQHwOv5bcR6vEUkxO9qtPs1oduz53DGhGd5CApep_IYutzxoKOCjjvV59HKUBEgtcgYqv4I9XZEiR0MJxW0MOu2lXCRbCTY0gfXWsRNO-BSc4wLO_S7cwFV76tioMXmIXaovPsxc9_3G8FmimUxbEkhiP5VYnHNNBdw7VO-1HKhRT96zzqiSZW4yF1_KPGz5NoDRx-4_5NYZlbexI0Lu82JF92UXDgNWe-OVfbdFp-LUaUQVo9jiaJdJ0TJmQIgbqF4LiTtBMcO7PhBh2iGJP3x8Ziv17QmUoVMFXWrPgqtSNngI) Check out our recent endorsements below: _“I was excited to hear about Derek’s willingness to take on this new challenge. I’ve had the privilege of spending some time with him and I have always appreciated his passion for Kansans, his willingness to have the tough conversations, and his heart for our most vulnerable. He has my full support in the race for governor, and my hope is that we as a community will give him the support that is needed during this pivotal time.”_ **_– Adam Laroche - Former MLB Player, Founder - E3 Ranch Foundation_** _“Derek Schmidt has both supported and advocated for Kansas law enforcement for many years. He’s been a steadfast partner for the men and women in blue, always working to keep our families and communities safe as our attorney general. He will make an excellent governor, and he has my full support.”_ **_– Gary Steed - Former Executive Director of the Kansas Commission on Peace Officers’ Standards and Training (CPOST) and Former Sedgwick County Sheriff_** _“As a former Kansas State Senator, representing parts of Wyandotte and Leavenworth counties, I had the honor of serving with Derek Schmidt when he represented Southeast Kansas in the Legislature. I got to know him well while we served together on the Judiciary Committee, and got to see up close how much he cares about making our state a better place. Derek was very helpful in moving important legislation forward that benefited both his constituents and my district, and he was quickly elected Majority Leader by his colleagues. Derek is a very intelligent person with a pleasant demeanor, great knowledge of the legislative process in a leadership capacity, and knows how to get the job done. He will make a great governor and he has my support.” _ **_– Mark Gilstrap - Former State Senator_** You are a vital part of this team, friend, and we are abundantly grateful for your continued support. Thanks, Team Schmidt | |
---
PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC.,
KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER.

subject: the shortest month of the year…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
February is almost halfway over!

|
---
February only has 28 days. That means we only have 28 days to hit our fundraising goal this month. Unfortunately that also means we're already approaching our mid-month deadline. **[We only have two days left until we’re halfway through the month. Can you chip in before our deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41727558/330077318/1455862206?refcode=dpva-em-220212-midmonth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWU2MjQyNi01NDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FwowNjOBoiEPeamyoa4Scg5cuip2QbfvswMGtkSLAL0=)** **Because you’re one of our strongest supporters, we wanted to give you a peek behind the curtain — we still need to raise $17,000 this month to hit our goal.** Our goal isn’t just an arbitrary number. In December when we set our budget for the upcoming year, this goal was set to help us acquire enough funds to focus on year-round organizing in every corner of the commonwealth. **And here’s the hard truth — if we don’t pick up the pace by our mid-month deadline in 2 days, we’re going to have to re-evaluate some of our plans for our new organizing program.** **[Can you rush a contribution to help us get back on track to hit our goal this month and continue to build out our year-round organizing program?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41727559/330077319/1455862206?refcode=dpva-em-220212-midmonth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWU2MjQyNi01NDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FwowNjOBoiEPeamyoa4Scg5cuip2QbfvswMGtkSLAL0=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| | _**BREAKING: Former Illinois Supreme Court Justice and Chicago Bear Bob Thomas Endorsed Jerry Evans for Congress**_

Jerry Evans

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: 🚨🚨 ENDORSED by Elise Stefanik🚨🚨
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jacobs4congress.com/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-6171738?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| Did you see the news?

[Elise Stefanik endorsed our campaign for NY-24](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=19ea5fe8ad&e=13f35c4add). Elise and I have worked together for two years in Congress.
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| We’ve taken on the unconstitutional SAFE Act. We’ve fought vaccine mandates and lockdowns. And we’ve worked to secure our southern border and make our streets safer.

Elise knows I am the conservative leader the 24th district needs – don’t just take my word for it:

_“I am proud to endorse my colleague and friend, Chris Jacobs for New York’s 24th Congressional District. Since taking office, Chris has been a strong fighter for conservative values and our Constitutional rights. He stood up for New Yorkers against the unconstitutional SAFE Act and held the line against vaccine mandates and lockdowns. He’s fought reckless spending, failed Far-Left Socialist policies, and to secure our southern border. I have seen his efficacy and dedication firsthand through our work together. I know that he will fight on behalf of the people for the 24th District,” - [**Congresswoman Elise Stefanik**](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=ea33b2b8ce&e=13f35c4add)_

**There’s a red wave coming this year, and when we take back the House in November America will have a strong, conservative majority in place to hold the line against this administration, their reckless spending, and their socialist policies. **

[_**> >> As our campaign heats up, we need to make sure we have every resource available, this new district is large, can you rush $5, $10, or $20 now? <<<**_](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=52cec19daa&e=13f35c4add)
---
|
---
| [RUSH $5](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=7b9bb209c0&e=13f35c4add "RUSH $5")
---
| [RUSH $10](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=64f7af9b98&e=13f35c4add "RUSH $10")
---
| [RUSH $20](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=9a9a87f1e4&e=13f35c4add "RUSH $20")
---
|
---
| This campaign is already heating up – Nancy Pelosi knows her time is coming to an end as Speaker, lets fire her and send Biden a clear message his agenda is WRONG for America.
Best,
Chris Jacobs
---
| |
---
|

**JACOBS FOR CONGRESS**
P.O. Box 387
CLARENCE, NY 14031

subject: Biden's free crack pipes
body:
Here’s what you missed this week
| |
---
| | The Biden Administration came under fire this week after announcing a new plan to distribute “safe smoking kits” to underserved communities. Obviously, this plan was met with serious backlash and criticism over _**federal funds being used to buy “crack pipes.”**_

Yesterday, the Trafalgar Group, a leading political polling company, released the highly anticipated results for the Pennsylvania GOP Primary. As we all expected, Lou Barletta is leading the field! Thank you, Team Barletta | | | | If you prefer to contribute by check, please mail a check to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 =

name: Petition Alert (via House GOP)
subject: Stand with truckers against mandates >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
100,000 Patriots needed by tonight!
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3hhkp--fgxr-4qqlpo7&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Hi Fellow Conservative,

Right now, truckers are leading the charge to finally put an end to the coercive and overbearing COVID mandates the Left loves so much.

With everyday citizens by their sides, the truckers are demonstrating through their resistance just how much power grassroots patriots can have when they join together and stand up to elite control.

And here’s the thing, we are closer than ever to defeating the Radical Left’s anti-freedom COVID regime, but we MUST make our voice heard, loudly, clearly, and all together.

**[Sign the official petition to show your support for the truckers and join our virtual convoy for freedom>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hhkp-1y0hn-4qqlpo5/ "Sign the official petition to show your support for the truckers and join our virtual convoy for freedom >>>")**

---
| | | **STAND WITH TRUCKERS PETITION**
---
| | **Sign now if you support the truckers fighting for freedom!

Patriot ID: [000i146](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hhkp-1y0ho-4qqlpo6/ "000i146")
PATRIOTS NEEDED: 100,000
**
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hhkp-1y0hp-4qqlpo7/ "Generic Button")
---

With COVID mandates on life-support, this may be our best chance to end these unconstitutional orders. But if we fail to show just how much support our side has, we risk losing to the Left and their radical COVID agenda.
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hhkp-1y0hq-4qqlpo8/ "Generic Button")
---
**[So show your support right now and help us send a signal that the American people are DONE with the COVID craziness>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hhkp-1y0hr-4qqlpo9/ "So show your support right now and help us send a signal that the American people are DONE with the COVID craziness >>>")**

For Freedom,

House Republicans
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hhkp-1y0hs-4qqlpo0/ "Generic Button")
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hhkp-1y0ht-4qqlpo1/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hhkp-1y0hu-4qqlpo2/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hhkp-1y0hv-4qqlpo3/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: Brett Guillory for Texas
subject: Disrupting the System
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Guillory for Texas
body:
NEWSMAX Features Brett Guillory
| | | | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VgM-VsLnHxyk5WffvGhX87G-e157HChETsngntsnLw1nsl3jIhhXHYyGjMTJ50z4G9dQBz2NcZ7EdWYoRgm2S6LV8p7BQTIdzAL18nCqXWg40mYEHFGtBrIzv0t35Z6p1yfzWixJ434sXkXoHBu_RULEggv8jNJdyAgTVyDFNDU=&c=4D46jFg292edgHnVJdxSf88qz4L8n46-NCerX26NWFRos0JrQ4aXjw==&ch=lZuFE6ew7aKe3EgvIQx0-EBve3dODb3bNcokIAlRU8rYRGiJF6sUaw==)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Neighbor,
It's an honor to be mentioned in the NEWSMAX article: [Disruptors Needed: Elect Anti-Establishment Anti-Institutionalists](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VgM-VsLnHxyk5WffvGhX87G-e157HChETsngntsnLw1nsl3jIhhXHaUKoSe8pwFEE3dfZ_kPZmBZGD_orEMpIwBVVe4ZbWJuK5YMxR4qdzccw8Jo4_W3otw52erOoeYeqszGMYcoQ0MnXtIMTsqrLgnuGqu-lo9k2Lu37GEUlKujpXGvQ5D_3cLxSD68AdQR1WU3iKoTYTEC7IQAXUOQjpSDf_s5ckV0b-aT_IRQHIkf5PiXUU79kQ==&c=4D46jFg292edgHnVJdxSf88qz4L8n46-NCerX26NWFRos0JrQ4aXjw==&ch=lZuFE6ew7aKe3EgvIQx0-EBve3dODb3bNcokIAlRU8rYRGiJF6sUaw==), and recognized as a disruptor to the Establishment and the political system.
Disruptors go on offense. They challenge the status quo. They don't ask permission. They don't wait their turn to be elected. And, they sure don't back down.
Am I a disruptor? You bet I am. So much so, that other candidates are attacking me and pressuring my endorsements and my supporters.
But, will I back down? Absolutely not.
I'm in this race because we need representation that is strong enough to stand up to both the Establishment and the Left. We need representation that will go on the offensive, rather than play defense as so many of our leaders and members of the old guard, Republican party have historically done.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VgM-VsLnHxyk5WffvGhX87G-e157HChETsngntsnLw1nsl3jIhhXHaUKoSe8pwFEE3dfZ_kPZmBZGD_orEMpIwBVVe4ZbWJuK5YMxR4qdzccw8Jo4_W3otw52erOoeYeqszGMYcoQ0MnXtIMTsqrLgnuGqu-lo9k2Lu37GEUlKujpXGvQ5D_3cLxSD68AdQR1WU3iKoTYTEC7IQAXUOQjpSDf_s5ckV0b-aT_IRQHIkf5PiXUU79kQ==&c=4D46jFg292edgHnVJdxSf88qz4L8n46-NCerX26NWFRos0JrQ4aXjw==&ch=lZuFE6ew7aKe3EgvIQx0-EBve3dODb3bNcokIAlRU8rYRGiJF6sUaw==)
---
I am that candidate.
I am here to represent you, my neighbors and friends, because I care.
Make your voice heard when early voting starts on Monday.
Vote for someone who will go on offense on your behalf.
Vote for a disruptor.
Vote Brett Guillory.

---
---
| | [Support Brett](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VgM-VsLnHxyk5WffvGhX87G-e157HChETsngntsnLw1nsl3jIhhXHdfv-Pvh-jPHpnUnNDF2IxDl4w46pQRYsOlxl9s-ytxUGKUpsHvBGMzpMrw0_xJwxcGtvvebDLSulozZJHV1K1dS8xAkYBN0EaH9TRbzCORU6V56PDnzGzmbfnLZRgJoylqvxqnnQ9Y9WE6oZsaZew-4PLGrFqbvYQ==&c=4D46jFg292edgHnVJdxSf88qz4L8n46-NCerX26NWFRos0JrQ4aXjw==&ch=lZuFE6ew7aKe3EgvIQx0-EBve3dODb3bNcokIAlRU8rYRGiJF6sUaw==)

clean_body: NEWSMAX Features Brett Guillory | | | | | | == | | | | | Dear Neighbor, It's an honor to be mentioned in the NEWSMAX article: ==, and recognized as a disruptor to the Establishment and the political system. Disruptors go on offense. They challenge the status quo. They don't ask permission. They don't wait their turn to be elected. And, they sure don't back down. Am I a disruptor? You bet I am. So much so, that other candidates are attacking me and pressuring my endorsements and my supporters. But, will I back down? Absolutely not. I'm in this race because we need representation that is strong enough to stand up to both the Establishment and the Left. We need representation that will go on the offensive, rather than play defense as so many of our leaders and members of the old guard, Republican party have historically done. == I am that candidate. I am here to represent you, my neighbors and friends, because I care. Make your voice heard when early voting starts on Monday. Vote for someone who will go on offense on your behalf. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
In the last three months of 2021, our opponent raised $9.8 million from 130,000 individual donors from all 50 states. In the last three months of 2021, our opponent raised $9.8 million from 130,000 individual donors from all 50 states.. |
---
Peter,

If you look at the screenshot below from a recent Democrat Senatorial Campaign Committee email, _you'd think that our opponent was in dire need of cash and help from the National Democrat Party._

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=73ba57fa1c0c431b98d08ab69ff6da6e&_e=aOCQIfPzquS9WoA3GZgIHGHa-oYSAN585w2-vdl5iUPn0mp8qFfywROp4dyKCc_7Ch-jPZF10ezyLxN61G54zu6AUTfP6RPePUj4BPzHY89QgPRvwGVG1fIwaAqhysIs_nyhbqkwQXqXBK17JvBR4_cvfrWMINLsEm1QRQd7ZRZ0o-47q1HHi_R0-qQX48Rc8abBe7lQZZwICcVpF3YVf5aPDMWEZXGLG-by_9PifORAjGqBT7qK7Dt6iJZHIFjIeAqASTj8WOXlaI0duleSopG_tvL5RsvBDppUe84fcBKjSb1DJYotnb1RCZ7Ko4mRArQMD29utgmZncdHMrpfoZg3VrcL2VJyw3batAJvmq_310KssA2AOl6VeP20jZH5f4-ESOtljqXcyWe-4efGwzhf1--o_-9OY8DvXvO-Yf38sU4je7ihD1zZ0CrzEkrzhdhTtUDFENx35VUvinY7ZFo3yObx2KkrEssV0qtokXU%3D)
Recent polling in Georgia indeed gives our campaign a slight lead (within the margin of error), but our Democrat opponent doesn't need more campaign cash.

In the last three months of 2021, **our opponent raised $9.8 million from 130,000 individual donors. As it stands, he has $23 million in the bank for our Senate race this November.**

While our campaign also had significant fundraising support last quarter, the fact remains that our opponent started raising money months before we even entered the race. With his early start, he now has millions more in the bank than us. We've got to pick up the pace if we're going to catch up because "to keep the Senate blue," Democrats must win Georgia.

**[With that in mind, would you kindly send $4.50 to our campaign today?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=73ba57fa1c0c431b98d08ab69ff6da6e&_e=aOCQIfPzquS9WoA3GZgIHGHa-oYSAN585w2-vdl5iUPn0mp8qFfywROp4dyKCc_7Ch-jPZF10ezyLxN61G54zu6AUTfP6RPePUj4BPzHY89QgPRvwGVG1fIwaAqhysIs_nyhbqkwQXqXBK17JvBR4_cvfrWMINLsEm1QRQd7ZRZ0o-47q1HHi_R0-qQX48Rc8abBe7lQZZwICcVpF3YVf5aPDMWEZXGLG-by_9PifORAjGqBT7qK7Dt6iJZHIFjIeAqASTj8WOXlaI0duleSojJ2kG_6xIeUXnYVuiy2aqXkI3OqEMMAOBeb1c8UvWlrxyIhMT9zrkSbdRN9OAFHAGoE-sQPtlnmYJn_CVYwtcVncBFRL_TE3eVIPIvEg-YHWwwG6RLC_AxSVlBIu_JqwSgWTYwiyTpEoD-7OyyQcw9aWQEkXlXyY4B8Cjw05bIHGGE_sP0cUNfWWXHXgNLSHPD4rRnfxqAK71a6BrL0tb0%3D)**

Our race in Georgia is going to be the most competitive contest in the nation this fall, so we can't afford to be outspent for a single moment.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=73ba57fa1c0c431b98d08ab69ff6da6e&_e=aOCQIfPzquS9WoA3GZgIHGHa-oYSAN585w2-vdl5iUPn0mp8qFfywROp4dyKCc_7Ch-jPZF10ezyLxN61G54zu6AUTfP6RPePUj4BPzHY89QgPRvwGVG1fIwaAqhysIs_nyhbqkwQXqXBK17JvBR4_cvfrWMINLsEm1QRQd7ZRZ0o-47q1HHi_R0-qQX48Rc8abBe7lQZZwICcVpF3YVf5aPDMWEZXGLG-by_9PifORAjGqBT7qK7Dt6iJZHIFjIeAqASTj8WOXlaI0duleSokhsQ2L9d_-N7YHp2ZUmZ1tkUZLPqNsWK7LiaWhBIqkJevg3ScUWQffZklrzZpToGTWE604pUAeu4_DbBQD1c5gASNHK2GmxLiHTo1KeMVAmxZKcK3A_Rxp--kdCM0r6GUenpyub3Y24wYt6ZzLvPPAhfcZRNz0q-i-GGQqpSnpp_79EjErQ-uBbBdWkRxY5rFU7ID8oMj5Wl8jowIQx8hk%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for Senate

P.S. This week our Democrat opponent launched his first advertising barrage of the campaign. clean_body: In the last three months of 2021, our opponent raised $9.8 million from 130,000 individual donors from all 50 states. In the last three months of 2021, our opponent raised $9.8 million from 130,000 individual donors from all 50 states.. | Peter, If you look at the screenshot below from a recent Democrat Senatorial Campaign Committee email, you'd think that our opponent was in dire need of cash and help from the National Democrat Party. Recent polling in Georgia indeed gives our campaign a slight lead (within the margin of error), but our Democrat opponent doesn't need more campaign cash. In the last three months of 2021, our opponent raised $9.8 million from 130,000 individual donors. As it stands, he has $23 million in the bank for our Senate race this November. While our campaign also had significant fundraising support last quarter, the fact remains that our opponent started raising money months before we even entered the race. With his early start, he now has millions more in the bank than us. We've got to pick up the pace if we're going to catch up because "to keep the Senate blue," Democrats must win Georgia. Our race in Georgia is going to be the most competitive contest in the nation this fall, so we can't afford to be outspent for a single moment. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate P.S. This week our Democrat opponent launched his first advertising barrage of the campaign. He's clearly concerned about his re-election if he's advertising 269 days before the election, but we need to match his efforts. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Fellow American,

At midnight, our campaign has an important fundraising deadline. Let me explain why it is so important we hit our fundraising goal:

1. I am running for Governor of Texas against a well-funded incumbent opponent. To overcome these advantages, my campaign is counting on the grassroots conservatives, like yourself, to make up the difference and build the momentum we need to win.
2. The Biden administration has opened our borders - allowing tens of thousands of illegals to pour into Texas. We must TAKE BACK control of our border.

[**Fellow American, as you can see, everything is on the line this election and I need your support. The Biden administration has opened our borders - allowing tens of thousands of illegals to pour into Texas. We must TAKE BACK control of our border. Fellow American, the Biden administration is abusing its power to impose their radical and harmful agenda onto Texas, and Our Governor is allowing it to unfold on his watch. subject: I can't extend this offer to everyone.

body:
| |
---
| | |
It's Dan Crenshaw. I'm reaching out to let you know that your current 2022 Membership status is listed as _EXPIRED_.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59536963:JxVVvnEyN:m:1:3253819041:7A94DDDEB2803236C97741C6F39EB85B:r "RENEW NOW")
---

Let me tell you why renewing your 2022 Membership is so important:
1. Beating Nancy Pelosi's House Democrats is going to be impossible without YOU on our side.
2. This is the most important election of our lifetimes - it will truly decide whether or not America chooses the failed socialism of the Left or the freedom and prosperity of conservatism.
3. Your 2022 Membership is _essential_ to showing Pelosi that our grassroots donors are more powerful than her evil dark money cronies.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59536963:JxVVvnEyN:m:1:3253819041:7A94DDDEB2803236C97741C6F39EB85B:r)
---

Because we have yet to hear from you, your membership lapsed.**But I have good news: we have extended our deadline until midnight on February 12th.**

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59536963:JxVVvnEyN:m:1:3253819041:7A94DDDEB2803236C97741C6F39EB85B:r "RENEW NOW")
---

I can only extend this offer to you for a limited time - but it's critical you renew your 2022 Membership before the deadline. If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball.

**[Please, I'm humbly asking: renew today >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59536963:JxVVvnEyN:m:1:3253819041:7A94DDDEB2803236C97741C6F39EB85B:r "Please,
Peter. I'm humbly asking: renew today >>>")**

Sincerely,

Dan Crenshaw

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59536963:JxVVvnEyN:m:1:3253819041:7A94DDDEB2803236C97741C6F39EB85B:r "RENEW NOW")
---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59536964:JxVVvnEyN:m:1:3253819041:7A94DDDEB2803236C97741C6F39EB85B:r "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59536964:JxVVvnEyN:m:1:3253819041:7A94DDDEB2803236C97741C6F39EB85B:r "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

subject: Peter, have you seen my new ads?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arballo For Congress P
body:
Here’s why this moment is so critical:

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41728471/330081237/145944154?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzQ0ZTA2NC01YzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=84CQR7NXJahWjzTJBhhKW00pD2gLVOTX-0lfzgVAGLE=)
---
Peter, earlier this week, my team released our first ads of the Election Year!

Running these ads is a critical part of a winning campaign. **While my team and I are working hard to go door‐to‐door with my progressive message, these ads will ensure that we can reach every last California voter.**

[**That’s why it’s crucial to keep these ads up, Peter! Turning this open seat, battleground district blue will be a tough fight — so I need you to help me win against MAGA Republicans with a $3 donation today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41728472/330081238/982711125?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20220212_EMDF_E1_T1_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzQ0ZTA2NC01YzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=84CQR7NXJahWjzTJBhhKW00pD2gLVOTX-0lfzgVAGLE=) | [$25,000 MID-MONTH GOAL TO FUND OUR PROVEN‐EFFECTIVE ADS: RUSH $3 NOW TO ELECT PHIL ARBALLO »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41728473/330081239/982711125?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20220212_EMDF_E1_T1_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzQ0ZTA2NC01YzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=84CQR7NXJahWjzTJBhhKW00pD2gLVOTX-0lfzgVAGLE=)
---
Unlike California Republicans like my former opponent Devin Nunes, I never use fear tactics to win.

I’m proud of our grassroots, 100% people-powered campaign. **I’m running for Central Valley working families like mine — _and yours._**

These ads represent what working families desperately deserve in Congress: _Someone who stands by them and fights for what’s right._

As you read this, Republicans are swarming at the chance to flip this wide‐open seat _RED_. If we lose, our House Majority — _and the folks fighting for working families around the country_ — will be overrun by the MAGA Party.

[**The stakes are sky-high, Peter, and I refuse to fold to Devin Nunes clones in this race. name: Cora Neumann
subject: a “full-scale attack on Teddy Roosevelt’s legacy.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
In Montana, defending public lands transcends party politics. It's important to our native communities, conservation leaders, ranchers, and hunters alike. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41723798/330056218/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzA0YmU2NS0zMzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WT0fKiFQyYCwW4sg0JkgMMbBNHci33aEoH3kEoP-jmM=) Friend,

I was raised with a close connection to Montana lands. Growing up, my family spent all of our free time outdoors -- camping, hiking, rafting, and fishing. Our neighbors readily shared access to their lands, and we all cared for them collectively.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41723799/330056219/655314317?refcode=em-2.12.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzA0YmU2NS0zMzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WT0fKiFQyYCwW4sg0JkgMMbBNHci33aEoH3kEoP-jmM=)
_Horseback riding with my mom and grandpa. (My brother pictured)_
**But right now, our public lands are in trouble. That’s because Ryan Zinke -- the Republican frontrunner in the race for MT-01 -- has a track record for opening up public lands for fossil fuel exploitation.**

**[Public lands are one of Montana’s most precious resources, and we can’t risk them being sold to the highest bidder. If protecting public lands matters to you, will you contribute $3 to help my campaign to fight for their protection?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41723800/330056220/655314317?refcode=em-2.12.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzA0YmU2NS0zMzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WT0fKiFQyYCwW4sg0JkgMMbBNHci33aEoH3kEoP-jmM=)**
| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41723801/330056221/655314317?refcode=em-2.12.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzA0YmU2NS0zMzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WT0fKiFQyYCwW4sg0JkgMMbBNHci33aEoH3kEoP-jmM=)**
---

The Natural Resources Defense Council (NDRC) described Ryan Zinke’s tenure at the Department of the Interior as a **“a full-scale attack on Teddy Roosevelt’s legacy.”** He ripped apart environmental safeguards and gave the green light for energy and mining companies to exploit public lands for personal profits.

In Montana, defending public lands transcends party politics. It's important to our native communities, conservation leaders, ranchers, and hunters alike. We deserve a representative who will defend our lands -- not exploit them for political and personal gain. That's why I'm running for Congress, but I can't win this race without support from grassroots donors like you:

**We are noticing a downtick in donations over the past two weeks, and we’re a bit concerned we may miss our end-of-month fundraising goal.[If you haven’t donated recently, please take a moment to chip in a donation of $3 today. Your support will go a long way in making sure we elect a public lands advocate in Montana.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41723802/330056222/655314317?refcode=em-2.12.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzA0YmU2NS0zMzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WT0fKiFQyYCwW4sg0JkgMMbBNHci33aEoH3kEoP-jmM=)**

clean_body: In Montana, defending public lands transcends party politics. It's important to our native communities, conservation leaders, ranchers, and hunters alike. | = Friend, I was raised with a close connection to Montana lands. Growing up, my family spent all of our free time outdoors -- camping, hiking, rafting, and fishing. Our neighbors readily shared access to their lands, and we all cared for them collectively. = Horseback riding with my mom and grandpa. (My brother pictured) But right now, our public lands are in trouble. That’s because Ryan Zinke -- the Republican frontrunner in the race for MT-01 -- has a track record for opening up public lands for fossil fuel exploitation. = | = The Natural Resources Defense Council (NDRC) described Ryan Zinke’s tenure at the Department of the Interior as a “a full-scale attack on Teddy Roosevelt’s legacy.” He ripped apart environmental safeguards and gave the green light for energy and mining companies to exploit public lands for personal profits. In Montana, defending public lands transcends party politics. It's important to our native communities, conservation leaders, ranchers, and hunters alike. We deserve a representative who will defend our lands -- not exploit them for political and personal gain. That's why I'm running for Congress, but I can't win this race without support from grassroots donors like you: We are noticing a downtick in donations over the past two weeks, and we’re a bit concerned we may miss our end-of-month fundraising goal.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you so much, Cora Paid for by Cora for Montana Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website Consider supporting Cora's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Cora for Montana PO Box 428 Bozeman, MT 59771 United States

body:
We've set an emergency goal to raise $50,000 in online grassroots donations before midnight tonight to close the gap.
#
In a moment, we're going to ask you for [your first donation before midnight tonight to help elect Beto as Texas' next Governor.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52858?refcode=ema20220212-175925&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=175925%2E444211%2EbgGTyo)
Here's why this is so important: Usually we have 30-31 days to hit our monthly fundraising goals, but this month _we only have 28 days_. That means every single email we send needs to bring in more donations than an average December or January email did.
As of 10:30AM CT this morning, we're officially running short of what we need to raise in February to fund next month's budget. **Our projections show that if we continue at this pace, we'll fall 15% short of our monthly fundraising goal.**
Falling short would mean delaying critical investments in our organizing program, so we've set an emergency goal to raise **$50,000** in online grassroots donations before midnight tonight to close the gap. [Will you chip in $3 or more to help hit this make-or-break goal and power our campaign to defeat Greg Abbott?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52858?refcode=ema20220212-175925&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=175925%2E444211%2EbgGTyo)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52858?refcode=ema20220212-175925&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=175925%2E444211%2EbgGTyo)**
Our next mandatory filing deadline is coming up quickly on February 19, and reporters are already starting to reach out to ask if we're going to be outraised by Abbott and his corporate mega-donors again.
All eyes are on this campaign to see if we have what it takes to flip Texas. We can't let something as trivial as a 28-day month keep us from hitting our goals and having the campaign infrastructure we need to take on Greg Abbott.
The work to elect Beto as Texas' next Governor starts with hitting tonight's $50,000 emergency goal. [Please, will you contribute $3, or any amount that is meaningful to you, today to help us get back on track to hit our February fundraising goal, report huge numbers to the Texas Ethics Commission, and defeat Abbott once and for all?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52858?refcode=ema20220212-175925&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=175925%2E444211%2EbgGTyo)
Thank you. Together, we'll achieve the big, bold things we want for Texas.
— Beto for Texas

---
_But the unfortunate truth is that we’re not doing enough to reach the younger generations._
---
They’re fed a constant stream of lies from schools and the media, and they’re not old enough to remember the Cold War and the horrors of Soviet Russia.
---
_Sadly, they’re also largely unaware of the suffering that is taking place in socialist countries like Cuba and Venezuela today._
---
We have to take a stand against Leftist indoctrination and start winning the battle for the hearts and minds of America’s youth. _Our future depends on it._
---

clean_body: I’m opening another front in the battle against socialism ... | Peter, I was appalled to see that nearly half of millennials now favor socialism over free market capitalism. The Left has used our education system and the liberal media to dupe an entire generation of Americans into supporting socialism – and we have to start fighting back. That’s why I’m launching my Freedom Force Fund so we can teach Americans the benefits of free markets and individual liberty, and I need your help to fill its coffers so we can get to work right away. I was one of the founding members of the Freedom Force last year, and I’ve been leading the charge against socialism since the day I took office. But the unfortunate truth is that we’re not doing enough to reach the younger generations. They’re fed a constant stream of lies from schools and the media, and they’re not old enough to remember the Cold War and the horrors of Soviet Russia. Sadly, they’re also largely unaware of the suffering that is taking place in socialist countries like Cuba and Venezuela today. We have to take a stand against Leftist indoctrination and start winning the battle for the hearts and minds of America’s youth. Our future depends on it. Thank you, María Elvira Salazar Florida’s 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

Hi team -- I want you to know that I reviewed this community's past survey responses and was extremely impressed.

**That's why, after careful consideration and multiple conversations with our Senior Leadership Team, I'm inviting you to join the DSCC's exclusive Majority Strategy Group.**

The handful of folks in this group provide critical input to our Senior Leadership Team and are helping us finalize the Democratic Party's official strategy to defend and expand our Senate majority.

We were _only_ able to flip the Senate because of the strategic decisions you helped us make leading up to the 2020 elections. And I'm 100% confident your input will help us win again.

**[So please, click this link to accept my personal invitation right away.](https://go.dscc.org/go/5995?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220212-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220212-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=2945%2E9716520%2EYqEcMg)**

_*To maintain the integrity of our data, we ask that you please do not share your link with non-members._

I'm excited to have you on the team!

Christie
DSCC Executive Director

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Universal Vaccine Mandate Proposed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Fanatics at Our Capitol](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqs_ktxjlKWW8G6-p4Gv6hXS2uH_Dqh6CYi_JPZMJvyNA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_12_final&n=1) A new Assembly bill would make all California employers force their workers to get vaccinated. The fanatics at our Capitol need to give it a rest. This latest affront joins SB 871, which mandates the vaccine for kindergarten and up, and SB 866, which removes parent consent. I'll fight these bills every way I can. In LA, the Sheriff is declining to fire 4,000 deputies over their medical decisions. So now the Board of Supervisors is removing his authority over personnel. I’m introducing legislation to protect this authority for sheriffs and other elected officers. In my county, the Roseville High School District just [unanimously voted](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=T5He9HRd2mnp6QN0SYKMHEGgI-Mi0Nowc5mws1asme-cGpsTB9w5tuCOD6oZ19KF4zxG2ktasSWR9Ffl9_qCDwMLh0p5BkBlchWPrDNAP1_XJfQs9aZ5UTZz2Qt6Z4Gy&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_12_final&n=2) to make masks optional for students starting Tuesday. Statewide, 150 school board members have signed [the letter](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooCxEhKFjHHFgmfD9FR-hfqHsaXR7E9x1Z-P5vyla7nIIdfFqbiIkiOwHj3fkDzK78&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_12_final&n=3) opposing mandates that I gave to legislators. While our vote to end the emergency didn’t pass, it served its purpose: widespread media coverage highlighted the absurdity of it all. And Newsom's inflammatory attack on me and James Gallagher backfired. We responded in an official statement: “ _The Governor’s statement that ending the emergency is equivalent to letting ‘Californians die’ is the same fear mongering we have come to expect from him. If we can host the Super Bowl with 70,000 fans we are no longer in a State of Emergency._ ” [Support my efforts to fight for sanity](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_12_final&n=4) [Share this Post on Social Media](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAx1Cqi_68__EuhBT7-O_FLZiP1gonJ1MAHH6I_ZNgfdFw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_12_final&n=5) Kevin Kiley
CA Legislator & Candidate for Congress p.s. You can now [sign up](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopxPoBRQDrGXLWlj-S3ZWCA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_12_final&n=6) to get a yard sign, volunteer, or attend a campaign event.
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_12_final&n=7).

name: DEVASTATING NEW POLL (via DCCC)
subject: Trump’s return BACKFIRES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you SUPPORT or OPPOSE Donald Trump as Speaker of the House?
| | _**DEVASTATING NEW POLL:
Trump among leading candidates to become next House Speaker**_

| We're sick to our stomachs.

**A brand-new poll just revealed that Donald Trump is one of the leading candidates to become the next Speaker of the House._EXCUSE US?!_**

After Trump pushed our democracy to its breaking point, we can NEVER trust him with power again.

But with his Republicans nationwide SURGING in the polls to destroy our House Majority, we need to know where Americans everywhere stand.

**THEN:** DeJoy started cutting USPS hours and facilities – delaying the delivery of Medicare prescriptions, Social Security benefits and mail-in ballots.
**NOW:****DeJoy is at it again, this time enacting plans that reduce post office hours, increase prices and MASSIVELY slow down deliveries.**

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: Abortion is Healthcare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Add your name: abortion is healthcare. Let’s tell the Senate we need to protect reproductive freedom.
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=103%2E61531%2EvG7xbZ)
Hello,
It’s been almost 50 years since the landmark decision in Roe v. Wade, declaring abortion a right protected by the Constitution. Today, we’re seeing unprecedented assaults on this ruling by Republicans in states across the country.
That’s why it’s so important we keep control of the Senate and elect a progressive like Peter — someone who has been steadfast in his effort to protect the constitutional right to an abortion. Peter was an original co-sponsor of the Women’s Health Protection Act, which would codify Roe v. Wade into law, protecting reproductive freedoms across the country. It passed the House.
But now, it’s held up in the Senate. Mitch McConnell and his Republican Senate colleagues have fought to prevent it from even getting a vote. We need to have our voices heard, and loudly.
[**Let’s send a message to lawmakers in Washington — it’s time to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-protect-right-abortion?source=em_20220212_p_p_abortion&t=3&akid=103%2E61531%2EvG7xbZ)
In states like Texas, Florida, Oklahoma and too many others, Republican lawmakers have passed – and continue to introduce – anti-abortion legislation restricting reproductive rights. With the Senate split 50-50 and a conservative Supreme Court, we cannot afford to lose a single seat. There is too much on the line to let Republicans take back the Senate.
For Peter, this fight is about guaranteeing reproductive healthcare for people everywhere, no matter where you live, no matter what. That’s why taking immediate action is so critical — we don’t have any time to waste.
[**If you’re ready to fight alongside Peter to protect reproductive rights across Vermont the country, add your name now. Let’s tell the Senate to do what’s right.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-protect-right-abortion?source=em_20220212_p_p_abortion&t=4&akid=103%2E61531%2EvG7xbZ)
Thank you for taking action,
Team Welch

clean_body: Add your name: abortion is healthcare. Let’s tell the Senate we need to protect reproductive freedom. Hello, It’s been almost 50 years since the landmark decision in Roe v. Wade, declaring abortion a right protected by the Constitution. Today, we’re seeing unprecedented assaults on this ruling by Republicans in states across the country. That’s why it’s so important we keep control of the Senate and elect a progressive like Peter — someone who has been steadfast in his effort to protect the constitutional right to an abortion. Peter was an original co-sponsor of the Women’s Health Protection Act, which would codify Roe v. Wade into law, protecting reproductive freedoms across the country. It passed the House. But now, it’s held up in the Senate. Mitch McConnell and his Republican Senate colleagues have fought to prevent it from even getting a vote. We need to have our voices heard, and loudly. In states like Texas, Florida, Oklahoma and too many others, Republican lawmakers have passed – and continue to introduce – anti-abortion legislation restricting reproductive rights. With the Senate split 50-50 and a conservative Supreme Court, we cannot afford to lose a single seat. There is too much on the line to let Republicans take back the Senate. For Peter, this fight is about guaranteeing reproductive healthcare for people everywhere, no matter where you live, no matter what. That’s why taking immediate action is so critical — we don’t have any time to waste. Thank you for taking action, Team Welch | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT Welch for Vermont P.O Box 909 Richmond, VT 05477
