# Roger Stone set to attend Monmouth GOP convention

Republicans will award congressional lines in the 3rd, 4th and 6th districtsBy [David Wildstein](https://crispiforcongress.mikecrispi.com/r/a46cd325739dcf848ede78fad?ct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YToyOntpOjA7czoxNDoiY2FtcGFpZ24uZXZlbnQiO2k6MTtpOjY2O31zOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjE1O3M6NDoic3RhdCI7czoyMjoiNjIwODBlODVkNGViZDg3OTc1NzMxMiI7czo0OiJsZWFkIjtzOjY6IjExMzE5MyI7czo3OiJjaGFubmVsIjthOjE6e3M6NToiZW1haWwiO2k6MTU7fX0%3D&), February 11 2022 9:45 am
Roger Stone is headed to New Jersey today to attend a Mike Crispi for Congress fundraiser this evening and will attend the Monmouth County Republican convention on Saturday.Crispi, a conservative podcaster, is challenging 21-term Rep. Christopher Smith (R-Hamilton) in the Republican primary in New Jersey’s 4th district.
“Armageddon, baby,” said Stone, who is a paid consultant to the Crispi campaign. “Top to bottom primary. The Whitmans, Frelinghuysens, Lances and other dilettante elitists who want to take the GOP back to the country club. I ache for their humiliation.”
Smith won the unanimous endorsement of the Ocean County GOP screening committee on Thursday.
The convention will be Smith vs. Crispi. Four other candidates – Englishtown Councilman Daniel Francisco, attorney David Burg, retired police officer Michael Blasi and perennial purported candidate Tricia Flanagan, did not file petitions to participate in the convention process. As is her custom, Flanagan is late filing campaign finance reports with the Federal Election Commission. She had not yet filed her fourth quarter 2021 report that was due on January 31.
Monmouth County Republicans will also award organization lines in two other House districts.

In the 3rd district, which now includes parts of western Monmouth, businessman Bob Healey, Jr. will seek the organization line for his bid to unseat Rep. Andy Kim (D-Moorestown). Healey faces a significant primary challenge from Ian Smith, the Atilis gym owner who made national news opposing Gov. Phil Murphy’s mask mandates and business closures in 2020.

Monmouth County Commissioner Sue Kiley, who wants to take on 18-term Rep. Frank Pallone, Jr. (D-Long Branch) in the 6th district, faces a challenge at the convention from former U.S. Food and Drug Administration official Rik Mehta, the GOP U.S. Senate candidate against Cory Booker two years ago, and former Republican National Committee staffer Thomas Toomey.

Read the original article here: [https://newjerseyglobe.com/congress/roger-stone-set-to-attend-monmouth-gop-convention/
](https://crispiforcongress.mikecrispi.com/r/89c4b08e9f04f3c4cd90833e3?ct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YToyOntpOjA7czoxNDoiY2FtcGFpZ24uZXZlbnQiO2k6MTtpOjY2O31zOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjE1O3M6NDoic3RhdCI7czoyMjoiNjIwODBlODVkNGViZDg3OTc1NzMxMiI7czo0OiJsZWFkIjtzOjY6IjExMzE5MyI7czo3OiJjaGFubmVsIjthOjE6e3M6NToiZW1haWwiO2k6MTU7fX0%3D&)

The Whitmans, Frelinghuysens, Lances and other dilettante elitists who want to take the GOP back to the country club. I ache for their humiliation.” Smith won the unanimous endorsement of the Ocean County GOP screening committee on Thursday. The convention will be Smith vs. Crispi. Four other candidates – Englishtown Councilman Daniel Francisco, attorney David Burg, retired police officer Michael Blasi and perennial purported candidate Tricia Flanagan, did not file petitions to participate in the convention process. As is her custom, Flanagan is late filing campaign finance reports with the Federal Election Commission. She had not yet filed her fourth quarter 2021 report that was due on January 31. Monmouth County Republicans will also award organization lines in two other House districts. In the 3rd district, which now includes parts of western Monmouth, businessman Bob Healey, Jr. will seek the organization line for his bid to unseat Rep. Andy Kim (D-Moorestown). Healey faces a significant primary challenge from Ian Smith, the Atilis gym owner who made national news opposing Gov. Phil Murphy’s mask mandates and business closures in 2020. Monmouth County Commissioner Sue Kiley, who wants to take on 18-term Rep. Frank Pallone, Jr. (D-Long Branch) in the 6th district, faces a challenge at the convention from former U.S. Food and Drug Administration official Rik Mehta, the GOP U.S. Senate candidate against Cory Booker two years ago, and former Republican National Committee staffer Thomas Toomey. Read the original article here: & | | | | | Election Integrity | | | American Values | | | Economic Growth | | | & | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY CRISPI FOR CONGRESS. Crispi for Congress 1385 Hwy 35, #215 Middletown, NJ 07748 If you do not wish to receive this email unsubscribe here. | | |

name: John Cranley
subject: I’ve had it with this blatant corruption, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee
body:
| It’s about time we put an end to this, once and for all. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41725361/330065464/817536172?amount=25&refcode=ea.a06c495c-3e8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.a06c495c-3e8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDZjNDk1Yy0zZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xd0q7icSgPVKkfE8Fv8gIxMjNB-s4vCL33jiQyHsKHg=) Your vote should count the same as any other, friend. At least, that’s how our democracy is supposed to work — one person, one vote, where each of us has an equal say. **But partisan gerrymandering tactics, like the kind the Ohio GOP has used in our state’s redistricting process, ensure that some votes count more than others.** Now, the Ohio Supreme Court ruled — for a second time — that the state GOP’s proposed redistricting maps are an unconstitutional gerrymander. Their decision is further evidence that party bosses in Columbus are desperate to keep their corrupt grip on our state politics. I want to be clear about this, friend: **It’s time we fixed our democracy and put an end to the corruption in Columbus, once and for all.** **[Ohioans deserve better than corrupt, one-party GOP rule, and our state needs a comeback more than ever. If you're with me in the fight for Ohio's future, chip in whatever you can John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: | It’s about time we put an end to this, once and for all. = Your vote should count the same as any other, friend. At least, that’s how our democracy is supposed to work — one person, one vote, where each of us has an equal say. But partisan gerrymandering tactics, like the kind the Ohio GOP has used in our state’s redistricting process, ensure that some votes count more than others. Now, the Ohio Supreme Court ruled — for a second time — that the state GOP’s proposed redistricting maps are an unconstitutional gerrymander. Their decision is further evidence that party bosses in Columbus are desperate to keep their corrupt grip on our state politics. I want to be clear about this, friend: It’s time we fixed our democracy and put an end to the corruption in Columbus, once and for all. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks for standing with me — together, we can fix our democracy and get Ohio back on track. John Cranley = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = =_ Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee CRANLEY FEDOR FOR OHIO COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

name: Andy Kim
subject: When I tuck my kids in at night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41725861/330068904/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2U2ODIyOC00MDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=elYc-xognDFaur6EV3p2RAY8cICV9U6atPNiKtxd29A=&emci=1ce68228-408c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=23e68228-408c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Every parent knows that one of the hardest things about the job is talking through tough topics with our kids. When I'm tucking my boys in at night, or when we're eating dinner together, and they ask me about my work, I owe it to them to be honest and thoughtful, to talk through difficult subjects. It's how my wife and I model for them political discourse. **Legitimate political discourse, to me, is grounded in mutual respect.** That's true with my kids, that's true with my friends, my neighbors, and that's true with my constituents. We don't always agree on everything, so we find compassionate ways to bridge disagreements and work together towards a shared better future. **What's _not_ legitimate political discourse?** A violent riot, an insurrection, an attempt to overturn an election, and overthrow a democracy. **The recent assertion by the Republican National Committee that what happened on January 6 was "legitimate political discourse" is dangerous.** In the days that followed January 6, we all asked each other: how can we make sure this doesn't happen again? How, as a country, can we heal, move forward, and be better caretakers of our country and our democracy? Democracy, after all, is about working together to solve problems, even when we disagree. It is not goaded violence aimed at overturning a peaceful, free, and fair election. Americans deserve public servants that engage in rigorous debate about the most important issues of our time. Leaders that value other perspectives and strive to do right by those who elected them to lead. We owe it to ourselves to be as kind and understanding to one another as we are to our children. That is legitimate political discourse.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Haneefah?=
subject: On the Status of Ms. Haneefah Khaaliq in the Indiana U.S. Senate Race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement

>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq
# Dear Hoosiers,
As part of my promise to remain open and transparent with you both now as a candidate and hopefully someday as your senator, I want to take this moment to share with you information on the status of my candidacy in the Indiana U.S. Senate race.

First, I want to thank each of you who signed my petition or became a petition carrier overnight to get my name listed on the primary ballot. Who knew it could be so difficult just to have one's name listed? As a newcomer to the political space, I can assure you it was ten times as hard. From June '21 through February '22, you know how hard we worked on this challenging task. In the middle of a pandemic...through a hot summer...bitter cold...we traveled statewide to get your handwritten signatures delivered to their destination. At times, we risked our lives and some of us even got sick.

When I asked you to print, sign, certify, and overnight your petition to the campaign, you overwhelmingly responded to this very complex call to action. They said you wouldn't bother, but hundreds of you did. For that, I will forever be grateful. Although we're confident we made the mark...our place on the primary ballot is under attack by an individual from my very own home district...from the town where I earned my law degree.
My signatures along with every other candidate running for the U.S. Senate in Indiana are being challenged, except for Senator Todd Young's. Once again, Mr. Young is safe!

The rest of the candidates will have to appear before the Indiana Elections Division next Friday, February 18, 2022, at 1:30 p.m. EST to plead our cause as to why we should remain on the ballot. In accordance with the Indiana Open Door Law, this hearing is open to the public. The notice of a hearing has been posted. The hearing will take place at the Indiana Government Center, South located in Conference Rooms A and B at 402 W. Washington Street Indianapolis, IN 46204.

Hoosiers, the fight isn't over yet! I'm asking for all your well wishes, positive vibes, and good energy. Wish us well! Visit [haneefahkhaaliq.org](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=7629359b62&e=a49cb82bb3) for more information.

Sincerely,
Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq.
Indiana Candidate for U.S. Senate
2022

### _What Do I Need Now? _
* Check your voter's registration right by clicking [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=a3452a377b&e=a49cb82bb3). You must be a registered voter in order to support me in any election. Then, set a goal to ask nine (9) other people this week if they are registered to vote in Indiana. We can't afford to wait until the last minute. **Have questions? Email hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com or call or text 317-999-5592 right now! **
* Check out and share my [social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=9498b3a99c&e=a49cb82bb3) posts and [donate](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=b7def4e025&e=a49cb82bb3) your first $25 to this grassroots campaign now!

---
Because this isn’t about me. Sure, I think I have good ideas that I'm confident will improve our country. But at the end of the day, my campaign is about returning power to YOU.
---
It’s about giving you a voice. It’s about actually listening and responding to your concerns. And it’s about following your lead to get our country back on track.
---
_But that’s all meaningless if I don’t have the support of you and your fellow Americans._
---
I’m humble enough to know that I can’t win this thing by myself. Let’s win it together, Peter.

clean_body: Join us today! | Peter, My campaign is officially launching its 2022 membership program, and you’re one of the first patriots I’m reaching out to. I’m counting on you to step up and join our team as we fight to win this all-important battleground congressional seat. 2022 Membership Participant: Peter Willis Membership Status: Pending When I have my hand on the bible as I’m being sworn in as a member of Congress, I’m going to be thinking about each and every one of our members who helped me get there. Because this isn’t about me. Sure, I think I have good ideas that I'm confident will improve our country. But at the end of the day, my campaign is about returning power to YOU. It’s about giving you a voice. It’s about actually listening and responding to your concerns. And it’s about following your lead to get our country back on track. But that’s all meaningless if I don’t have the support of you and your fellow Americans. I’m humble enough to know that I can’t win this thing by myself. Let’s win it together, Peter. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

name: Morgan Harper
subject: We have to abolish the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
A quick reminder while our rights are on the line
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220212-656-footer-ak&t=2&akid=656%2E90090%2E2h5LPw)
Have you seen this?
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25301?t=3&akid=656%2E90090%2E2h5LPw)
It’s more clear now than ever before that the Senate is broken.
If elected to the Senate, I’ll fight to end the filibuster immediately, and I will be the 51st vote for Build Back Better, universal healthcare, confirming judges, canceling student debt, and other bold solutions that we need right now. **[Can you chip in to our campaign to help me get there?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25301?t=4&akid=656%2E90090%2E2h5LPw)**
**Last month, the Senate failed to pass critical voting rights legislation.** 52 Senators joined together to protect the archaic and racist filibuster rule, which requires a supermajority to end debate – effectively killing the bill.
Supporters of the filibuster say that it fosters debate in the “world’s greatest deliberative body,” but a new study shows that’s not even true. MSNBC reports, _“Historical data shows that the filibuster largely has no effect on debate — and to the extent that it does, it appears to dampen it rather than invigorate it.”_
A quick reminder: **There are no Black women in the Senate.** And the 48 senators who stood together to try to protect voting rights represent 34 million more people than the 52 who stood opposed. The Senate simply isn’t doing what it’s supposed to do — represent the people.
**[We can change that by electing an unbought, principled progressive to represent Ohio instead of yet another self-serving, moderate politician. If you’re with me, rush a contribution of any amount right now to help fuel our campaign.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25301?t=5&akid=656%2E90090%2E2h5LPw)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25307?refcode=em20220212-656&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=656%2E90090%2E2h5LPw)**
We know how high these stakes are, and we can’t risk another Senator Manchin or Senator Sinema when our civil rights are on the line. **You can be certain that I’ll be a YES on getting rid of the Jim Crow filibuster rule to protect our right to vote.**
That’s why I’m running — and thank you for being on our team.
Together,
Morgan
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25301?t=25&akid=656%2E90090%2E2h5LPw)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220212-656-footer&t=26&refcode2=656_90090_2h5LPw&akid=656%2E90090%2E2h5LPw)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=656%2E90090%2E2h5LPw)

body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=f492ca3f9d&e=9920087750)
---
| Peter,

In our campaign for Congress I am humbled to be endorsed by so many strong conservatives. **Today, I'm excited to announce endorsements from conservative friends and partners in the City of Plano: Councilman Rick Grady, Councilman Anthony Ricciardelli, and Councilman Shelby Williams.**
---
| [ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=9149299acc&e=9920087750)
---
| | _"I have worked with Congressman Van Taylor since the days before he was elected to the Texas State Senate. He is a man of conviction and high moral character. He is solutions-focused and determined to get things done. If you want to be proud of this nation’s accomplishments, you want Van Taylor."
\- Plano City Councilman Rick Grady

"In addition to his service to our country as a Marine, Van has served his constituents with character and integrity at every level. From state representative, to state senator, and now as congressman, Van has always illustrated what it truly means to be a public servant, fighting for the causes that keep Texas and the United States a beacon of freedom and prosperity. As a legislator, Van demonstrates a clear dedication to preserving, defending, and promoting our conservative values, and for this reason, has A lifetime ratings from organizations like Heritage Action, National Right to Life, and the National Rifle Association. I’m proud to endorse Van in his upcoming re-election."
\- Plano City Councilman Anthony Ricciardelli

"I believe in our nation with all my heart, and I’d fight to the death to save the principles of liberty and self-governance on which we were founded. Those principles are under threat both from external geo-political enemies, and internal ideological enemies. I trust Van to foster working relationships while still holding true to the conservative values for which we sent him to Congress."
\- Plano City Councilman Shelby Williams_
I am humbled by their support and I would be honored to have your vote.

Semper fi,
Congressman Van Taylor

---

subject: URGENT: Trump holding massive fundraiser to defeat me!

body:
Donald Trump is raising mountains of cash from Mar-a-Lago
#

Friends: I just got word that Donald Trump is about to personally host a HUGE fundraiser for my GOP opponent at Mar-a-Lago!
I’m Donald Trump’s TOP target because I was just rated the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot this year — and he knows my race could determine Senate control this year. So Trump is going ALL IN on this fundraiser, flying in Lindsey Graham and countless GOP mega-donors to raise massive piles of cash for my opponent.
With polls showing me 3 points behind Trump’s candidate, Trump’s plan is to use this fundraiser to overwhelm my campaign with an avalanche of money and attack ads.
Trump’s scheme could easily surge my opponent into a huge lead, costing us this race and our Democratic Senate majority. That’s why we have to respond right now.
**[Please, split a $10 donation between my campaign in Nevada and Cheri Beasley’s campaign in North Carolina to help us hold the Senate and defeat Trump's megadonor machine! Fellow Conservative,

If you look at the screenshot below from a recent Democrat Senatorial Campaign Committee email, _you'd think that our opponent was in dire need of cash and help from the National Democrat Party._

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=40b0d704540e47679d01a0e55b04bc5a&_e=l4JsIL4rQjEGQzNrMthI4BMZNOwIkpE_X5DZbkEcUnPvgQQNVig8wNiJ5DcbPIWymI8Ol5hX_D0bWAdkua56sxgq-2Wdfeqi6zrrJBDpx22C8ns4d65Z_-8rT4u-4RdcyDDwtAFc4h5_-MgHSUNynR0mOyDjYcKiijne6LU6pCOpEVm-B1Su78q-YvGcrFopLcxm0SgAqp1-XLqOsA171T9U-sPJox-GijmR1DrafUHX1jNjDHDc3iZ3e_ohIXqsHTlfMdGhrBcsjcjHHZBJfpMb42DFtb1Of9f7nba_KC89GdxXHbjZBZu5WXj83sdC1vCSL7-3X0zADmiP8iESj77lRRUxvYVRDc9MQAJKzwk7q-7ImvdhAm1ySKMT2gqvEh3F9HySVaaSEbVhTHNgUdpcqYey3kbZjoXIN8rk6SWa3kUGlBafYVIaRA3prOJ7d9MBo4g_7XqHVF4ikEgQqw%3D%3D)
Recent polling in Georgia indeed gives our campaign a slight lead (within the margin of error), but our Democrat opponent doesn't need more campaign cash.

In the last three months of 2021, **our opponent raised $9.8 million from 130,000 individual donors. As it stands, he has $23 million in the bank for our Senate race this November.**

While our campaign also had significant fundraising support last quarter, the fact remains that our opponent started raising money months before we even entered the race. With his early start, he now has millions more in the bank than us. We've got to pick up the pace if we're going to catch up because "to keep the Senate blue," Democrats must win Georgia.

**[With that in mind, would you kindly send $4.50 to our campaign today?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=40b0d704540e47679d01a0e55b04bc5a&_e=l4JsIL4rQjEGQzNrMthI4BMZNOwIkpE_X5DZbkEcUnPvgQQNVig8wNiJ5DcbPIWymI8Ol5hX_D0bWAdkua56sxgq-2Wdfeqi6zrrJBDpx22C8ns4d65Z_-8rT4u-4RdcyDDwtAFc4h5_-MgHSUNynR0mOyDjYcKiijne6LU6pCOpEVm-B1Su78q-YvGcrFopLcxm0SgAqp1-XLqOsA171T9U-sPJox-GijmR1DrafUHX1jNjDHDc3iZ3e_ohIXqsfmtCydtddqUj4Xnahy-Qc-B1KPLm2vdXnMrG4VjBpjW5uHGpV_lw9_ez0uk3KfIuPMbc9rErmkR4_HTORsF6-NZkL-x7K9ncB3idzsnwqYurHfytU5r8xDphBt9OZTPL_nkAAKmJm_9Hia84dosLbbeE9tBllduagrIJ9INbxCrMCfwFtpYyufkah0iFK-WLTPFqW5uk35uzM_lofQSdQQ%3D%3D)**

Our race in Georgia is going to be the most competitive contest in the nation this fall, so we can't afford to be outspent for a single moment.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=40b0d704540e47679d01a0e55b04bc5a&_e=l4JsIL4rQjEGQzNrMthI4BMZNOwIkpE_X5DZbkEcUnPvgQQNVig8wNiJ5DcbPIWymI8Ol5hX_D0bWAdkua56sxgq-2Wdfeqi6zrrJBDpx22C8ns4d65Z_-8rT4u-4RdcyDDwtAFc4h5_-MgHSUNynR0mOyDjYcKiijne6LU6pCOpEVm-B1Su78q-YvGcrFopLcxm0SgAqp1-XLqOsA171T9U-sPJox-GijmR1DrafUHX1jNjDHDc3iZ3e_ohIXqsI7CWfG6SzDb0gj1msihxAXTFfkVLnDfVdzfaDXaAaL16Ryo-t9VFYv3A-hr_TEjtU6YJ7HQqizevqHTWecBlonJ4eWMvKs7m1HZr02anhaQU7yWAEpxFjrtQxfmdePek5ZkkGnZVYK9lSkNxT-b1JlpXGDoefwwxMO_W43n9fN5qXthXArlZkFZ8wA7CDPLIUop3UdWN1RiXAumxehARUQ%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for Senate

body:

Is anyone else tired of Netflix and every other streaming service dipping their toes into woke culture? Or more like _dunking..._

If we wanted a lecture on Critical Race Theory or BLM, we would’ve just turned on CNN or scrolled through Demi Lovato’s Twitter feed.

[**Tired of the Woke? Become a member of the Daily Wire today >>>**](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJw9kMtugzAQRb8GdiAzdsBZsGhLoi7aTVVVbTaRsQ1xYgMCE5R-fcc0rTSy5DN37jxUCaxgVMemBAIYGQBQutmmjeaEk7zhDLK6oDxixIlWCOlN3wmrR5_K3sWnctPIOlMSmNxyyhtCKa0FAcHYRtaEQmzLk_fDFNGHCPYYdkiVMPa2mFEHD0ROjFdtQ5ruZ--OTiszu4hWgzAqgjywqZ9HqZF50d6RFA4FbYdw6S9ad_4v0Xc-_Gj1uxXZJlb7aZh90Pl-1JNPUCQ7n2RYc-ws9qHVZVmev_hByd0KT0bh2FV-KN4_C36Ix1INi7HWTHmB92gdrrFeAeewprmVUfEYAaxlAOvC0H5cz_MbfL9iJ1iS3dm9kJCEJ3z9bdD_yrtJqoNtoEX1A8IEgkM)

“Woke” — like its cousin “canceled” — bespeaks “political correctness” gone awry.

And we think most Americans would agree that modern television has gone awry whenever screenwriters try to slip some irrelevant woke lunacy into the plotline. It seems like every show these days tries to beat us over the head with their woke propaganda. We’re sick of it, and we bet you’re sick of it, too.

Let’s go back to the good old days before television was woke. [**Become a member of the Daily Wire today. We promise our media coverage will never be woke. >>>**](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJw9kMtugzAQRb8GdiAYU9ssWKSlWTVdVFXVZhM5tiFObEBggtKv75imlUaWfObOnYeqoGAF0bGpIAOMHAAIeSjTRvOMZ7ThBeRHRnhUZE60Qkhv-k5YPfpU9i4-VepY5iURlChGSCkYoVSI_NgUwLmQNIttdfJ-mCKyiWCLYYdUCWNvixl18EDkxHjVNqTJdvbu4LQys4tIPQijIqCBTf08So3Mi_aOpHAoaDuES3_RuvN_ib7z4Ufq362yMrHaT8Psg873o558giLZ-STHmkNnsQ-pX7-uW37e7S5yhSejcOya7tn7J-P7eKzUsBhrzUQZ3qN1uMZ6BZzDmuZWRewxAljLANaFof24nuc3-N5hJ1iS57N7yUISnvD1t0H_K-8mqQ62gbL6B4VTggE)

Can we all agree on one thing for 2022? Let’s put woke to rest.

clean_body: It’s over it's over Hey gang, Is anyone else tired of Netflix and every other streaming service dipping their toes into woke culture? Or more like dunking... If we wanted a lecture on Critical Race Theory or BLM, we would’ve just turned on CNN or scrolled through Demi Lovato’s Twitter feed. “Woke” — like its cousin “canceled” — bespeaks “political correctness” gone awry. And we think most Americans would agree that modern television has gone awry whenever screenwriters try to slip some irrelevant woke lunacy into the plotline. It seems like every show these days tries to beat us over the head with their woke propaganda. We’re sick of it, and we bet you’re sick of it, too. Let’s go back to the good old days before television was woke. Can we all agree on one thing for 2022? Let’s put woke to rest. Just listen to hear how wokeness is killing the Marvel Franchise: Everything wokeness touches turns to crap... The MCU should know it’s only alienating its loyal and supportive fans who have been there from the start. We’re in the midst of some BIG media projects for 2022. We’re making movies, comedy shows, and so much more. Together, let’s put woke to bed. We think it’s way past woke’s bedtime anyways, don't you? Thanks, Team Daily Wire P.S. Curious to see what exactly we’re talking about? Click for a sneak peek of our upcoming thriller, Shut In. 1831 12th Ave South Ste. 460, Nashville, TN 37203 |
